name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: American Revival
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Your support advances our movement for an American revival.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_t=IbTLQ52aDVBBUq8LhJI-s6eZ5s2y9F8o8JfPPoOl9Nj13-j8XdwJNYEK8QM6B_aEMHFP0TX3NQrjFi0z704rmiZVUyOXim9TVwCClMFvKJA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_t=IbTLQ52aDVBBUq8LhJI-s6eZ5s2y9F8o8JfPPoOl9Nj13-j8XdwJNYEK8QM6B_aEMHFP0TX3NQrjFi0z704rmiZVUyOXim9TVwCClMFvKJA%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlI8cMkec7ojRQpY6Iy8nAh7HXZjaGhuEW1RguUqB6eM0nULbZK69tmAFD7lUqlVs0XtJoXf75e2cB0ARJBJJJhE89T_Ij7VXeOBDWHf3CFLGauwHDT4ij4uWg9xJqyXDuyu01RYROp9ogSPF5VW_FFwqP509IX85ZIj54Il6LGFuPpYP0nkUd4XueUyBx3t4ttQQaXIL8pZsQ3CQr_kWp0ErUY-4FSZs9jSR6W2cHAzvyihqhlRYN61tilY49KTay_o3bSo-segjhgt7OU7HCXR_R2wSr7I3hynb94nr6Jnos7k7MYWhXkNw4lAyDSoLyuKPC1p6KcZkWZzApQoWa-JR33WPygf3DOtpv9m_RSW4Wo5IJQYzEZZjvFactiDL_w%3D%3D)
Fellow American - here's how we win the White House in 2024: a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.

But this isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

Now, I need your help.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlI8cMkec7ojRQpY6Iy8nAh7HXZjaGhuEW1RguUqB6eM0nULbZK69tmAFD7lUqlVs0XtJoXf75e2cB0ARJBJJJhE89T_Ij7VXeOBDWHf3CFLGauwHDT4ij4uWg9xJqyXDuyu01RYROp9ogSPF5VW_FFwqP509IX85ZIj54Il6LGFuPpYP0nkUd4XueUyBx3t4ttQQaXIL8pZsQ3CQr_kWp0ErUY-4FSZs9jSR6W2cHAzv71VVFX_AXfYJsUCPQKJdmmn5gAXhFsZpo8MFIntr9lHF_FGOWrcNCJ3C5sw_2l9IxrEeqjbLDztVdCSnsYFo8TzyTRtZ1ptxxdpPWiDOcEtYwyfkOa_pZya816iAIbiA2Z62VfKeovjFBMNeISlBZw%3D%3D)
We're about to hit a major campaign milestone - 10,000 unique donors in just weeks of campaigning.

Hitting this goal so early on is setting a precedent for what we're about to accomplish together over the next 20 months.

So here's what I am asking of you today: **[will you be one of the 10,000 donors I need? Make it a small donation - every dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to taking on the "Great Reset" and reviving this nation through the "Great Uprising."](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlI8cMkec7ojRQpY6Iy8nAh7HXZjaGhuEW1RguUqB6eM0nULbZK69tmAFD7lUqlVs0XtJoXf75e2cB0ARJBJJJhE89T_Ij7VXeOBDWHf3CFLGauwHDT4ij4uWg9xJqyXDuyu01RYROp9ogSPF5VW_FFwqP509IX85ZIj54Il6LGFuPpYP0nkUd4XueUyBx3t4ttQQaXIL8pZsQ3CQr_kWp0ErUY-4FSZs9jSR6W2cHAzvs-m8MZyozkIqh5cXA1c1GiDSReWnQdKJmRNw2-Pau3Q_LqAFIobMv8rHaVAop-Kx8xCtOeMk3lqKPOQ5Aee_qeL3hJMWSgJz10JNWOYDlCYSb3UETWcTem6vsGxf_UObBFUys_AqYrMhzsYsgNKFPA%3D%3D)**

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

**[Be a part of our movement, Fellow American, by becoming our 10,000th donor!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlI8cMkec7ojRQpY6Iy8nAh7HXZjaGhuEW1RguUqB6eM0nULbZK69tmAFD7lUqlVs0XtJoXf75e2cB0ARJBJJJhE89T_Ij7VXeOBDWHf3CFLGauwHDT4ij4uWg9xJqyXDuyu01RYROp9ogSPF5VW_FFwqP509IX85ZIj54Il6LGFuPpYP0nkUd4XueUyBx3t4ttQQaXIL8pZsQ3CQr_kWp0ErUY-4FSZs9jSR6W2cHAzvNCKAWvqIeVMC82y0bUlLf7IulBlcZ4mPmgpmWoCy42i4rxszLMQJni5OagPW228Qy6jf_c7XmvuCerdLCyjCqXZCamilgMbSvxSZAqDx27Gs6jO7iyNGGW43v6wCGZhywPyMk9k71NAiGKhE6CfwRA%3D%3D)**

For the New American Dream,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlI8cMkec7ojRQpY6Iy8nAh7HXZjaGhuEW1RguUqB6eM0nULbZK69tmAFD7lUqlVs0XtJoXf75e2cB0ARJBJJJhE89T_Ij7VXeOBDWHf3CFLGauwHDT4ij4uWg9xJqyXDuyu01RYROp9ogSPF5VW_FFwqP509IX85ZIj54Il6LGFuPpYP0nkUd4XueUyBx3t4ttQQaXIL8pZsQ3CQr_kWp0ErUY-4FSZs9jSR6W2cHAzvIDPd7Gj8QY0tWiq89EtVEIkbjdotakR3KABQ9U4TIapymAg2G5va-uf0C_aGb1kUDHwp-YksrPmpsCNZqlez8oYqcIy8XlVkRxQOj7loEdqlvnoIPcq2C1ml1Z2nQ179M6orSEZdZfJoVebiioc51Q%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlI8cMkec7ojRQpY6Iy8nAh7HXZjaGhuEW1RguUqB6eM0nULbZK69tmAFD7lUqlVs0XtJoXf75e2cB0ARJBJJJhE89T_Ij7VXeOBDWHf3CFLGauwHDT4ij4uWg9xJqyXDuyu01RYROp9ogSPF5VW_FFwqP509IX85ZIj54Il6LGFuPpYP0nkUd4XueUyBx3t4ttQQaXIL8pZsQ3CQr_kWp0ErUY-4FSZs9jSR6W2cHAzvoKYzfW2ZEOSeg1Y9jF_SNuPRzxjzMGNAHODFpgtGCczj8b04EXk8Ei_iykQ-EvHm19rfmk8EWMT0SUlJJ5qTtDj5wB2zDyzxObKR_r5lTaBGOnddoDzMAvmaHrv6kcQHAospOVSK2xT7IVoOUPrefw%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlI8cMkec7ojRQpY6Iy8nAh7HXZjaGhuEW1RguUqB6eM0nULbZK69tmAFD7lUqlVs0XtJoXf75e2cB0ARJBJJJhE89T_Ij7VXeOBDWHf3CFLGauwHDT4ij4uWg9xJqyXDuyu01RYROp9ogSPF5VW_FFwqP509IX85ZIj54Il6LGFuPpYP0nkUd4XueUyBx3t4ttQQaXIL8pZsQ3CQr_kWp0ErUY-4FSZs9jSR6W2cHAzvEGoF0bRs0dfocJTY12JTO98CH_KtMNNP-aGqmEqSBLLnzdkNxxsTHGCRRSSWyV8_SPSwZg7baNqrllZB1WUKKoP4MucactPKhUmzFUBnAilvlQ3-eD0B8BjaQXYIH-pcM2lHmaCSv4VVgy_RWAkhvg%3D%3D)

---

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlK7DKhSj_R7Vj20Yu10tSoIDLja780WvQB9jC5dAbSQrYnQ7pISIrzg739ugCqg9EbeqMrHm7-lcGDrXftsr5d_YDuzN5dsRfqD3UY42HOnwA62emnHhZZCLrz1tweEPob-uEV2xIhJ5gJmw0N6D7cJMOsfVGn8KFgZkpHhZWqCFURhtU8afcN8waYSZiZ9S51NxaSDPJ5R5Y-puCTuoS6A%3D)| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlLEYItpETDoH-Y6xC8WPfHpdzKeFusXZK4ep81DkqGK0sIpOX77qxKMJLB-AcEXCF18o5qMiOYC0sb-bz4Wci0cfeXSBkygS7S-yttWIdc0gzggmjBgJV1AfmKjEz9nTVcuLYBiYiQTIhE_gxRDurfjciQ0fZqnRPW-ChW8-Q03pNsQQ0-gG6mfvWc1Uoyco1Q%3D%3D)| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=49534d0a2b5449b5be5fd75b6cbc8eb6&_e=Jgcn7seBNtYGqM5pua-mlMCEzp8oGnXffNb6db67mBzvZYjRKe9Fw3nmmghosEDjXZ_cWoZNynIMg3XCzESgUDEcOQDZig_Me9SqK1SyVyePsiynbrTi0n8lMnhPb_b_-BAa9IRFqxcj3T9oLAAd2EYWAwxOn0m7gjQEEa2tt70v26o8D3daZ18Izx7SDcYyGzPVqPkt995pugQ26QRnQqhfj8xip-IYCZ9ZK75eHRw%3D)

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. subject: You've heard this before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
You've heard this before, but tonight at midnight is a HUGE deadline for this campaign. | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=94730ba763&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter --

You've heard this before, but tonight at midnight is a HUGE deadline for this campaign. The Campaign Finance Board makes us close our books at midnight, and we have to publicly report how much money we've raised since the last deadline. And with petitioning underway, this is the first important deadline this team will be facing this cycle.

[**Will you chip in now so we look as strong as possible?**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=c5e97334c3&e=2de202398d)

The reality of a fundraising deadline isn't the only thing I know you've heard before -- but in the spirit of deadline-day refreshers, do you remember how matching funds work?** Every New York City resident's donation up to $175 will be matched 8-to-1 by the city.** That means that if you chip in $25 right now, our campaign will get $225 in our bank account!

[**Can we count on you to donate before midnight to show your support -- and to take advantage of the City's matching program?**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=0ca5f532a1&e=2de202398d)

---
| [DONATE $175 ($1,575 WHEN MATCHED)](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=4fb72945db&e=2de202398d "DONATE $175 \($1,575 WHEN MATCHED\)")

---
| [DONATE $25 ($225 WHEN MATCHED)](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=016422dc53&e=2de202398d "DONATE $25 \($225 WHEN MATCHED\)")
---
| [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=da6a532973&e=2de202398d "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
| Thank you for donating before tonight's deadline -- every dollar counts (9 times over).

Best,
Team Carlina

P.S. Did you see the statement Carlina posted on social media with her exciting news? We're so happy to see Team Carlina growing with such a special addition -- and wanted to make sure that every supporter saw it too!

name: Wisconsin Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, and what it means for state Democrats →
body:
In a moment, we’ll get you up to speed on what’s happening in Wisconsin and what it could mean for state Democrats | | |
---
| | **Here’s what you should know:**
1. _Hundreds_ of GOP state legislators and officials promoted the election fraud claims that led to Trump’s January 6th insurrection.
2. Trump’s election-denying crony Daniel Kelly just advanced in Wisconsin’s pivotal Supreme Court race that will have an important impact on abortion access and elections in the state.
3. The outcome of this Supreme Court race could give us the chance to un-gerrymander Wisconsin – giving Democrats their best chance in over a decade to pick up seats in the state's legislature.

State-level races are overlooked and underfunded – making them especially vulnerable to Republicans’ outsized spending. **That means we have to put in the work _now_ to make sure we're ready to elect Democrats who will defend our rights and fight back against Republican extremism in statehouses nationwide.** [Will you chip in $7, $25, or whatever fits your budget today to give state Democrats the resources they need to WIN in states like Wisconsin? Hundreds of GOP state legislators and officials promoted the election fraud claims that led to Trump’s January 6th insurrection. 2. Trump’s election-denying crony Daniel Kelly just advanced in Wisconsin’s pivotal Supreme Court race that will have an important impact on abortion access and elections in the state. 3. The outcome of this Supreme Court race could give us the chance to un-gerrymander Wisconsin – giving Democrats their best chance in over a decade to pick up seats in the state's legislature. State-level races are overlooked and underfunded – making them especially vulnerable to Republicans’ outsized spending. LR23CA will eliminate the inheritance tax in Nebraska. Nebraska is only one of six states that charges this atrocious tax. This tax is burdensome and complicates (especially in real estate) transferring wealth from one generation to the next. It is time we leave the 12% club and join the rest of the Union in better tax policy.

Legislative Update Week Ending March 11, 2023
Week in and week out the Unicameral and the ability to legislate is being disrupted by Senators Cavanaugh, Hunt, Day, & Conrad who have become "The Leadership of the Democrats". The Nebraska Democratic Party has no formal foundation of truth and values, coupled with their Chairwoman who is scrambling to regain control. We continue to experience a slide to the right by all groups outside the radical Dems.
This week we had severe medical issues affecting two republican senators and their families. We encourage you to take some time to pray for the physical healing of our senators and their families. These issues are having a slowing effect on the session as we need their presence in the Capitol for important work. With respect to privacy, we will not discuss the details of the medical updates, but please be in prayer for our senators and their families for healing.
On a brighter note, republicans keep winning big! The first victory occurred against the educational lobbies, who have an iron grip on the purse at the Unicameral. [ LB753 ](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=911kl7DHU1a7k0dgnjzTL8OLfh_koH--CIn6Ks4UG4c.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAzMjYiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)passes to the select file with 31 votes allowing citizen and corporate taxpayers to support students with scholarships to attend the school of their choice! Agriculture
Did you know that the Chinese ownership of agricultural land was just shy of 14k acres in 2010? In 2020, the number of acres owned by the Chinese has ballooned to over 352k acres! The NEGOP is extremely concerned about Nebraska's land going to the Chinese. We are happy to report that after discussions this session, we have a senator that will bring a bill to prohibit the Chinese from ownership of Nebraska land in 2024. This bill will be modeled after other bills finding their stride in other states like South Dakota.
Bicameral or Unicameral? Senator Erdman had his constitutional amendment heard to change Nebraska to a two-house legislature. The proposal would seek a second legislative branch based more on geography and less on population (much like the US Senate). Online feedback was brisk but testifiers to support in attendance were lacking.
The Auditor Comes Down Heavy on the DOT Mike Foley issued a scathing report of the Department of Transportation for a lack of internal controls and oversight. After being sighted for excessive wages in the past, State Auditor Mike Foley noted that no follow-up action was taken by the department. The same problems in wage abuse continued to occur with the same employee! Even worse, the state auditor cited over $15 MILLION in errors that were found in the year-end financial reports from the Department. This is disturbing for a department that is looking to expand its role with more financial investments coming their way. More On Education Did you know the state spends over $4.4 billion annually on K-12 education? Nebraskans need to know this fact when they consider fiscal footnotes on education and changes to the system.
Constitutional amendments were heard on eliminating the state board of education. [LR24CA ](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=EJKF0jomkFCV0GyUcoNPmchzoS8wwM9Y9JHOKwLkxQI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAyMzYiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)eliminates the state board and lets the governor pick the education commissioner to steer education. [LR28CA](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=67uD3daigfZbeDfzFRKHXmK-lnSrtRnC1ghuBVxH27M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2NjQiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) would let the governor appoint the state board members. [ LR29CA ](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=kMDNhitgcwzZnr97_xNCffl4jQKJN4ycDCZfBltz__M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2NjUiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)would limit the service of state board members to two terms. No one testified in favor. One of the state board members showed up to testify against with other opponents. Many of the proposals were designed during a frustration with scores, curriculum, and a lack of parental control. Meanwhile, a Parental Rights bill was introduced in DC while Nebraska’s Parental Bill (LB374) takes arrows at home. If DC can get a bill right...surely Nebraska can come through. The core of the Parental Bill of Rights must advance to preserve the rights of parents. Please call your senator. NRD and Utility Boards The NEGOP is bringing focus to the importance of these boards, As environmentalist money has come in strong to these races, we see policy that continues to move these institutions to the Left. We feel these policies will make resources less accessible, less reliable, and more expensive. This week the governor made an announcement he is seeking applicants for a vacancy on the NPPD Board of Directors (District 5; Western Nebraska). This is a very important position to hold to continue our goal for affordable and reliable energy.https://governor.nebraska.gov/press/governor-pillen-seeks-applicants-nppd-board In addition, there is an opening in the Nemaha NRD in District 4 (Nebraska City). Please consider and call your neighbors to fill these important roles. https://www.nemahanrd.org/about/news/director-sought-subdistrict-4
Three of the five hearings for bills this week we will be watching relate to resources. [LB534 ](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=h24wP0mH8oBN8RIj2LEPWTdsLD9iaThV83l2Jjh9Z2M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA1MzgiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)(Slama) deals with quality water systems in our community. [LB571](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=RzFsifBNmBLCnVeZXrfDb-kTOpE2Obp5tUEB4NbVYAk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA0NzYiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) (Lippincott) deals with water well standards. [LB541](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=HRvC_KNb_X64PHggj9IhTyf_-P5HcCHSzeQqvk77DCs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA1NzgiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) (Lowe) seeks to move power and irrigation district directors to the partisan ballot. The differences between the two parties on these issues could not be more clear. Voters needs to know which party these candidates come from and the platforms they support. The approaches to resources and irrigation are very different. Winner Take All [LB764](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=ruQPITx2gtjfD4YfNth0cHqleV5drF5kWlT4cVcwibk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAyNTYiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) will be heard Wednesday at 1:30 with Senator Lippincott’s bill to return the state to a “Winner Take All” situation in the presidential election. This would eliminate the partitioning of this state in electoral college votes. Republicans should recall that President Trump did not receive all electoral college votes from Nebraska. Biden received the electoral college vote in District 2 (Omaha Metro). Many voting models show the same electoral college vote going to Biden again in District 2. It is time Nebraska operates like 48 other states and our state’s electoral college vote to go in their entirety to the winner. Taxes [LR23CA](https://www.ne.gop/so/d6ORJDgEg/c?w=eTNp1zTu9e5vpzh7kN5woVr8iXw8jBN32AgjT-0O1f8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk5MDMiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) will be heard on Thursday at 1:30 in the Capitol. LR23CA will eliminate the inheritance tax in Nebraska. Nebraska is only one of six states that charges this atrocious tax. This tax is burdensome and complicates (especially in real estate) transferring wealth from one generation to the next. It is time we leave the 12% club and join the rest of the Union in better tax policy. Life We have intentionally not focused on too many of the democrat bills this session. Very few will reach the floor or finish line. Republicans can pivot their energy & focus on the positive conservative bills being put forward. With that said, the Democrats are planning a major offensive against life this week at two hearings. Republicans need to show up and stand for Nebraska babies. Thursday at 1:30 will be Hunt’s constitutional amendments on “Reproductive Freedom”. We encourage your opposition online and in person to these amendments. In an effort to put focus on “Regional Politics” and stay abreast of what is happening in the surrounding states, we look to include legislation or action from the Midwest. We highlight Wyoming passing a landmark bill banning abortion on Thursday and redefined that abortion is not healthcare. Well done, Wyoming! Nebraska must continue to push for tougher standards to protect innocent life. The 2nd House needs to continue to stand against bad amendments by Senators Hunt & the other extreme leaders of the Dr Democratic party & continue to push for protection of the innocent. 2024 Elections Heat Up Candidates for legislature, UNl Regent, and the State Board of Education are beginning their campaigns and reaching out to the NEGOP for development. Are you interested in running? Please email me political@ne.gop. We want to help guide you to an effective and productive start. 2024 will be a key battle for the future of our state. The Spending Spree of Congress Did you know the CBO in congress estimated the spending in 2023 to $6.22 Trillion? Did you know the national debt has ballooned to over $31 Trillion? As inflation continues to soar and debt payments continue to skyrocket, the NEGOP continues to watch the spending votes and proposals out of DC. We are encouraging our federal reps to continue to just say no for the sake of the economy and the next generation. DC has a big problem and we need less DC and more Nebraska.
19 Bills to the floor! As of Saturday, we have 18 bills that have made it to General File (1 Constitutional Amendment) and one bill that has made it to Select File. We must stay diligent in our work. As a senator’s aide stated this week, “The Left Never Gets Tired”. The citizens, senators, and party will have to continue to keep the foot on the gas pedal into June. We assure you the staff, senators, and party have put an incredible amount of work into this session with many late nights. Keep showing up! Most importantly, we need our full Republican team on the field. We will end this letter where we began. Please pray for all our senators, but in particular for the health and well being of two of our senators and their families. We need them here in the Unicameral and most importantly we care about our senators and their families. Until Next Week... Donate. Engage. Work. Todd WatsonPolitical Director NEGOP

name: CaucusRoom
subject: CaucusRoom Weekend Edition ☀️
body:
Declassify the Records! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-jl/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **
**Do you have friends or family that would enjoy CaucusRoom? Forward this newsletter to them and ask them to join!**
### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* UK says[ **illegals can't stay**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-y/).
* **[China increased](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-j/)** their military budget.
* If not Biden,[ **then who**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-t/)?
* Do we need a **[new time zone](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-i/)**?
* **[Bernie Sanders doesn't know](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-d/)** what he's talking about.
* Our CEO was on the **[Frontier Freedom podcast](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-h/)**.
* China says we're headed for a **[catastrophic conflict](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-k/)**.
* Kamala made up more **[stories about her childhood](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-u/).**
* **[NYC bans masks](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-o/).**
* Is the **[progressive fever](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-x/)** finally breaking?
* Is the **[stock market crash](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-m/)** coming?
* Who will **[Trump pick](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-c/)** for his running mate?
* New info about **[Nord Stream attack](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-q/)**.
* **[More boxes of documents](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-a/)** found at Biden's lawyer's office.
* The **[Twitter Files hearing](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-f/)** was heated!
* White House **[gives a male](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-z/)** the Women of Courage award.

### **Unanimous Vote!**
## [**House votes 419-0 to force the Biden administration to declassify ALL information about COVID**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-v/) origins and the Wuhan lab leaks.

### **Biden Helps the Cartels**
Sen. Ted Cruz points out the**[devastating side effects of Biden's leniency on the southern border,](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-e/) **highlighting how he has fueled Mexican cartel profits. **Credit Cards Will Not Track Gun Purchases** Visa Inc., MasterCard Inc., and Discover Inc., [**have paused their work on a plan to track when cardholders make purchases at gun stores**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-s/) [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-yd/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-yh/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qktyhuy-trhiujldw-yu/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

| Fellow Conservative,

Joe Biden forgave $400 BILLION in student loan debts. **But there 's a catch - he wants YOU to pay for it.**

That means millions of Americans who haven't gone to a college or university - or those who took out loans and worked their butts off to pay them back - will _pay for someone 's tuition to attend a gender studies class._

That means millions of Americans who haven't gone to a college or university - or those who took out loans and worked their butts off to pay them back - will pay for someone 's tuition to attend a gender studies class. name: Right Wing Report
subject: Biden intends to sign UN Gun Ban
body:
[unsubscribe](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtkMuOhCAQRb9Gl6R4CLpg0T3T_R_aIKCCirTYfv04s55ULSr3JqeSoyXmouaEAqtLJbu6aVhfOkngiigm1wClCCPOH_j-ELymty98B14wiM7YlF0wUS9zTOg1-9LKTr8qRXSvRPUiFDcYswt6HdAxqjQpvax4U0ONWTlJm9JS0FtBntemOKJ_oL8lfR7vqaDfc7XsH53jnH0VOlyl3mrTpBRN3qosxuUE0hv-wjSc3WkE1t4GqsZBh3aJx8R5eHvYB6IY66Fh0B-DsaPhZE_zBJ2wjDSNKgjXzl7_xtPXYUsDX6IfRGdPsQ37Hj7bKmjXGltGqZbspsltXFxOjG_d9GciyQPFqDYARPsV0Ha08-dAW2bAKXJtoKFGYgV-oF4wdTm2ef0BaNd-9A)
---
Dear Patriot, Below are links to some of the most important news stories today for your consideration. Courtesy of Right Wing Report. The Globalist Gun Control Agenda is back from the dead
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations' "Small Arms Treaty" has been the Gun Control Lobby's crown jewel for decades.

They've been waiting for an anti-gun President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House **so they can launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate**.

Now they think they finally see their opportunity to _ram it through_!

But you and I have a chance to stop them cold -- **[as long as we take IMMEDIATE action to help dismantle this dangerous Treaty](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtUU2SpSAYO81zSQEfAi5cdM903wOBJyAiKv6evu1ZTyWrpCqVSmxLuJCcAmayMm0nm4a9K99S_EhA6AMMgAji_It8fgku4eMP-cT8xfDie1cOn_rF5mkpSE9j5VpMABqNG1tLYrASBpTUGmvV4DdWTFVjW_NGYklYFVtXSn7Bx4t-PyzLgP4T-mvC91niC_4yDhCDk1cmB9tnYM3ap6Wb7ZRSvVphR5DZpKDvvlZWlUHXR6I0y61sSm4nH21synmoQkMt6s1sIt56yvVq1HQHvcEW2C2Axm6q8z4qHaKQSycHbK0Tat5D9JFczji7aww6zVdQN8umH1yZnb5vpk9KTe89F-Xpzq13T_HhHmVaS-B5GYPo3C3WsO_pWmcBnepdtbQmHz5Gv3LxjNuPysd_k5b2RMtiVowRvGeM1lNN14nWg2EOyKsESSIxY36it2DmOcsd8w8xa5rz)**.

As Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the email below, it's absolutely critical we act now!

**Sincerely,

The Hon. Rand Paul
U.S. Senator (R-KY)**

* * *

Dear Fellow Patriot,

"BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN REGISTRATION TREATY."

That was the headline in the _Washington Examiner_ shortly after President Biden's State Department spokesman told international bureaucrats of "_the continuing commitment of the United States_ " to the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva, Switzerland.

Just a few weeks later, President Biden himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City, stating:
> "We'll continue to uphold the long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments, like **_support for arms control measures_** to reduce the risk and enhance transparency."
Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that President Biden wouldn't use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" down the throats of Americans just got those hopes CRUSHED.

The battle over implementation of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers' designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S. Senators "NO UN GUN BAN" at once](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtkcuSpSAQRL9GlwRQXMCFi-6Z7v8AUcEnryvq17c964mqVWZEReapviVcSE4BM1mbVsumYUPtWoofCQh9BgMggjj_Ip9fgkv4-EM-Ma8Yjm60ubhtjL3fY0bdvta2FdJIxnoDzFDFgCoCHZZApaKDZljVa_vijcSSsHppbc6-go-Kfj-b44z-c_TXhO8zLxX8XTUIG8-FZgc-3nLudQ4xKqkPadLA3_y-t441fTwO0b97K84uHDPcd-m8wEDvV5KpCKP1xM04R73faT64YkMZjtFfZHlLccqJJK8JfcqsDU8puWm7djzO3otXmddiQQVzNYFbQqzOT5BoGyVCLLMj9FQV5b2zT-D5XuWW8sR9XCeh7S3SdBzblYIArUZbx9b44pbFJS4eqOOq3PIPZW5PFKNJGCMYAkbpVPt1olQY5oCc2mCTSATMTzQIZp4n2RJ-AGk7l9g)**!

As you'll see, this survey insists that your U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN "Small Arms Treaty" in the U.S. Senate.

_If there's anything we've learned, it's that globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed "need" for the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" for years_.

From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members.

But at the very same time the Biden Administration was pledging their support for the UN's "Small Arms Treaty," they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military weaponry to the Taliban!

They don't care about keeping guns out of the hands of terrorists.

_They care about keeping guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans_!

Reading through the details of the UN "Small Arms Treaty," it's hard to see how our Second Amendment could survive, if ratified.

For starters, the Treaty text demands the U.S. identity "end users" (gun buyers), document "the quantity, value, and model/type" of firearms and ammunition, and develop "national control standards" to regulate transfers.

_In other words, by design it's an International Gun Registry that'll include detailed information on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward outright CONFISCATION_.

Worse, all that information would be made accessible by despots and foreign governments including the Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China.

**[As you can see, it's vital you sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S. Senators demanding they reject this scheme](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtUUuSoCAUO40uKT76gIWL7pnue4CooOAHaFFPP86sp5JVUpVKJUNHgAugDDeiNp0WUjZj7TqKX4kR-gIzhggC-CKfXxwE-_hFPjFUDY5usrm4dYrDvsWM-i3UtpNyJC0GwgzVhhKlTN8qQaGnpu2lZHXoWpACC9LUvrM57xX7qOj3yxwX9J_Qvyb7vrKv2O-gGbfx8jQ7tsdHLIPOR4xK6FOYNIIpCfclyYlC1DHfZfGXgp-t6WEZS5moJCYUGNr-bvH50xqdedKyVSlZj7VJ4pB-peGKTgjXDM_QW-7nOU1kD6sJRs1-NSubMlvKvbRbGfT5qIfL5OLoTGqOHNw-VhQGZ9_CyxPEmvIMewwz1_bhaT7P9U4HZ1pNto6d2Yvz3iXg76hTUM7_mzJ3F4rRJIwRGw-M0qW2-0KpNBgYcmplq0D8wHChkTfmPcmW4w8tNJkh)**!

Once a nation signs on, the UN's goal is to quickly impose "International Small Arms Control Standards" (ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes: *** _Mandated national "screening" for those seeking to own guns_ , giving bureaucrats the final say on whether or not you're "competent" enough to own a firearm; *** _Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo sales_ , and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to shotguns and handguns; *** _Restrictions on the number of guns and amount of ammo any "properly-licensed" individual may legally own_ ; *** _Bans on magazines holding more than ten rounds_ ; and *** _Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense_ \-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which will only happen if you're "connected" -- or paid half-a-million dollars for one of Hunter Biden's paintings). Believe me, the United Nations has no intention of slow walking any of this. To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand "utopian" designs.

Enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed they're pouring money into the UN "Small Arms Treaty" hand-over-fist.

_So, it's no wonder why they're hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it_!

clean_body: Dear Patriot, Below are links to some of the most important news stories today for your consideration. Courtesy of Right Wing Report. The Globalist Gun Control Agenda is back from the dead Dear Fellow Patriot, The United Nations' "Small Arms Treaty" has been the Gun Control Lobby's crown jewel for decades. They've been waiting for an anti-gun President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House so they can launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate. Now they think they finally see their opportunity to ram it through! But you and I have a chance to stop them cold -- . As Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the email below, it's absolutely critical we act now! Sincerely, The Hon. Rand Paul U.S. Senator (R-KY) Dear Fellow Patriot, "BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN REGISTRATION TREATY." That was the headline in the Washington Examiner shortly after President Biden's State Department spokesman told international bureaucrats of "the continuing commitment of the United States " to the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva, Switzerland. Just a few weeks later, President Biden himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City, stating: "We'll continue to uphold the long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments, like support for arms control measures to reduce the risk and enhance transparency." Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that President Biden wouldn't use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" down the throats of Americans just got those hopes CRUSHED. The battle over implementation of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers' designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch. ! As you'll see, this survey insists that your U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN "Small Arms Treaty" in the U.S. Senate. If there's anything we've learned, it's that globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed "need" for the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" for years. From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members. But at the very same time the Biden Administration was pledging their support for the UN's "Small Arms Treaty," they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military weaponry to the Taliban! They don't care about keeping guns out of the hands of terrorists. They care about keeping guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans! Reading through the details of the UN "Small Arms Treaty," it's hard to see how our Second Amendment could survive, if ratified. For starters, the Treaty text demands the U.S. identity "end users" (gun buyers), document "the quantity, value, and model/type" of firearms and ammunition, and develop "national control standards" to regulate transfers. In other words, by design it's an International Gun Registry that'll include detailed information on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward outright CONFISCATION. Worse, all that information would be made accessible by despots and foreign governments including the Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China. ! Once a nation signs on, the UN's goal is to quickly impose "International Small Arms Control Standards" (ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes: Mandated national "screening" for those seeking to own guns , giving bureaucrats the final say on whether or not you're "competent" enough to own a firearm; Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo sales , and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to shotguns and handguns; Restrictions on the number of guns and amount of ammo any "properly-licensed" individual may legally own ; Bans on magazines holding more than ten rounds ; and Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense \-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which will only happen if you're "connected" -- or paid half-a-million dollars for one of Hunter Biden's paintings). Believe me, the United Nations has no intention of slow walking any of this. To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand "utopian" designs. Enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed they're pouring money into the UN "Small Arms Treaty" hand-over-fist. So, it's no wonder why they're hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it! . As soon the gun grabbers have 67 votes to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate, you can bet Biden's pal, Sen. Chuck Schumer, will call for the vote. But we can't wait until then to fight back because even now, one-world bureaucrats are these gun controls deep into every part of government. On top of Biden's ATF anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill shows how "Democrats' latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership" involves new State Department "sanctions" designed to drive the price of ammo by BANNING imports. That's the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed trying to siphon your tax dollars into funding the UN "Small Arms Treaty." Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it's under the guise of "public health." So now Biden's Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says "Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy." That's why insisting that your U.S. Senators OPPOSE the ratification of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" is not enough. We must insist that the U.S. Senate ensures that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent by Biden on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for. But I'm counting on your help to send that message -- before it's too late. . Second, please agree to your most generous contribution to help the National Association for Gun Rights mobilize a grassroots firestorm against the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" -- using everything from U.S. Mail, to phones, to email, blogs, and guest editorials, hard-hitting video and even paid media if we can raise resources. If at all possible, I'm hoping you'll agree to $100. I know that's a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight is here, Fellow Patriot. It's on. There's no time to wait. . Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There's no time to waste. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights P.S. Reports say the Biden Administration will be signing on to the UN "Small Arms Treaty" any day, setting up an all-out fight over ratification and implementation here in the United States. name: David Horowitz
subject: Banned on YouTube
body:
They say my interview with Dr. Anthony Harper violates YouTube’s “misinformation” policy.

| |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652647%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LcJ89Lmed%2bNhJWvaZST3Xw&sysid=1)
---
You can’t watch this video because YouTube is censoring my explosive new book: “ _Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_.” They say my interview with Dr. Anthony Harper violates YouTube’s “misinformation” policy. Remember, this is the same “misinformation” policy that censored anyone who tried to expose Dr. Fauci’s Covid cover-up. And these are the same tech companies that have been caught red-handed colluding with federal government to control the information you have access to. The truth is that when American patriots like you are informed with the truth, the left loses their iron grip on power. That’s why the Freedom Center’s mission to uncover their manipulative plots and deliver the truth to you and the American people is so important. [**So, today, I’m asking you to join me in this fight by donating $35 or more to help me stand against my radical Leftist censors, and to make sure you’re equipped with the truth.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652648%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MI8BRIRjXTYyL3lPgI7h9w&sysid=1) **Are you able to stand with me today?** My name is David Horowitz. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary determined to bring America as we know it to its end - **_I was one of them ... before I saw the truth..._** That’s how I know the radical Left inside and out-- because I was deeply involved. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - the largest magazine for radical Marxists. But after the Black Panthers murdered my friend and aided the Communists in Vietnam, I finally opened my eyes to their lies. I cast my vote for Ronald Reagan, and never looked back. And ever since, I’ve dedicated my life to exposing and destroying their radical plans for our country.
---
| | That’s exactly what I write about in my latest book **_Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_**. And that’s why every American patriot like you should have a copy of my book. [**With your donation of $35 or more today, I will mail you a copy of my “forbidden” book Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652649%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OafATeQvFM4Ha57s53rniQ&sysid=1)

---
| | “ _Final Battle_ ” lays out how the left plans to influence our elections to destroy the very freedoms America was founded on. Friend, I need you to read this book. The only way to stop the radical left from overtaking our country is to share this information with American patriots all across our country. The radical left fights so hard to censor and clean sweep the internet of any messages of truth from Conservative sources. Just like my book and my YouTube interview. Friend, that’s why the David Horowitz Freedom Center fights every day to expose the radical left, inform American patriots of the truth, and empower folks like you. We want you to join us to fight for the beliefs so many of us have and don’t want to see ripped away during our lifetime. You’ve probably seen the buzz on networks like Fox and Newsmax.
---
| |
---
| **"David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left."**** **
---
**\-- Dinesh D’Souza**

[**That’s why I’m asking you to join me and thousands of other Americans in this fight, through a donation of $35 or more today. With your $35 donation I’ll send you a complimentary copy of Final Battle so you can read the truth the Left is fighting so hard to keep out of your hands.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652641%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QA5DbKi1GkjVybIp7Nr15w&sysid=1) I know with patriots like you the radical left can never win.

David Horowitz

name: Candace Owens
subject: Here’s the real disease hurting our communities
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about — the victimhood mentality.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi1ub3j6du92dkqp4lfltc8560p9uj9ktdd3dl48_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj1c9h2bs)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlmcd2t6fr32h0e1aoddk85an2im8me5cgv4mvk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj1c9h2bs)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zth74p4sdjot8oh2o0rg0hfdt274mi8hef6n7328_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj1c9h2bs)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

clean_body: There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about — the victimhood mentality. Friend, There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare. My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities. I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. It taught me never to be a victim again. My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media. As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. Then one night, the KKK showed up. My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds. But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. " My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back! I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me. I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same. Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities: We put together BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back. This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation. In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities. Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events. We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality. Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8av3sn68btf0ddobhaoq0ssi81dds2cbqfgss08_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmlqupn4c743qcb6tmhgt2lu24oq41ljo1ee9t7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0f6qv4klg80ks8eetkv6l5oean3a4o25a1p4au0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdlslnd7q4ihpego1je5bkaptjbfot30v1pas55o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdadut48l380tfc682gv93lnabpb1iv315totvh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ktog84j4uf56oao4cl2isv230bo0rud4l3lnfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgs2d2824dtt98pjr4nni8ek5k06bhhgb0j6h92g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbkubgjlabbvai11g05qm9091oblta7ejq9mrup0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg2h6atcrhsgf1k7jq3gaudma8n7234rq763dpcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj2c1h2bs).

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhc8fb0e2qdmu5146470odrivckb4jhk4r4gupe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkni3au5q7i6e94m69img3hhru437plluaq5b7r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj1chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za7m9oiuh04r0jidtahb9mp1ojcueiif6hkurbb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj1chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdm1sleqqspjqi7d2p9obr4up4fdc21do0ku34po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi6aoj1chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Your America
subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00016%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q6pfYrxLQ3vtVcIEEi%2fKWQ&sysid=1) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on ... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00017%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bQez5Q8T%2bWHJQ4HeHUAbPQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00018%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HhBDOYnI9YyQUY98Tvzosw&sysid=1)

subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zep79qa3ncaoskk47it9djt4p11g9krpvo4s1530_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi61o71c5h2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on ... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlfo3jdoqu6a5s32sc8hjin7jcrm06u21tg36glo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi61o71c5h2bs) [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb9hqurki83kcgpukrgnfso2nk8asupprf5rmce8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi61o71c5h2bs)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8gjb5gvgb2gta94feka76k640u9dag1bkfs7ulg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi61o71cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv5cennqpa0afssa4t4tvqmjai8oaij3vu7if4o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi61o71cdh2bs) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh19c5ai3askeb20n9te34qr482co1svn33j9nm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdi61o71cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652756%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=37X2ur463AVT1Y4oug08gA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652756%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=37X2ur463AVT1Y4oug08gA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652757%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FmCqW%2f5%2fe5LmXsIHFpPlvg&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

---

body:
