---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7csin7060gjcl9j7cgo5hng6pf8emrrfjd78as0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh60or2c1h2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjocvd0j2ke4mbqpa266k8pgtkhaijp0f473ns20_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh60or2c1h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z339vknjkeuf9784e5c9930kmn8u1rhh41ajrt90_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh60or2c1h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7l11noejgs0juqb2iqntuoolkdb9mfe9im5sbeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh60or2c1h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

subject: It’s almost time to say FUBAR

body:
Veterans understand responsibility and accountability. Washington's politicians do not.

Ukraine and Russia. China and Taiwan. Americans kidnapped in foreign countries. Iran's Uranium program. Spy Balloons flying across the United States Frequent Cyber security attacks. The answer from Democrats in Washington is to grow the size of our government and to keep spending, but we have a different solution. **[Help us elect Conservative Veterans to lead our nation on a path towards stronger national security and prosperity!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423210:6Fvj6fGNo:m:1:3365131770:A2EA03F2033F63581E5C4B6646CAF8F0:r "Help us elect Conservative Veterans to lead our nation on a path

We are still fighting to help restore the 8,000 service members who were impacted by the Biden vaccine mandates. We are seeking to end the CRT and DEI programs in the Department of Defense. We are still working end the invasion on our Southern Border going unanswered and to stop the fentanyl entering our country at an historic rate from killing our citizens. **Unfortunately, we 've got leaders doing a duck and cover instead of addressing issues that matter. America needs problem solvers, not politicians.** **[Will you join STAR PAC in the fight to protect our country? Donate $50, $100, or $500 today and help us elect more Veterans to defend our values in Congress!")** **Just look at how Brandon has handled the train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio.** Just look at how he and his allies want to blame others for our nation's problems. **Veterans understand responsibility and accountability. Washington 's politicians do not.** I'm a Maine and I don't tolerate excuses. But conservative Veterans are still outnumbered by the Leftists and RINOs who don't share our values and that's why we have this mess on our hands. It's also why we need your help to recruit, train and elect more brave Veterans who are seeking to continue their service to this nation. Will you join the STAR PAC team and help us safeguard our country? **[Donate today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423210:6Fvj6fGNo:m:1:3365131770:A2EA03F2033F63581E5C4B6646CAF8F0:r "Donate today!")** God Bless America, Rep. name: Claudia Tenney for Congress
subject: The situation at our Northern border?
body:
Open-border radicalism has caused a surge of illegal immigrants to our southern border. That crisis has migrated North...
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=40c588f943d5cfbecebe9f6be38c9ee685eb2cf7c3b941180ebe1f782a5deba8ab668ea35bcb949e17e814d34b08c0c8e2909dfd4cc656ac)
---
| | Peter, as you know, President Biden's open-border radicalism has caused a **_SURGE_** of illegal immigrants at our southern border. **NOW** , that crisis has migrated North and is overwhelming our Northern border. **Here 's what's unfolding up here:**
* Illegal border crossings increased by _**846%**_
* Drug smuggling has increased by _**596%**_
* Last year, there were _**109,535**_ border encounters, an almost _**15x increase**_.

Border Patrol staffing has not increased since _**2009**_
---
| | [DEMAND SECURE BORDERS: SIGN NOW >>](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=40c588f943d5cfbecebe9f6be38c9ee685eb2cf7c3b941180ebe1f782a5deba8ab668ea35bcb949e17e814d34b08c0c8e2909dfd4cc656ac)
---

Thank you for your support in this critical mission!

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: The Bible is incomparable wisdom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424771:J3Ip6fG1N:m:1:3331421248:EBD472D95940AE5578CF85AF32E73364:r)
---

The first step in solving the world's problems is clarity of sight, for without it, insight is impossible.

Our Lord, in Jeremiah, warned us:
_" Foolish and senseless people, who have eyes but do not see, who have ears but do not hear: Should you not fear me? Among my people are the wicked who lie in wait like men who snare birds. Their houses are full of deceit; they have become rich and powerful. Their evil deeds have no limit; they do not seek justice."_
This verse couldn't be more relevant today as we look to our nation's capital.

Today, Washington is plagued by leaders who have gained the world through their amoral and transactional politicking, but lost their souls through their neglect of their constituents.

Through their selfish leadership, they have proven that they lack the clarity of sight to represent the American people.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424771:J3Ip6fG1N:m:1:3331421248:EBD472D95940AE5578CF85AF32E73364:r)
---
| | | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424771:J3Ip6fG1N:m:1:3331421248:EBD472D95940AE5578CF85AF32E73364:r)
---

In order to restore morality and integrity to our nation's capital, we must have leaders who let God - **not self-interest** \- be their guide.

If you feel called like I do and want to see more faith-driven leaders, _**[please make a contribution today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424771:J3Ip6fG1N:m:1:3331421248:EBD472D95940AE5578CF85AF32E73364:r "please rush a contribution today to help us elect a new wave of principled, conservative leaders.")**_

I know that with true believers in Congress, we can start to heal our nation and deliver it to salvation.

God Bless,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424771:J3Ip6fG1N:m:1:3331421248:EBD472D95940AE5578CF85AF32E73364:r)

Mike Pompeo

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgqtapm5v0cqrq1iuoafntiir2apjisa65ii5u7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh64ob2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6pfmt7j88lqo2fghjgimq9ug9m5jndctlm605u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh64ob2c5h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3h2f75ee76rhshimp3h1m6q3965eqf8i1pf1ilg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh64ob2c5h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Great America Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78265%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5iB7H4osXbzab78QyzgQIw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78266%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yK4FshAlATG%2fyurJVmKUkw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78267%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2flXQ%2f3VfyBGak8tCV43EFg&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! name: Frances Hui
subject: Do you know what living without freedom is like?
body:
The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhglljkrjpr2k4gktvd8jf43hrcmvdbbf0643ul8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)

Friend,

I grew up in Hong Kong, a city that was once free. When I was 14, I got involved in social movements as a student in Hong Kong.

Then the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) cracked down and started stealing our freedom.

The CCP imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. _Offenders could face penalties of up to life in prison_.

**Friend, the CCP is the ultimate surveillance state. They are known for silencing the opposition, human rights abuses, and persecuting people for their religion. **

Their takeover of Hong Kong left no family, town, or life untouched.

My name is Frances Hui, a speaker with the Dissident Project and the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America.

The Dissident Project provides high schools with access to informed, intelligent perspectives from speakers who have lived under current and former socialist states worldwide.

And I've set a goal to raise $15,000 this month to support our work as we reach thousands of students with the true horrors of communism.

[_**Friend, will you with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ndvkk670u7ka35l9ne3mtkk49oed8uuolnug9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)

The Dissident Project hosts speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Eritrea,
and Venezuela with unique stories that high schoolers need to hear.

We undergo a rigorous audition and training process. There we learn to communicate our experiences in a _powerful but compassionate_ way.

And our speakers are in high demand!

**Our dissidents have already completed over 20 speeches across the country, with four upcoming speeches on the books. **

We're gearing up for a busy spring, which is why I'm emailing you today.

The Dissident Project is a not-for-profit endeavor. We don't charge schools for access to our speakers, so their testimonies are more accessible to all. **But to keep our services completely free, we rely on the generosity of people like you. **

**Will you chip in today and support the Dissident Project?**

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkt91he3n3216qpsdo9d4vcn1947jikbq3h87o0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1lf6863bkqgtej5gds3rdkrhemnjcgm7scnmkv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjlp6ldtg8mujds50lq0tnisdm30sipvnegdlm7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zanvp6jhgmbuhg1vdcrlmhlfp0dp76tofmtpv348_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zigs3h4nc1n524j3o0eb44hggu28mgcitulmsre0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,000 >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmbe0pru2rflrk9mtj3183hrfc5jvusggqt6dcjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlf9prja4544fhgt4agpjcqmv92vvhpcqek1ddc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)

**I want to share my story with students across America. **

This might be the only time these high school students get to hear the truth about how life in Hong Kong has radically changed since being under the thumb of the CCP.

Students should be thankful that they live in a country that protects our freedoms - the right to free speech, protest, and gather together to share ideas.

_**But these freedoms are often taken for granted.**_

American students need to understand how dangerous communism is to the freedoms we hold dear. Our experiences remind them how easily they can lose their freedom and how hard it is to try and get it back when it's gone.

Your generous gift will give high school students a lesson they will carry with them for a lifetime.

[_**Will you help me reach more high school students with my story? Your generous gift helps me travel to high schools across the country. Please donate by clicking here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf17trm3u9occ43aeqi1rka7h6r10lm6m76ci268_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph2bs)

Thank you,

Frances Hui

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdg2c0a13c1flclovv3ljiqru94co24pvmts0m4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh66o31cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
Team Biden is clearly not prioritizing the needs of the American people. It makes me wonder why.

They obtained it by selling access to our government and its secrets for their influence peddling schemes on Joe Biden's coattails and I intend to expose it all through my work in Congress. Why else would they be receiving millions from around the world with Joe's brothers reaping profits along with Hunter? Why are these men the first call by so many foreign businesses and countries seeking favor from the U.S. Government? **[We can't waste a single moment getting to the truth! Donate
$50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY and help ensure the Biden White House and their lawyers can’t impede our investigation.")** China didn't even hesitate to send spy balloons to fly all over the country to test our military readiness. Why? Because they know Joe Biden is weak and he won't do a thing to jeopardize his "friendship" with them. **Or is it a business relationship?** Americans deserve to know if they are safe and why their President isn't sharing information about this threat. Americans deserve to know if their President is a crook. **[Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY and help me get you the answers about why China Joe has a stronger allegiance to the Chinese Government than he does to U.S. Citizens!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423250:6rocLfGCN:m:1:3365131770:74D7A632BF7BA8F3F26A1CC7ACE71F29:r "Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY and help me get you the
answers about why China Joe has a stronger allegiance to the Chinese Government than he does to U.S. Citizens!")** We have a long way to go to fully expose all the corruption surrounding the Biden Family's business affairs. You, me and EVERY American deserves to know the truth. **Americans are witnessing their government fail them time and time again. It 's despicable and we need to stop it.** It took Biden over a week to FINALLY order the Chinese object in the sky that was spying on us to be shot down, and even after three more were shot down, he's refused to provide answers. He's doing the same thing with the train that derailed carrying hazardous chemicals in East Palestine, Ohio. When Americans lives are in harm's way, Joe isn't a man of the people he professed to be. As usual, China Joe and his team are turning a blind eye to the threats his friends in China are levying, blaming President Trump, and even Kamala Harris told the media that we should avoid "conflict or confrontation" with China. **Team Biden is clearly not prioritizing the needs of the American people. Americans should not have to live in fear or without transparency from our government. **We need a leader who will exemplify strength, put the American people first, secure our borders, and let bad actors like China, Iran and Russia know, you can 't mess with the U.S.** **[If you agree, then join my efforts to expose the truth and hold China Joe accountable.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423250:6rocLfGCN:m:1:3365131770:74D7A632BF7BA8F3F26A1CC7ACE71F29:r "If you agree, then join my efforts to
expose the truth and hold China Joe accountable.")** The more Joe stays silent, the more I believe he's guilty. For the truth, Marjorie Taylor Greene

Here’s a column headline that recently caught our eye, from Reuters: The column highlights how Elizabeth has successfully encouraged federal agencies to use all their tools to challenge big, harmful corporate mergers — mergers that can lead to lower wages, higher prices, worse service, and a less competitive economy: _“[Suing to stop Jetblue from buying Spirit Airlines] would be the third curious regulatory intervention in recent weeks, each encouraged by Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren. The cases speak to how President Joe Biden’s administration is pushing its consolidation crackdown to new extremes.”_ Of course, if you want to talk about “extremes,” there’s this: for decades, regulators took their hands off the wheel and allowed corporate concentration to reach extreme heights. From the airline industry to grocery stores to agribusinesses to Big Tech to Ticketmaster, a smaller number of giants gained more and more power, and they’ve used that power to stomp on working people and consumers. Big problems require big solutions, and that’s Elizabeth’s speciality. She’s fighting back against corporate concentration — and the Biden-Harris administration has stepped up to the plate, appointing strong officials and taking action against corporate monopolies. Here’s what the column said about how Elizabeth is helping to change the game for merger-hungry corporations: **“As the senator charges up the competition cavalry, dealmakers may have to redraw their battle plans.”** [_**If you’re glad that Elizabeth is in this fight against corporate monopolies, and if a financial contribution would make sense for you right now, help keep her in the ring with a donation of $3 or any amount.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60073832/395931292/-65073031?amount=3&refcode=EMZ12C_COR_T_20230312_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjRiMmU2OC1kZWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bMIYL7zOVNtJw1e5QwNmj1zXhRiE1231REgk2opPfI=) | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60073833/395931293/-65073031?amount=3&refcode=EMZ12C_COR_T_20230312_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjRiMmU2OC1kZWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bMIYL7zOVNtJw1e5QwNmj1zXhRiE1231REgk2opPfI=)

Friend, I'm reaching out with a personal request — can I have just 30 seconds to explain?
Democrats are defending 23 Senate seats in 2024, and Mitch McConnell just needs to flip two of them to take back the majority. Meanwhile, New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in _decades._ They nearly won the race for governor, and they flipped enough House seats red to give Kevin McCarthy the majority.
**Now, as we head into an even tougher election cycle, Republicans are _already_ attacking my campaign — and they're looking for any sign of weakness.** **That's why I'm asking 5,000 of my top supporters to endorse my campaign and show the GOP that this seat isn't up for grabs.[ You're one of my most committed supporters, friend, so I'm really counting on you: Please, will you sign on before midnight tonight to become a Citizen Endorser?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60074315/395933011/-618528345?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3978-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzBiMTZlMS1kZWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2xFG_L-EiPradPU4pRDmMUEvRIlJ_h9NV4EFz0QZVWw=&emci=05e1d3e4-62bf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=470b16e1-dec0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)**

But whether it's restoring reproductive rights to all Americans or finally securing paid family leave, there's still _so much_ work ahead of us. And we can't get the job done if we lose our Democratic Senate majority.

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'm reaching out with a personal request — can I have just 30 seconds to explain? Democrats are defending 23 Senate seats in 2024, and Mitch McConnell just needs to flip two of them to take back the majority. Meanwhile, New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades. They nearly won the race for governor, and they flipped enough House seats red to give Kevin McCarthy the majority. Now, as we head into an even tougher election cycle, Republicans are already attacking my campaign — and they're looking for any sign of weakness. That's why I'm asking 5,000 of my top supporters to endorse my campaign and show the GOP that this seat isn't up for grabs. | | Thanks to strong grassroots support from this team, we finally passed bills to ban gun trafficking, reform how the military handles sexual assault cases, expand benefits for veterans and more. I couldn't be more proud of these legislative victories we've achieved. But whether it's restoring reproductive rights to all Americans or finally securing paid family leave, there's still so much work ahead of us. And we can't get the job done if we lose our Democratic Senate majority. I'm fighting to save our Senate majority so that I can continue to deliver meaningful change for families like yours — and I can't win this fight without you, friend. So even though your Citizen Endorsement might feel like a small drop in a big bucket, this is how we build change, friend — one person at a time. | | Thank you, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652754%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sf1ESaXp%2f3o514RaIIZgaw&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652765%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jgxzIvCBZyzwUxzgrmigow&sysid=1)

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _“insurrectionists,”_ then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

I know all about this firsthand. I’ve seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I’ve even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b44d2e713a554a0a9e73b886753689a3&_e=8dYb_LH4oizfp3hwzxiPQl6gGEqxOjdUpXHLXMEpIs33YJjTj4Q97tp_okXxDGGZlZ19QP2vdbT26RKDhc737H-cKZo5RgLoNBIZWuthOJwLCc8pPSV7qTfphvlYopbsUTm3jS5l5DMzcsWO2RghuVmu7CaEJ-4m2JwEZZPS-iVT9VFXQKlTxiSM3ieqv4IVVKLU0QbQ6a7qNBhc54fdg6Y2z38qxot3rD9PmqcEgnyc-Fe7Rnsex3GE_ujpbwdGXd3jDJIpxopgpIGolPhFg9ohN7VJlUdqZXI3QgDI7ngZJfyItEatBOA4dj8nxeS6o_M2Tht24HJ2C6ygdzZ11OCBtw3Y7mmrV-CM9FFrwYDw_pGKgBXNcTpaO0fpgDKIDR946ns4iEAPMt_gmb5uAw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b44d2e713a554a0a9e73b886753689a3&_e=8dYb_LH4oizfp3hwzxiPQl6gGEqxOjdUpXHLXMEpIs33YJjTj4Q97tp_okXxDGGZlZ19QP2vdbT26RKDhc737H-cKZo5RgLoNBIZWuthOJwLCc8pPSV7qTfphvlYopbsUTm3jS5l5DMzcsWO2RghuVmu7CaEJ-4m2JwEZZPS-iVT9VFXQKlTxiSM3ieqv4IVVKLU0QbQ6a7qNBhc54fdg6Y2z38qxot3rD9PmqcEgnyc-Fe7Rnsex3GE_ujpbwdGqn2xYmQpupY_I9U5-pmhfkkAgYFdE3_jG89v0WPu5dF2ZiIOZ0dpWSlNOkufSe5yZDD4PuEbhJ8XpXOUnbQ-ccwUzymBoRHKj7vI9esXhmdNbefBNOwSK8oChywVbcvqUNM4z_Cl9if1CFWE3iQOFQ%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zidedv5rroujnlce96h2iom2ct9f6g1msfrdqtqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh69or6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgpaqms7q2qch52st7bh4l28ehcjgl3kk4jt2g18_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh69or6clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4jr3u83m23os4v7na8nd3dcrjpe1tev9mctmgk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh69or6clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3smud33a9n5qak5mhrjqiioaj013vd4fjhd32e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sdh69or6clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6124fbf2f45a4fdc9b89d00742982fa1&_e=9C3_PVWw-OdyBTeoYmerhpBVHqp8z5I2k-SZIxMfAs8tjQL4rZ7g1ickcttgk0aWhwjkq0-74WSv5xgrlBlpv4pkc2VmOQ4o1LBIg8su_j9QbX1ZIqPdHx56MY4ThuSYNbUXDi20mBh3UxyjX_NAIx0j2wuugpqWTYWUVvH2XgBGN3vorbdzEIZ-_h1FW85p1t89KL9G6ooApzhagTdijW-pY4UV1Ve2e-P07y4D5d94DzCHtPK8plrA9nuuHChugd4Ury7gAUTpCyEvojwZJgv-v5VvqU22Qzqa8k1TJFYVYrLVY1vgxelZsL8NR9F9R7W__EiqEiU3_hecrbKwk3R_n4YsGAu5Pd-ZFic8NSjbqLRyEhnyXiW9sbdvNPygfwy-KQ0b8NaoENaMUFWT7w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6124fbf2f45a4fdc9b89d00742982fa1&_e=9C3_PVWw-OdyBTeoYmerhpBVHqp8z5I2k-SZIxMfAs8tjQL4rZ7g1ickcttgk0aWhwjkq0-74WSv5xgrlBlpv4pkc2VmOQ4o1LBIg8su_j9QbX1ZIqPdHx56MY4ThuSYNbUXDi20mBh3UxyjX_NAIx0j2wuugpqWTYWUVvH2XgBGN3vorbdzEIZ-_h1FW85p1t89KL9G6ooApzhagTdijW-pY4UV1Ve2e-P07y4D5d94DzCHtPK8plrA9nuuHChuYqTUL20CiiqEuJ-DOYMV9Ad8UYZ91qs2fdHTZSHIXoAvdB9bSaWGmsCmZgXBBnH8sSJMdJOUGQ8XtHG5fftJANuV-M_geNfo0ZSweZ15lCtpBGb-rG-bygmli8i2brVbl4su4kg5uEIHGJfUm-2lOw%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6124fbf2f45a4fdc9b89d00742982fa1&_e=9C3_PVWw-OdyBTeoYmerhpBVHqp8z5I2k-SZIxMfAs8tjQL4rZ7g1ickcttgk0aWhwjkq0-74WSv5xgrlBlpv4pkc2VmOQ4o1LBIg8su_j9QbX1ZIqPdHx56MY4ThuSYNbUXDi20mBh3UxyjX_NAIx0j2wuugpqWTYWUVvH2XgBGN3vorbdzEIZ-_h1FW85p1t89KL9G6ooApzhagTdijW-pY4UV1Ve2e-P07y4D5d94DzCHtPK8plrA9nuuHChuSQE5srOQKhzBgTs13iTyAQtNZMjy7bid3Ke2AWkhdJzRnLPp9YexdebDlMnJeQnaBSvzx_dok_1thS2GZRME-JiJvTRFH8l3ggcAUyg9tAK2qnK6IP8FI9hmSJ4DwyU6Hv2FmRIwrJY1LlnKQEYNLg%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing radical district attorneys and we need your help
body:
| |
---
| | My Fellow Conservative, What would you do if your brother was murdered and the investigation to find his killer was mishandled? What would you do if no one would give you answers you sought about justice for his death? What our client Mr. DePina did was show up at a press conference where he knew the leftist District Attorney Rachel Rollins -- the one who had mishandled his brother's murder investigation -- was speaking... ...and asked her questions from the crowd to get attention on his brother's case. **And instead of getting answers...** **...three days later the leftist District Attorney filed a CRIMINAL COMPLAINT against Mr. DePina accusing him of attorney intimidation.** _A charge that carries a sentence of up to 10 years!_ If gross abuse of power like this makes your blood boil... I must ask for your support today because leftist D.A.s like this who intimidate, bully, and silence everyday citizens must be held accountable, or they will continue to abuse their power... ...and none of us will be free to speak our minds to public officials or in the public square. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for a tax-deductible donation today to the Center for American Liberty to help fund our lawsuit against this egregious abuse of power.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423267:JS0erfGPN:m:1:3365131770:05FBE470B76969F51DAB9E4D5FEFAEEA:r) Can you imagine a rogue District Attorney coming after you hard for a "parking ticket" just because they don't like you -- and you having no way to oppose them? Can you imagine a leftist District Attorney charging you with "disrupting the peace" if you dare say something that goes against their "woke" agenda -- and putting you in jail? **Sounds more like China or North Korea.** Luckily for all of us who cherish freedom, Mr. DePina is not the kind of man to back down from a fight. **Our local counsel eventually got the trumped-up charges against him thrown out of court and now he wants to make sure something like this never happens to you.** That's why we're suing, not only the leftist District Attorney who brought the bogus charges, but also her crony District Attorney pal who went along and agreed to file their bogus case. Our suit charges: **Malicious prosecution. Abuse of process. Violation of Free Speech. And the reckless infliction of emotional distress.** Radical activist D.A.s think they can get away with silencing anyone who speaks out against them. But when we win this landmark case, every single radical left prosecutor will take notice. We the people have constitutional rights and we are willing to fight to protect them! Make no mistake, winning won't be easy. These radicals who intimidate, bully, and silence everyday citizens are going to come at us with everything they've got to protect their unchecked power. On his own, Mr. DePina would never have the resources to fight a battle like this. **[But free speech and civil liberties battles like this are exactly why I started the Center for American Liberty.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423267:JS0erfGPN:m:1:3365131770:05FBE470B76969F51DAB9E4D5FEFAEEA:r)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and maybe you've seen me recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight and The Ingraham Angle talking about some of our cases. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right... ...and people like Mr. DePina who otherwise would not have the resources to fight back. Right now, thanks to supporters just like you, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going such as:
---
| |
* _Ngo v. Rose City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O 'Handley v. Weber_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_ \-- to protect children from medical mutilation in the name of transgender "care."

---
| | **_And now DePina v. Rollins._** The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting for you in the courts to protect our Constitutional rights and conservative values. In an increasingly "woke" world, the courts are one of the places where we conservatives still have a chance to score meaningful victories. But as a non-profit, we don't have the big money our opponents have. [**That 's why I hope you'll help us win this battle to protect everyday citizens from out-of-control left-wing government officials by rushing back an emergency gift right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423267:JS0erfGPN:m:1:3365131770:05FBE470B76969F51DAB9E4D5FEFAEEA:r) If we lose our right to peacefully say what we want without fear of retaliation by government officials... ...America will soon be no better than tyrannical regimes like China or North Korea. And that chills me to the bone. We still have a chance to fight back. But it must happen today. Thank you and God Bless,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---

These left-wingers must be made to pay or they'll continue to abuse their power and none of us will be free to speak our minds to public officials or anywhere in the public square. [**I know we can win but we need your help immediately to fund this critical case and others that fight freedom for all of us. Thank you for rushing back your emergency gift today!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423267:JS0erfGPN:m:1:3365131770:05FBE470B76969F51DAB9E4D5FEFAEEA:r)

What our client Mr. DePina did was show up at a press conference where he knew the leftist District Attorney Rachel Rollins -- the one who had mishandled his brother's murder investigation -- was speaking... ...and asked her questions from the crowd to get attention on his brother's case. And instead of getting answers... ...three days later the leftist District Attorney filed a CRIMINAL COMPLAINT against Mr. DePina accusing him of attorney intimidation. A charge that carries a sentence of up to 10 years! If gross abuse of power like this makes your blood boil... I must ask for your support today because leftist D.A.s like this who intimidate, bully, and silence everyday citizens must be held accountable, or they will continue to abuse their power... ...and none of us will be free to speak our minds to public officials or in the public square. Can you imagine a rogue District Attorney coming after you hard for a "parking ticket" just because they don't like you -- and you having no way to oppose them? Can you imagine a leftist District Attorney charging you with "disrupting the peace" if you dare say something that goes against their "woke" agenda -- and putting you in jail? Sounds more like China or North Korea. Luckily for all of us who cherish freedom, Mr. DePina is not the kind of man to back down from a fight. Our local counsel eventually got the trumped-up charges against him thrown out of court and now he wants to make sure something like this never happens to you. That's why we're suing, not only the leftist District Attorney who brought the bogus charges, but also her crony District Attorney pal who went along and agreed to file their bogus case. Our suit charges: Malicious prosecution. Abuse of process. Violation of Free Speech. And the reckless infliction of emotional distress. Radical activist D.A.s think they can get away with silencing anyone who speaks out against them. But when we win this landmark case, every single radical left prosecutor will take notice. We the people have constitutional rights and we are willing to fight to protect them! Make no mistake, winning won't be easy. These radicals who intimidate, bully, and silence everyday citizens are going to come at us with everything they've got to protect their unchecked power. On his own, Mr. DePina would never have the resources to fight a battle like this. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and maybe you've seen me recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight and The Ingraham Angle talking about some of our cases. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right... ...and people like Mr. DePina who otherwise would not have the resources to fight back. Right now, thanks to supporters just like you, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going such as: | | Ngo v. Rose City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Weber \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente \-- to protect children from medical mutilation in the name of transgender "care." | | And now DePina v. Rollins.** The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting for you in the courts to protect our Constitutional rights and conservative values. In an increasingly "woke" world, the courts are one of the places where we conservatives still have a chance to score meaningful victories. But as a non-profit, we don't have the big money our opponents have. If we lose our right to peacefully say what we want without fear of retaliation by government officials... ...America will soon be no better than tyrannical regimes like China or North Korea. And that chills me to the bone. We still have a chance to fight back. But it must happen today. Thank you and God Bless, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. We're suing radical District Attorneys who intimidate, bully, and silence everyday citizens they don't like. These left-wingers must be made to pay or they'll continue to abuse their power and none of us will be free to speak our minds to public officials or anywhere in the public square. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to 'Transform' the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98fd4ca0a1f04110a0e484bf2d865fb4&_e=h9Uk5acS5jw-9gFZuEeaC-2ytpj2QIZFc1Lj_74-h9cpIFqsdK6Z6RJZbOoHHnkMULsVhUMtzJOCjka7qYkxPuhLWF3uYyoqKW_8xzYtlCsnSETl9jzMPqosnWBw7h-heVfR58fa-u2uBJ7hWowSoSgPbxmQbqcEHOti4MuXAMRgM1pJNS8gQLm4DIyOh0d-pE8pzriY5fQ7YThhGJt4uNTtcvXfxyY1mgXQVkYYSP_1DkuVzpOBZlLpY0NwMDxv) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she's discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I've found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' our economy into something we didn't vote on... didn't ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we 're about to see a stranger, more extreme 'new normal' in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead. "** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there's no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98fd4ca0a1f04110a0e484bf2d865fb4&_e=h9Uk5acS5jw-9gFZuEeaC-2ytpj2QIZFc1Lj_74-h9cpIFqsdK6Z6RJZbOoHHnkMULsVhUMtzJOCjka7qYkxPuhLWF3uYyoqKW_8xzYtlCseOPM8Eej8gi5fezIBU8J3LybQ9HCRARhOY0vh2_pa8AubMDIKIhtL0Arzmh4Svi4sEwVbXRnkJTpabULBbVQSArygndLmjeIN2vuQrgfPfWbVEVjAmL1KAr0OR6-Aw3XZRxr9GZZFMJo0HUPainNG) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98fd4ca0a1f04110a0e484bf2d865fb4&_e=h9Uk5acS5jw-9gFZuEeaC-2ytpj2QIZFc1Lj_74-h9cpIFqsdK6Z6RJZbOoHHnkMULsVhUMtzJOCjka7qYkxPuhLWF3uYyoqKW_8xzYtlCu2E8TtE-B7db4v1OyC4qdbrGHpvbXkllOfVGi6TXMECL5gfaSxA4uhIyxYBNcts5SKqAhNLVBhOyCF9HswYuCkrhJhYbgZBsf4IPbuEnfgGr3XEFsGalGIzYu54aCcnXzjCUdWxRd0SvELd7wLxKwq)

You can't watch this video because YouTube is censoring my explosive new book: "_Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_." They say my interview with Dr. Anthony Harper violates YouTube's "misinformation" policy. Remember, this is the same "misinformation" policy that censored anyone who tried to expose Dr. Fauci's Covid cover-up. And these are the same tech companies that have been caught red-handed colluding with federal government to control the information you have access to. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50ce82b661c14b68b4135851f2f871f6&_e=V9ltmhabmPQcr9HwfVjsJulPpfs8Lr9BmFZlrMxB563GDz9NkjfjToUlxToazpeH88fVv3XNdg1mu4AQ3TGgcaMbqWrRADFXSRGLhd12wsKM9CiFUi_qFFmwJLpY_ghKmaJB4Cdnbdptme6PJ3qKNJHGmVYJdsL5QE1rZPxyW3J4k9bX5ELjZMmTFVVL9ZMIcsuXyhn4QskF3a09J1uv-vGh7h9jTIyVRzFXRusgtpI0a4S0H2z449ebM0sQRvp2AcjS449cLdFY56aL-T5bl5ylf_uiXXGxQW66aKtfkSeyuqrErEU84GCnDXutbkkDb5uJEZeYzthBuD2jhSKyf-rJ08sNP6Dy3W6Fj4EnIfQzYGOJM3Kz0lBYrX9HNoUNU7gC9AJ_bt9E52B1Llcmgg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50ce82b661c14b68b4135851f2f871f6&_e=V9ltmhabmPQcr9HwfVjsJulPpfs8Lr9BmFZlrMxB563GDz9NkjfjToUlxToazpeH88fVv3XNdg1mu4AQ3TGgcaMbqWrRADFXSRGLhd12wsKM9CiFUi_qFFmwJLpY_ghKmaJB4Cdnbdptme6PJ3qKNJHGmVYJdsL5QE1rZPxyW3J4k9bX5ELjZMmTFVVL9ZMIcsuXyhn4QskF3a09J1uv-vGh7h9jTIyVRzFXRusgtpI0a4S0H2z449ebM0sQRvp2qbaREDhtOCkpNgRT1tx2Mi-OKCqBGcpJ_mSEdPDoBSPLm2ZW2otM3PPD5BDAHQPY9bd6zO_VU8xgSd5tQTcoOYs_KNkIVN75499NXQGbMNuk9PFAwHzcaetNrtRj6TrcrDnw7Sbk3kx0Xgpzn1L9yA%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ffdf269fb4c3430586623e7b7ef31cae&_e=jdG1Vyvooo62ma9rOyQPj0sYxN0Q7zSZOt08zL5yhvuqC7ib0enqlRTBzoa2vnEcUPvxEN5GtEn6vohJ0jUysn-8rXF6eD_U0vT-CMzJD6KE1cHU_zAbyEjKkVcOvSPLE0lsy6TNQ3MV_-MDpbDqflnT0DBU1jfl70GZBmWYAt-ir5ZGF-ALu3g4DVFKpgRWW6wN2CP0l6wuTqyFBAmWicOzoXw6qBmMhpn6m3MS5uUqZFzruE9r86xeSDKdfKDEzVnfvte70r9p7BcgZeN8SSwD9mI9OC548SSA0HrlGcUDIL670KUzi1CbG4yYVEkvTtbCd384V9jI61C9TFp9Ki6j02uAxZWfRnjhrXoVnVY8eEEiiV0DNjCSn9YtlQg4R3NL2jBUSoRjncgldSCXVI7snJbXTl1iu7xDUm6XGWoCHI-VDi5aljaK6m9Ui4RU)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ffdf269fb4c3430586623e7b7ef31cae&_e=jdG1Vyvooo62ma9rOyQPj0sYxN0Q7zSZOt08zL5yhvuqC7ib0enqlRTBzoa2vnEcUPvxEN5GtEn6vohJ0jUysn-8rXF6eD_U0vT-CMzJD6KE1cHU_zAbyEjKkVcOvSPLE0lsy6TNQ3MV_-MDpbDqflnT0DBU1jfl70GZBmWYAt-ir5ZGF-ALu3g4DVFKpgRWW6wN2CP0l6wuTqyFBAmWicOzoXw6qBmMhpn6m3MS5uUqZFzruE9r86xeSDKdfKDEzVnfvte70r9p7BcgZeN8SdaGDSz1-0PqPtdZ95iV2-vBK1qXjmryVjuJSBJMYS5-fswW6ZtxdvDQZywY9-FnrCW-N0YRzUtXG2TQWXV6H1Swyjx9LV4FAZ3mXXSIwxJlQunIeCuS2bB7FnUIWfkZwRFOG8F9ClyV9iy3jZXKo4QQPrXOYrZZMF5NtBqj-o9Q)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ffdf269fb4c3430586623e7b7ef31cae&_e=jdG1Vyvooo62ma9rOyQPj0sYxN0Q7zSZOt08zL5yhvuqC7ib0enqlRTBzoa2vnEcUPvxEN5GtEn6vohJ0jUysn-8rXF6eD_U0vT-CMzJD6KE1cHU_zAbyEjKkVcOvSPLE0lsy6TNQ3MV_-MDpbDqflnT0DBU1jfl70GZBmWYAt-ir5ZGF-ALu3g4DVFKpgRWW6wN2CP0l6wuTqyFBAmWicOzoXw6qBmMhpn6m3MS5uUqZFzruE9r86xeSDKdfKDEzVnfvte70r9p7BcgZeN8SWxx5QKOf-ycOOm7s6Jn2vQ_2qtGXCtLldwVinTkTvcJqOaKaEWXyx9t_IU0YzAj5YUIF7JeaZXc6fWy0BcICTaDeMz7cBH_J3W8QtrjhneVOp9WqZJr0Sq2sMYjxrlbQU26PfoXhm_tKhNdc4OriYtC1GHSDcpv4_huEsFoccwV).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Candace Owens
subject: A bigger plague than COVID
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de8f8eabacf64e309fbaee38a6bab90e&_e=1xuLNNoHxkZ9U1pIHPzLHQ-e-S3uNcO4vs79APnKTuQmYdRCbQdVXTmqxfac26kjKnLuTumMwvtmpiVSX0PzRf2LIQDaXYr8gxpBJGK68tQ3BRQYXw2ArpMyKI-JkG6e0enRu7omsG5wpbyU_4O8JtmXUCT7dzwuSizNnznzEapRr-f05HtbO8e5WngJbZcZM4HpMVdF9Jf7Ayzz2llckmAjRdZhbSHpUgPglPNphXj3ac7Qm0FBdPeF5F4yndm-DZhIaYC8x0Ygrwk_h1YLol4A5td_UvW5dzeHRk39hP8%3D)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de8f8eabacf64e309fbaee38a6bab90e&_e=1xuLNNoHxkZ9U1pIHPzLHQ-e-S3uNcO4vs79APnKTuQmYdRCbQdVXTmqxfac26kjKnLuTumMwvtmpiVSX0PzRf2LIQDaXYr8gxpBJGK68tQ3BRQYXw2ArpMyKI-JkG6e0enRu7omsG5wpbyU_4O8JiTVxIoxbN9NqwY0yl7BquW4imoJ8loR4D9IomjZMfTQzxTZIkO-JDNyj9evSDj5mQ1zrlYNuCwR7P1T9nh3ay1pUejVP_jiSC22DrRfspdsI9cx-Q17b0brHIopmRmXtWxrL9Bjibo2Fba4t9apIHQ%3D)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de8f8eabacf64e309fbaee38a6bab90e&_e=1xuLNNoHxkZ9U1pIHPzLHQ-e-S3uNcO4vs79APnKTuQmYdRCbQdVXTmqxfac26kjKnLuTumMwvtmpiVSX0PzRf2LIQDaXYr8gxpBJGK68tQ3BRQYXw2ArpMyKI-JkG6e0enRu7omsG5wpbyU_4O8JpWyBCQRJi8twHbQTFATE-hWYtrhRGWxxT2cICCEC8OCpLoNSFIO0AevIgi9sxqP9ywMic1kKxt0m8_k1gmws0Q8_Ax3VX6h-6Tsdc8vqd9zjKU9CCitF0Rv1bezb7kapsDFslxnt1UrQ9AK95ysu2M%3D)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

But instead of turning their backs on the Big Lie after its string of losses, today’s GOP continues to embrace it: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_031223_b1_deniers_30ac&amount=25]→ In Michigan, the Republican Party just installed Qanon enthusiast Kristina Karamo, the losing candidate for Secretary of State, as its party leader.
→ In Kansas, Mike Brown, a conspiracy theorist who lost his primary bid for secretary of state, was named chair of the state party.
→ And in Colorado, election-denying former Colorado clerk Tina Peters was found guilty of obstruction , just days after launching a bid for state GOP chair.
Make no mistake: our fight to defeat election deniers is far from over. It’s only just getting started. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march23?refcode=em_fr_031223_b1_deniers_30ac&amount=25]

clean_body: [] NEW FROM PBS: Election deniers turn their focus to state GOP posts after failing at polls [] Last November, we DEFEATED election-deniers in swing states across the nation. We DEFENDED democracy from those who tried to subvert it. But instead of turning their backs on the Big Lie after its string of losses, today’s GOP continues to embrace it: []→ In Michigan, the Republican Party just installed Qanon enthusiast Kristina Karamo, the losing candidate for Secretary of State, as its party leader. → In Kansas, Mike Brown, a conspiracy theorist who lost his primary bid for secretary of state, was named chair of the state party. → And in Colorado, election-denying former Colorado clerk Tina Peters was found guilty of obstruction , just days after launching a bid for state GOP chair. Make no mistake: our fight to defeat election deniers is far from over. It’s only just getting started. clean_body: | | | Friend: Elected officials are reintroducing the Sunshine Protection Act. The bill passed the Senate last year with unanimous consent but stalled in the House. This act would permanently extend daylight saving time – meaning later sunsets in the winter months and more sunshine year-round. Numerous states have already passed legislation calling for permanent daylight saving time, and others are considering similar bills. That's why we're running a live poll - we want to know where YOU stand. But we're still missing 764 responses from your area. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: we’re taking a risk
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If your inbox is anything like ours, it’s flooded with TRIPLE-MATCH ALERTS (spoiler: those are fake) and over-the-top language.
#

Peter -
As you know, this is an FEC fundraising deadline month. The first of our campaign.
And if your inbox is anything like ours, it’s flooded with TRIPLE-MATCH ALERTS (spoiler: those are fake) and over-the-top language.
Campaigns do them because they “work.” And by work, we mean they trick people into donating.
We are NEVER going to do that kind of thing here. We’re going to be honest about our goals and transparent about our progress. We’re taking a risk by doing things that way, but we’re asking a lot of you to donate and you deserve the truth.
So here is the truth: for the past few weeks, our fundraising HAS slowed down and this is the time we really need it to pick back up.
We get more donations from email than anything else on this campaign, so that is why we’re asking — honestly, respectfully, humbly...
[**Can you use this link to contribute $3 or whatever feels right for you today to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona? Do it before our FEC fundraising deadline ends. Please.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230312-1-30-15&t=1&akid=451%2E734936%2EFffjoE)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
