name: Defeat Ruben Gallego
subject: Worse than AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Latinos for America First**
body:
We've got a problem in Arizona, unless you help us today.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423415:6N-RCfG3N:m:1:3365131770:12B2AF790EAFC303F5DCDA2301D6C653:r "Headline") Peter: We've got a problem in Arizona, **[unless you help us today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423415:6N-RCfG3N:m:1:3365131770:12B2AF790EAFC303F5DCDA2301D6C653:r "unless
you help us today.")** Now that Sen. Kyrsten Sinema has become a registered Independent, Arizona's AOC, Ruben Gallego, has announced his run for Senate in that race and his team has already announced that Latino voters are crucial to his strategy for success. I'm no fan of Sen. Sinema. But Sinema never threw a wrecking ball trying to topple our government. I can't say the same is true for Comrade Gallego. **Gallego is a man who has called conservative patriot Rep. Jim Jordan "a traitor to the Constitution" for demanding election integrity.** Yet Comrade Gallego has no problem demanding the DOJ not treat Jan. 6 like a "normal investigation." Arizona is going to be a 3-way race. And if you don't step up RIGHT NOW and help us, Gallego could win, which is bad news for the whole country! **[Latinos for America First is perfectly positioned to counter Gallego's Latino strategy and ensure a conservative wins the 2024 Senate race. Help us go into Arizona and begin our outreach to the Latino community. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423415:6N-RCfG3N:m:1:3365131770:12B2AF790EAFC303F5DCDA2301D6C653:r "Latinos for America First is perfectly positioned to counter
Gallego’s Latino strategy and ensure a conservative wins the 2024 Senate race. Help us go into Arizona and begin our outreach to the Latino
community. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today!")** Like a good progressive, Gallego spent no time looking for evidence, interviewing witnesses, etc. He just wanted President Trump, Jim Jordan, and Marjorie Taylor Green in jail, and like a Russian "show trial," and he'd find the evidence later. That's how dangerous socialists like Gallego can be to the future of our nation. They want to destroy our democracy and bring in kangaroo courts they admire, like Russia used in the 1930s, where you were always found "guilty" and never found "not guilty." [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423415:6N-RCfG3N:m:1:3365131770:12B2AF790EAFC303F5DCDA2301D6C653:r "Tweet")**[We can't wait one second longer to begin our Latino outreach in Arizona and expose Gallego's radical progressive agenda. It's the only way the Republican candidate will have a chance of winning this Senate seat! Will you donate $50, $100, or $250 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423415:6N-RCfG3N:m:1:3365131770:12B2AF790EAFC303F5DCDA2301D6C653:r "We can’t wait one second longer to begin our Latino
outreach in Arizona and expose Gallego’s radical progressive agenda. It’s the only way the Republican candidate will have a chance of
winning this Senate seat! Will you donate $50, $100, or $250 today?")** The Latino vote in Arizona is crucial toward GOP victory in 2024 and we can't let Latino Voters get conned by this man. It will impact the Senate race and the Presidential race. **The consequences are that serious! Do you want another 4 years of Brandon running this country into the ground?** Look, as bad as the Democrats have been in the Senate, Sen. Sinema stopped Biden and Schumer from eliminating the filibuster, packing the courts, and spending more than they wanted! That's why we're at DEFCON 1 and must organize now to stop Comrade Gallego from winning this seat. Because he will vote lockstep with Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and Brandon EVERY. SINGLE. TIME! **[Please hurry with your donation of $100, $500, or $1,000. We must engage in Arizona now!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423415:6N-RCfG3N:m:1:3365131770:12B2AF790EAFC303F5DCDA2301D6C653:r "Please hurry with your donation of $100, $500, or $1,000. We
must engage in Arizona now!")** For America, Bianca Gracia
Founder
Latinos for America First PAC
---

---

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Friend, can you help me out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
JUST 3 WEEKS UNTIL OUR NEXT BIG FINANCIAL REPORT! MARCH 31 MIDNIGHT
---
| | | | | |
---
| MARCH 31 MIDNIGHT NEXT BIG DEADLINE ONLY 3 WEEKS REMAINING!
---
| |
---
| | |
---
|
Greetings!
Could you please make a donation today?
The Republican Primary is less than 3 months away and we have our biggest campaign expenditures in the next couple of weeks to let voters know about the Republican Primary which will be held on Tuesday, June 20.
Our NEXT BIG fundraising deadline is Friday, March 31 at midnight, and I need YOUR help.
For the past 2 months I've been in session working hard for you. By law, state legislators are not allowed to collect campaign donations during session.
Now that session has adjourned, I need to quickly play catch up before our next big fundraising deadline on March 31, 2023 at midnight.
Would you please give your most generous donation today?
The Republican Primary is in just 3 months and I really need your help!
You may donate online or by mail. For more instructions please click here to [donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r1M24m0QstPEHEto08abF8ZNb_fJE15bmY_mqKXL4SU_QhbUts63axsvi79cXJDuoAGH4dKb_Svw6pPThCKq9kafDpO1CDNg-_3SzhqBW3FQmOIPkBiyUcdfv1QTjddAU8zdMgbVY3eUj_zdblWGY6tBBXM27TXVbu88hxF2_vnh2PsKosyYNtdxdb4PUYsnDa_KYNz3aONB9RiucA2M7TQjVbdav6YaZkt9R_Jn7UW1AjPPqBdAHc0qxtpNAyvvYgJaBTKF2R7A6sph-Fr7pAs8Cs6Eo7RZEnKlqJZbixCmJBinEVpB3A==&c=qI6Y1ldTcpFQdnxQBvxsaN_3by4Y7qPMkS8XrMR-IUAecmGYLMRO3A==&ch=17wm1vpKoMkDm5XzIES7rBa4BF7dmgysIbTa5-XgHvaADNqDwFw3ZQ==).
VOTING RECORDS MATTER. "We the People" want to be represented by a candidate who has a proven voting record AND a history of leading the fight in the Virginia Senate to protect our Constitution and put America FIRST even during a crisis.
YOU know where I stand on the issues. I've already proven that I will put your issues ahead of special interest groups and lobbyists, because I have already done it. Look at my almost 8 year voting record. PROMISES MADE. PROMISES KEPT.
Our FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL reporting number has to be a good one. My opponents have been able to raise money to run against me for several months, while I have been in session from January 11 through Saturday, February 25.
I really need your help NOW.
Please don't wait to give. Please give your most generous gift today, so that I can spend the next several months reaching voters and letting them know my name is on the ballot in June. Our next fundraising deadline is on Friday, March 31, less than 3 weeks away! Will you please give your most generous donation today?
For God and Virginia,
---
---
| Senator Amanda Chase has represented Virginia's 11th Senatorial District , which is made up of Amelia County, Colonial Heights, and parts of Chesterfield County, since 2016. After redistricting, she is running in Virginia's 12 Senatorial District continuing to represent most of Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. Senator Chase is the only incumbent Senator running in Senatorial District 12.
---
| |
---
| |
---

clean_body: JUST 3 WEEKS UNTIL OUR NEXT BIG FINANCIAL REPORT! MARCH 31 MIDNIGHT | | | | | | | MARCH 31 MIDNIGHT NEXT BIG DEADLINE ONLY 3 WEEKS REMAINING! | | | | | | Greetings! Could you please make a donation today? The Republican Primary is less than 3 months away and we have our biggest campaign expenditures in the next couple of weeks to let voters know about the Republican Primary which will be held on Tuesday, June 20. Our NEXT BIG fundraising deadline is Friday, March 31 at midnight, and I need YOUR help. For the past 2 months I've been in session working hard for you. By law, state legislators are not allowed to collect campaign donations during session. Now that session has adjourned, I need to quickly play catch up before our next big fundraising deadline on March 31, 2023 at midnight. Would you please give your most generous donation today? The Republican Primary is in just 3 months and I really need your help! You may donate online or by mail. For more instructions please click here to ==. VOTING RECORDS MATTER. "We the People" want to be represented by a candidate who has a proven voting record AND a history of leading the fight in the Virginia Senate to protect our Constitution and put America FIRST even during a crisis. YOU know where I stand on the issues. I've already proven that I will put your issues ahead of special interest groups and lobbyists, because I have already done it. Look at my almost 8 year voting record. PROMISES MADE. PROMISES KEPT. Our FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL reporting number has to be a good one. My opponents have been able to raise money to run against me for several months, while I have been in session from January 11 through Saturday, February 25. I really need your help NOW. Please don't wait to give. Please give your most generous gift today, so that I can spend the next several months reaching voters and letting them know my name is on the ballot in June. Our next fundraising deadline is on Friday, March 31, less than 3 weeks away! Will you please give your most generous donation today? For God and Virginia, | Senator Amanda Chase has represented Virginia's 11th Senatorial District , which is made up of Amelia County, Colonial Heights, and parts of Chesterfield County, since 2016. After redistricting, she is running in Virginia's 12 Senatorial District continuing to represent most of Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. Senator Chase is the only incumbent Senator running in Senatorial District 12. | | | | | | | == | | == | | | | | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://trk.readactnews.)

[](http://trk.readactnews._Q)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://trk.readactnews._B6GslsapWZ15NjtNIw)
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

** _And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://trk.readactnews.) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://trk.readactnews._qofh5Evg5LaWYsJ3Hg)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://trk.readactnews.) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

body:
|
| | | Peter,

Since you are a top State Republican patriot, we've reserved (1) copy of Governor DeSantis' new book, The Courage to Be Free just for you.

If you don't claim your book before 11:59 PM tonight, we will be forced to give it to the next loyal conservative on our list. You won't get access like this anywhere else, so **[claim your copy before it's TOO LATE!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62426864:6ak_YfGNJ:m:1:3361486117:010B4D0E137D967F086CD2C7732E535E:r "claim your copy
before it’s TOO LATE!")**

****Use the secure link below to reserve your copy before midnight****

Governor DeSantis has done so much for the great state of Florida and our country. You have an exclusive chance to hear firsthand about his blueprint for America's revival.

**[Claim your copy>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62426864:6ak_YfGNJ:m:1:3361486117:010B4D0E137D967F086CD2C7732E535E:r "Claim your copy
>>>")** The Democrats are TERRIFIED of DeSantis and his Republican state allies because they know we can destroy their woke socialist policies and WIN.

Hurry, supplies are limited. **[Claim your copy of _The Courage to Be Free_ today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62426864:6ak_YfGNJ:m:1:3361486117:010B4D0E137D967F086CD2C7732E535E:r "Claim your copy of The Courage to Be Free today!")**

Thanks,

DeSantis State Republican Alerts

| The Radical Left is working nonstop to completely shred our Constitution and destroy everything America stands for.

Thankfully, the Conservative Justices are in their way.

AOC and the Squad have already called to not only IMPEACH conservative justices but PACK THE COURT with four more liberal activists!

If we want to stop them, it will take ALL of us. That's why State Republicans are urging every patriot who reads this to **[chip in to defend Conservative Justices& stop court packing!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62426865:6ak_YfGNJ:m:1:3361486117:010B4D0E137D967F086CD2C7732E535E:r "chip in just a few dollars to defend the Conservative Justices & stop court packing!")**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: this particular email is extremely important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
You’re a valuable supporter and I feel like I can ask you directly.
| | |
---
I can’t believe it – it’s already the middle of March.
To fight the onslaught of GOP money and close polling in the days before Election Day, my campaign took on debt. Pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win.
We _had_ to take on debt. The good news is that it worked, and we won.
**That debt makes emails like this one _extremely_ important.** If we’re going to pay it down according to schedule, I need 32 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage.
You’re a valuable supporter, and I feel like I can ask you directly: **[Will you please be one of the 32 donors who help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60075941/395938894/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2225-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTFjMDE1Zi1lMmMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yteedaHWglTbIWrZ2LtTbeoHIJ7BP3v-TMp6PItQ8eM=)**
Thanks so much. With our debt reports made public each quarter, we can’t afford to fall short.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: You’re a valuable supporter and I feel like I can ask you directly. | | | I can’t believe it – it’s already the middle of March. To fight the onslaught of GOP money and close polling in the days before Election Day, my campaign took on debt. Pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win. We had to take on debt. The good news is that it worked, and we won. That debt makes emails like this one extremely important. If we’re going to pay it down according to schedule, I need 32 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage. You’re a valuable supporter, and I feel like I can ask you directly: = Thanks so much. With our debt reports made public each quarter, we can’t afford to fall short. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | | = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Jon Tester
subject: Politics isn’t a game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Hey there,
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.
That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic Senators looking out for them.
Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**
When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.
[**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $5 or more donation between The Long Run and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-tester-split.6Ew410&refcode=em230312-1-t2&t=1&akid=4251%2E196590%2EJmJgtt)

[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-tester-split.9zAD8d&refcode=em230312-1-t2&t=23&akid=4251%2E196590%2EJmJgtt)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-tester-split.NuHk4x&refcode=em230312-1-t2&t=24&akid=4251%2E196590%2EJmJgtt)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-tester-split.6Ew410&refcode=em230312-1-t2&t=25&akid=4251%2E196590%2EJmJgtt)

[](https://substack.com/redirect/2a5bbc90-bba3-470b-b046-a364ea4b8934?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | Shahid Buttar| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=107901644&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA3OTAxNjQ0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY3ODYzMTk1NiwiZXhwIjoxNjgxMjIzOTU2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6_guwkn4l9W_IglqC_lAYWqZ5_6cHlDec7oNIA3PGwo&utm_medium=email&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=107901644&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA3OTAxNjQ0LCJpYXQiOjE2Nzg2MzE5NTYsImV4cCI6MTY4MTIyMzk1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.owVwQdfKbTM_A_xFb1C6LEySpdjRF85GHI5IOfku_qU&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=107901644&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA3OTAxNjQ0LCJpYXQiOjE2Nzg2MzE5NTYsImV4cCI6MTY4MTIyMzk1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.owVwQdfKbTM_A_xFb1C6LEySpdjRF85GHI5IOfku_qU)
Last week, renowned military whistleblower Daniel Ellsberg publicly [announced](https://substack.com/redirect/64011168-5ef9-4ec4-bb75-37aa256aa0a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his cancer diagnosis. Many Americans may have either forgotten, or never learned his extraordinary significance. No one has done as much to defend America from the [predicted](https://substack.com/redirect/2031316a-e7c6-41a6-a23b-3df1bca3da2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) horrors of our military industrial complex and the relentless wars for profit it has unleashed around the world.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/540696a7-c2ec-44e6-ac2f-b06bc13ba3bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This post attempts to explain recent U.S. and world history to generations of Americans who seem to have forgotten it. It is also [an invitation for freethinking people](https://substack.com/redirect/fa2201d9-d230-4b7c-afae-8e6c07bec4c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to honor a national and international hero, not only for the sake of offering him recognition that he probably doesn't need, but particularly to expose a pattern that continues to repeat itself today.
[Sign a related petition on Change.org](https://substack.com/redirect/6ae62836-e07b-412e-aee7-f70a4e5e0753?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### "The most dangerous man in America"
In 1972, a break-in at Washington's Watergate hotel set the stage for the end of the Nixon administration. Government goons broke into a psychiatrist's office in order to seek files to publicly discredit his patient, a military whistleblower named Daniel Ellsberg who in 1971 publicly revealed [the Pentagon Papers,](https://substack.com/redirect/8837a46f-36ee-44d9-a6e0-d7e8b325cc37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a set of classified military documents exposing that Washington's war on Vietnam was based on lies repeated by the White House.
Nixon described Ellsberg on tape as "the most dangerous man in America," which later became the title of an important [documentary film](https://substack.com/redirect/489bb141-7560-4a3c-81b7-14d12b203f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that won several awards, including the Freedom of Expression Award from the National Board of Review, and the Special Jury Award at the International Documentary Film Festival Amsterdam. "The Most Dangerous Man in America" was also nominated for an Oscar for Best Documentary in 2009.
The film's [trailer](https://substack.com/redirect/1bc2dda2-8bd3-4146-99b8-2d57f72b4dc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) conveys the drama of the historical moment, which an entire political culture bizarrely forgot within only a single generation. The release of the Pentagon Papers, and the Nixon administration's counter-attack, were [incredibly controversial](https://substack.com/redirect/98229545-8c1f-48f2-af8c-754ae2197572?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the time--so much so that the Justice Department filed over a dozen lawsuits against major newspapers that collaborated to ensure that the public could read the facts suppressed by our government.
This is a reader-supported publication filling profound gaps left by absentee & complicit "news" editors. Subscribe for free updates to help expose corruption by learning what journalists obscure!

When I led the Bill of Rights Defense Committee in the early 2010s, we organized screenings of the film in cities across the United States, recognizing not only that most Americans never learn about our own country's past, but also that newspaper editors have grown catastrophically co-opted and actively contribute to that ignorance.
Little did we realize at the time that the next whistleblower poised to expose government crimes was waiting in the wings and would come forward just three years later.
### Inspiring successors
When the documentary about him was screened in 2010, Ellsberg explained that part of his rationale in supporting it was to encourage other figures in the federal government to follow his lead by revealing to the public crucial information kept secret for illegitimate reasons.
You, too, can help inform others by sharing this post. As a grassroots writer marginalized by the establishment, I rely on readers to help expose the facts it would prefer to suppress.

After Edward Snowden came forward in 2013 to reveal illegal mass surveillance unconstitutionally authorized by President George W. Bush, [he credited Ellsberg for helping inspire him](https://substack.com/redirect/03de64c9-ad52-49c0-9c46-7888c68c73d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The two went on to collaborate on several projects, including academic [symposia](https://substack.com/redirect/16b56943-2f2f-4a09-bb42-7801e644e655?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); co-directing [a non-profit](https://substack.com/redirect/5da82588-86e1-43d7-bfb1-8872a09f1fa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) organization focused on promoting press freedom and independence; and even [creative cryptography](https://substack.com/redirect/9e125b67-aa6b-4eee-9068-58bb5a4e14cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and digital art. Their many [conversations](https://substack.com/redirect/03de64c9-ad52-49c0-9c46-7888c68c73d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are well worth reading.
Neither Ellsberg nor Snowden were revolutionaries. Both were dedicated to the U.S. national security establishment before discovering its corruption, and they both remained public servants when giving up their careers and risking federal prosecution to do the right thing.
Any figure who adapts and grows in response to what they learn deserves praise, especially given the tendency of [confirmation bias](https://substack.com/redirect/e47ae85a-a74e-49f8-9a44-c64a9d5144a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to blind people to information that conflicts with their established worldviews. Psychology has demonstrated a powerful tendency for most people to ignore whatever they would rather not see.
But beyond the moral courage and insight into ethics that their former colleagues lack, both Ellsberg and Snowden are praiseworthy for many other reasons stretching well beyond their acts of public service. Journalist Seymour Hersh, who in 1969 broke the story of [U.S. Marines slaughtering hundreds of Vietnamese civilians](https://substack.com/redirect/6bd07dc4-343d-4a9f-a1b0-f7b1011400d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at My Lai, recently published fascinating reflections on Ellsberg's life ranging well beyond the world-historical acts for which he is most widely recognized.
Hersh covers Ellsberg's reportedly stellar skills on a piano, his use of magic tricks to entertain children, and his view that the assassination of President Kennedy was never fully investigated because "any far reaching investigation into his death would have [exposed] many covert operations."

### An ironic legacy
The last American to win the Nobel Peace Prize was [President Barack Obama in 2009](https://substack.com/redirect/f6733559-988e-41a3-938c-8dda4f086b98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). His receipt of the award was based on his campaign promises to rescind the Bush-Cheney policy legacy, which he largely embraced once in office. Ari Fleischer, who served as press secretary for President Bush, noted in 2013 that "[Obama is carrying out Bush's fourth term](https://substack.com/redirect/7330ebfa-93f6-4f61-9030-d9490d41c61a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)....He's...vindicating President Bush, all while putting a bipartisan stamp on how to fight terror."
Obama's record as a president was so incongruous with the aims of the Nobel Peace Prize that it eventually prompted ongoing criticism of the process and institution [even by figures within it](https://substack.com/redirect/562a4980-7cc7-4717-ae02-37141da8d353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Ultimately, Obama's legacy included pioneering new forms of human rights abuses, such as robotic remote assassinations that officials claimed were "targeted" even though [only 10% of the casualties were intentional](https://substack.com/redirect/3b2f97dc-255d-4b83-bda4-e87ebb1c1990?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Meanwhile, his administration abandoned the international human rights framework established after the Second World War by prosecuting whistleblowers (more than every previous administration in the history of our Republic _combined_) in order to, for example, insulate torturers in the CIA, who were ultimately promoted rather than ever held accountable for their crimes.
Many of us were [critical at the time](https://substack.com/redirect/9b59fef1-8c3d-4d8c-a1ac-96e188f8ea10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Obama administration's abuses. While some reporters did occasionally [feature our concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/6c89f847-e092-456d-9f50-80f539d18947?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the press generally ignored us, before later repeatedly [weaponizing itself](https://substack.com/redirect/e7df378f-83fa-4094-9e95-c943f3c89db3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on behalf of Washington's military-industrial corruption when [we politically challenged figureheads](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d20920-6274-4423-99f9-06fb007e9d9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who deferred.
In other words, the Nobel Peace Prize was turned on its head to reward militarism, rather than those who have actually challenged it. Geir Lundestad, who served as secretary of the Nobel committee until he stepped down in 2014, said after leaving the organization that "[e]ven many of Obama's supporters believed that [the prize was a mistake](https://substack.com/redirect/562a4980-7cc7-4717-ae02-37141da8d353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
Awarding the Nobel Peace Prize to Daniel Ellsberg would help correct that mistake, better serve the purposes of the award, encourage future whistleblowers, and shame the cadre of newspaper editors whose [sustained failures](https://substack.com/redirect/6a70e56a-4bc1-44be-91ca-a6b5c2b6c889?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have [enabled](https://substack.com/redirect/d1a5909f-55b8-481b-a6a0-2a128d6eca9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) every war for the past three generations.

### The pattern that Ellsberg exposed continues today
Granting an international peace award to an American head of state required a remarkable leap of faith by the [anonymous figures](https://substack.com/redirect/b3ac33b5-a185-432e-a39f-c2647f402545?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who decide the recipients of the Nobel prizes. After all, [no country more actively promotes militarism](https://substack.com/redirect/71ac021c-4f89-4e49-ac26-2743b9e3633f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the world today than the United States. And the costs of American imperialism extend well beyond its direct victims and [ultimately threaten all life on Earth](https://substack.com/redirect/e0f78909-c508-4e52-94a9-8d607bbd9bee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In this vein, it's worth reading a [powerful book review published in ](https://substack.com/redirect/d5b13999-6c89-449b-b4aa-b4be28ca2924?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Rolling Stone](https://substack.com/redirect/d5b13999-6c89-449b-b4aa-b4be28ca2924?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ by Spencer Ackerman, examining a memoir published by [Jim Mattis](https://substack.com/redirect/5eb1754e-6ed7-446d-9c18-46c9ec846b5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Mattis served as a senior U.S. Marine commander in Iraq & Afghanistan under Bush & Obama, later joined the corporate leadership of weapons contractor General Dynamics and the [fraudulent biotech startup Theranos](https://substack.com/redirect/2382b589-0934-4875-9ff4-31ba31e9f459?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (whose former CEO is currently serving an [11-year prison sentence](https://substack.com/redirect/52598691-f6e4-49f1-a978-7907214629f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for fraud), and ultimately served in Trump's cabinet as Secretary of Defense.
Praised as an intellectual so-called "[warrior monk](https://substack.com/redirect/bc3845fe-9110-4ad6-a3a4-e5934cad5e9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" by gullible reporters in Washington lacking the independence and insight of journalists like Seymour Hersh, Mattis exhibited the same pattern of brutality that defined U.S. foreign-policy for the past three generations.
His stellar reputation was rooted in memorable quips worthy of action movies that ultimately antagonized supposed allies, eroding the strategic position of which he claimed to have a unique awareness. Ackerman [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/d5b13999-6c89-449b-b4aa-b4be28ca2924?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on a now famous exchange near Fallujah in which Mattis said to a group of assembled Sheikhs, "I come in peace. I didn't bring artillery. But I'm pleading with you, with tears in my eyes: If you f*** with me, I'll kill you all."
In his memoir, Mattis claims that the sheikhs "were allowing their sons to be recruited by the insurgents while they were talking to me -- unwittingly abrogating their own authority." As Ackerman explains, "perhaps they didn't like a foreign invader pledging to f*** their daughters and kill everyone they know."
This, mind you, is a senior military commander widely praised by journalists for his supposed humanity and sophistication.
When I was [arrested in the U.S. Senate](https://substack.com/redirect/bb797a9f-f2e8-41ce-9944-690275caf40d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for an act of journalism in 2015, it was not a Trump official to whom I posed a question no one wanted to answer, but rather James Clapper--Obama's Director of National Intelligence. When [a CIA Director defended agency personnel](https://substack.com/redirect/a3b22990-e0b6-48dd-9791-a0be6d6f58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who hacked the U.S. Senate to steal documents, hide the Agency's criminal trail related to torture, and threatened Senate staffers with criminal prosecution for doing their jobs, it was John Brennan, working under President Obama, the winner of the Nobel Peace Prize in 2009.
Nor is this pattern of belligerent brutality isolated to unaccountable individuals.
The corruption of America's military industrial complex is thoroughly institutional, as [its architect publicly warned us](https://substack.com/redirect/2031316a-e7c6-41a6-a23b-3df1bca3da2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it would be. Any number of examples prove the unfortunate point.
[Lies](https://substack.com/redirect/04624821-ae4d-412e-8071-e27265e4e0a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about weapons of mass destruction (repeated by Colin Powell, the [same military officer](https://substack.com/redirect/ab769e69-f55f-4e6b-a0ec-54b708e10e0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who decades earlier spun the 1968 My Lai massacre after Seymour Hersh's dogged reporting in that era) enabled the invasion and military occupation of the seat of human civilization, at more or less the same time that [20 years of lies](https://substack.com/redirect/2dba8303-f20c-4864-87f7-c30a08a6caf4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) enabled a war in Afghanistan.
After Biden ordered the withdrawal from Afghanistan of U.S. troops in 2021, voices from across the military establishment [predictably](https://substack.com/redirect/c7421ab8-e81f-48d3-8f97-66e77fe8cfa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) emerged to criticize the decision, claiming that accountability for the Pentagon threatened to abandon our nation's allies. The [very same](https://substack.com/redirect/b2db040b-feda-49f9-9c3d-f2e6c7ce09b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claims [emerged](https://substack.com/redirect/30181d6e-d503-4a1d-8763-37307e48d0ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when Washington finally left Vietnam 50 years before.
### Institutional lies enable war
After the withdrawals from Iraq and Afghanistan, the Pentagon needed another pretext for weapons sales. But rather than decrease, as they did after the end of the Cold War in the 1990s, [weapons sales](https://substack.com/redirect/d0127927-f6b8-4143-a0d2-46478417303a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after the withdrawals from Iraq and Afghanistan ultimately continued to increase, disproportionately approved by [politicians funded](https://substack.com/redirect/ada9afce-a7da-45c5-b998-21751a92a298?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the weapons industry.
This, after the Department of so-called "Defense" was caught having [lost track of $21 trillion](https://substack.com/redirect/a984ed7d-f46d-4a6b-a3a5-5d65c8cb3427?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
Always on the lookout for an international security crisis to contrive and [weaponize in favor of Wall Street](https://substack.com/redirect/716694e0-0468-485b-8820-21eeac08561a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Washington also began [stoking conflict](https://substack.com/redirect/dd07ac62-5b8a-4f8d-825a-85f4159bffb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Russia as early as 2014, supporting [a coup that set the stage](https://substack.com/redirect/b8e512c0-f608-4858-98fa-3f3c55c64744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the current conflict and escalation starting in 2022. Journalists supposedly committed to fact checking have reduced themselves to [cheerleaders](https://substack.com/redirect/a7fe089c-b06d-4a1d-a593-0d9b6fee0c1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for war, while fact-based critiques of Washington's official narrative have largely fallen to [international voices](https://substack.com/redirect/a07275d9-3775-4f53-9245-f62b18b6db28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As I [explained at a recent rally](https://substack.com/redirect/0ba0ac1f-c224-4b1c-a2ce-73e5a2919e53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in San Francisco against nuclear escalation, "the performance of American media institutions in the face of the latest warmongering by both parties in Washington has been absolutely shameful."
The refusal by news editors to address the 2014 coup when reporting on the 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine was far from the last of their failures.
After initially [threatening](https://substack.com/redirect/c77425b6-d2e0-403f-8674-c220165d1163?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Nord Stream 2 pipeline in early 2022 and then [blaming](https://substack.com/redirect/f3dfefb6-dcc3-4186-a1b6-62ceb0d79c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) its subsequent bombing on Russia (which made no sense at all since it was infrastructure from which Russia profited), American authorities [tried to discredit](https://substack.com/redirect/40b3e23b-bb90-4571-a41a-e8325332d321?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the most recent of Seymour Hersh's bombshell reports revealing a military coverup over an act of [international terrorism and ecocide](https://substack.com/redirect/98150fd1-e88e-4d66-898d-c5acbcc42e98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that directly harmed one of our nation's most crucial allies, Germany.
At the very same time, Washington raised international alarm over a supposed Chinese surveillance balloon that it later [shot down](https://substack.com/redirect/6c6b549f-db6b-4ca7-b85b-90543905f65f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), dismissing any [number](https://substack.com/redirect/44d76200-8b94-452c-a148-3c84512dae8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of alternative explanations before eventually [admitting](https://substack.com/redirect/9009841c-fe52-4a1d-bd1d-1984a6431c13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that its initial characterizations were inflated.
How many more times will "news" editors uncritically publish lies from Washington? They've certainly had a lot of practice.
The latest warmongering with China comes 20 years after news outlets amplified false claims about weapons of mass destruction in Iraq, and only after [years](https://substack.com/redirect/24a901c6-87bd-40db-94de-e0cda722be39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of [stories](https://substack.com/redirect/d7244f35-8554-4ccc-985e-f66a52faffb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about China's supposed aggression towards international shipping channels in the South China Sea. It became controversial (wait for it) after the [discovery of oil in 1968](https://substack.com/redirect/9896a325-c78c-4165-ace9-afc646b1d3d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I could go on about the role of corporate resource extraction in America's offensive wars of aggression, but that will be a story for another day.
Paid subscribers can gain access below to a review of another documentary film depicting the era examined by "The Most Dangerous Man in America." Like the history of Ellsberg's crucial revelations, this one also includes much more than its share of real-life drama.
It depicts how a group of peace activists broke into a government office, found files revealing decades of constitutional crimes that the FBI had managed to keep secret until then, and ultimately prompted congressional hearings that exposed (but failed to end) COINTELPRO, the notorious "COunter INtelligence PROgrams" described by the U.S. Senate in 1976 as including "a sophisticated [vigilante operation aimed squarely at preventing the exercise of First Amendment rights](https://substack.com/redirect/aa2236e0-0d35-4c78-913b-63c181719be3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of speech and association."...

clean_body: Listen now (17 min) | The "Most Dangerous Man in America" deserves the Nobel Peace Prize | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? | | Mar 12 ? The "Most Dangerous Man in America" deserves the Nobel Peace Prize | | | ---|---|--- | | Shahid Buttar| | | | | | Last week, renowned military whistleblower Daniel Ellsberg publicly his cancer diagnosis. Many Americans may have either forgotten, or never learned his extraordinary significance. No one has done as much to defend America from the horrors of our military industrial complex and the relentless wars for profit it has unleashed around the world. | | ---|---|--- This post attempts to explain recent U.S. and world history to generations of Americans who seem to have forgotten it. It is also to honor a national and international hero, not only for the sake of offering him recognition that he probably doesn't need, but particularly to expose a pattern that continues to repeat itself today. "The most dangerous man in America" In 1972, a break-in at Washington's Watergate hotel set the stage for the end of the Nixon administration. Government goons broke into a psychiatrist's office in order to seek files to publicly discredit his patient, a military whistleblower named Daniel Ellsberg who in 1971 publicly revealed a set of classified military documents exposing that Washington's war on Vietnam was based on lies repeated by the White House. Nixon described Ellsberg on tape as "the most dangerous man in America," which later became the title of an important that won several awards, including the Freedom of Expression Award from the National Board of Review, and the Special Jury Award at the International Documentary Film Festival Amsterdam. "The Most Dangerous Man in America" was also nominated for an Oscar for Best Documentary in 2009. The film's conveys the drama of the historical moment, which an entire political culture bizarrely forgot within only a single generation. The release of the Pentagon Papers, and the Nixon administration's counter-attack, were at the time--so much so that the Justice Department filed over a dozen lawsuits against major newspapers that collaborated to ensure that the public could read the facts suppressed by our government. This is a reader-supported publication filling profound gaps left by absentee & complicit "news" editors. Subscribe for free updates to help expose corruption by learning what journalists obscure! Ellsberg himself has observed that today. The result is sadly apparent in news cycles for decades government lies about wars from Nicaragua to Afghanistan, promoting militarism today from to , suppressing whistleblowers who to come forward revealing government crimes, and ignoring the bipartisan federal prosecution of a publisher who revealed to the public that the U.S. military assassinated two Reuters journalists in Iraq and never admitted it. When I led the Bill of Rights Defense Committee in the early 2010s, we organized screenings of the film in cities across the United States, recognizing not only that most Americans never learn about our own country's past, but also that newspaper editors have grown catastrophically co-opted and actively contribute to that ignorance. Little did we realize at the time that the next whistleblower poised to expose government crimes was waiting in the wings and would come forward just three years later. Inspiring successors When the documentary about him was screened in 2010, Ellsberg explained that part of his rationale in supporting it was to encourage other figures in the federal government to follow his lead by revealing to the public crucial information kept secret for illegitimate reasons. You, too, can help inform others by sharing this post. As a grassroots writer marginalized by the establishment, I rely on readers to help expose the facts it would prefer to suppress. After Edward Snowden came forward in 2013 to reveal illegal mass surveillance unconstitutionally authorized by President George W. Bush, . The two went on to collaborate on several projects, including academic ; co-directing organization focused on promoting press freedom and independence; and even and digital art. Their many are well worth reading. Neither Ellsberg nor Snowden were revolutionaries. Both were dedicated to the U.S. national security establishment before discovering its corruption, and they both remained public servants when giving up their careers and risking federal prosecution to do the right thing. Any figure who adapts and grows in response to what they learn deserves praise, especially given the tendency of to blind people to information that conflicts with their established worldviews. Psychology has demonstrated a powerful tendency for most people to ignore whatever they would rather not see. But beyond the moral courage and insight into ethics that their former colleagues lack, both Ellsberg and Snowden are praiseworthy for many other reasons stretching well beyond their acts of public service. Journalist Seymour Hersh, who in 1969 broke the story of at My Lai, recently published fascinating reflections on Ellsberg's life ranging well beyond the world-historical acts for which he is most widely recognized. Hersh covers Ellsberg's reportedly stellar skills on a piano, his use of magic tricks to entertain children, and his view that the assassination of President Kennedy was never fully investigated because "any far reaching investigation into his death would have [exposed] many covert operations." Seymour Hersh I think it best that I begin with the end. On March 1, I and dozens of Dan's friends and fellow activists received a two-page notice that he had been diagnosed with incurable pancreatic cancer and was refusing chemotherapy because the prognosis, even with chemo, was dire. He will be ninety-two... 4 days ago 973 likes Seymour Hersh I've been grateful for the chance to speak in many public settings. The appearances of which I'm most proud include a few where I was invited to speak alongside Ellsberg, like this 2014 discussion at St. John's Presbyterian Church in Berkeley, California, featuring Cindy Cohn and Rainey Reitman from the Electronic Frontier Foundation (where I later worked from 2015-2019) and Norman Solomon from the Institute for Public Accuracy. An ironic legacy The last American to win the Nobel Peace Prize was . His receipt of the award was based on his campaign promises to rescind the Bush-Cheney policy legacy, which he largely embraced once in office. Ari Fleischer, who served as press secretary for President Bush, noted in 2013 that " President Bush, all while putting a bipartisan stamp on how to fight terror." Obama's record as a president was so incongruous with the aims of the Nobel Peace Prize that it eventually prompted ongoing criticism of the process and institution . Ultimately, Obama's legacy included pioneering new forms of human rights abuses, such as robotic remote assassinations that officials claimed were "targeted" even though . Meanwhile, his administration abandoned the international human rights framework established after the Second World War by prosecuting whistleblowers (more than every previous administration in the history of our Republic combined) in order to, for example, insulate torturers in the CIA, who were ultimately promoted rather than ever held accountable for their crimes. Many of us were of the Obama administration's abuses. While some reporters did occasionally , the press generally ignored us, before later repeatedly on behalf of Washington's military-industrial corruption when who deferred. In other words, the Nobel Peace Prize was turned on its head to reward militarism, rather than those who have actually challenged it. Geir Lundestad, who served as secretary of the Nobel committee until he stepped down in 2014, said after leaving the organization that "[e]ven many of Obama's supporters believed that ." Awarding the Nobel Peace Prize to Daniel Ellsberg would help correct that mistake, better serve the purposes of the award, encourage future whistleblowers, and shame the cadre of newspaper editors whose have every war for the past three generations. The pattern that Ellsberg exposed continues today Granting an international peace award to an American head of state required a remarkable leap of faith by the who decide the recipients of the Nobel prizes. After all, in the world today than the United States. And the costs of American imperialism extend well beyond its direct victims and . In this vein, it's worth reading a by Spencer Ackerman, examining a memoir published by . Mattis served as a senior U.S. Marine commander in Iraq & Afghanistan under Bush & Obama, later joined the corporate leadership of weapons contractor General Dynamics and the (whose former CEO is currently serving an for fraud), and ultimately served in Trump's cabinet as Secretary of Defense. Praised as an intellectual so-called "" by gullible reporters in Washington lacking the independence and insight of journalists like Seymour Hersh, Mattis exhibited the same pattern of brutality that defined U.S. foreign-policy for the past three generations. His stellar reputation was rooted in memorable quips worthy of action movies that ultimately antagonized supposed allies, eroding the strategic position of which he claimed to have a unique awareness. Ackerman on a now famous exchange near Fallujah in which Mattis said to a group of assembled Sheikhs, "I come in peace. I didn't bring artillery. But I'm pleading with you, with tears in my eyes: If you f* with me, I'll kill you all." In his memoir, Mattis claims that the sheikhs "were allowing their sons to be recruited by the insurgents while they were talking to me -- unwittingly abrogating their own authority." As Ackerman explains, "perhaps they didn't like a foreign invader pledging to f their daughters and kill everyone they know." This, mind you, is a senior military commander widely praised by journalists for his supposed humanity and sophistication. When I was for an act of journalism in 2015, it was not a Trump official to whom I posed a question no one wanted to answer, but rather James Clapper--Obama's Director of National Intelligence. When who hacked the U.S. Senate to steal documents, hide the Agency's criminal trail related to torture, and threatened Senate staffers with criminal prosecution for doing their jobs, it was John Brennan, working under President Obama, the winner of the Nobel Peace Prize in 2009. Nor is this pattern of belligerent brutality isolated to unaccountable individuals. The corruption of America's military industrial complex is thoroughly institutional, as it would be. Any number of examples prove the unfortunate point. about weapons of mass destruction (repeated by Colin Powell, the who decades earlier spun the 1968 My Lai massacre after Seymour Hersh's dogged reporting in that era) enabled the invasion and military occupation of the seat of human civilization, at more or less the same time that enabled a war in Afghanistan. After Biden ordered the withdrawal from Afghanistan of U.S. troops in 2021, voices from across the military establishment emerged to criticize the decision, claiming that accountability for the Pentagon threatened to abandon our nation's allies. The claims when Washington finally left Vietnam 50 years before. Institutional lies enable war After the withdrawals from Iraq and Afghanistan, the Pentagon needed another pretext for weapons sales. But rather than decrease, as they did after the end of the Cold War in the 1990s, after the withdrawals from Iraq and Afghanistan ultimately continued to increase, disproportionately approved by by the weapons industry. This, after the Department of so-called "Defense" was caught having ! Always on the lookout for an international security crisis to contrive and , Washington also began with Russia as early as 2014, supporting for the current conflict and escalation starting in 2022. Journalists supposedly committed to fact checking have reduced themselves to for war, while fact-based critiques of Washington's official narrative have largely fallen to . As I in San Francisco against nuclear escalation, "the performance of American media institutions in the face of the latest warmongering by both parties in Washington has been absolutely shameful." The refusal by news editors to address the 2014 coup when reporting on the 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine was far from the last of their failures. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: A Passage from Jeremiah
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423452:JWEUbfGNX:m:1:3365131770:9BDE0F2F91907B3F847F2565909DD5F6:r)
---

The first step in solving the world's problems is clarity of sight, for without it, insight is impossible.

Our Lord, in Jeremiah, warned us:
_" Foolish and senseless people, who have eyes but do not see, who have ears but do not hear: Should you not fear me? Among my people are the wicked who lie in wait like men who snare birds. Their houses are full of deceit; they have become rich and powerful. Their evil deeds have no limit; they do not seek justice."_
This verse couldn't be more relevant today as we look to our nation's capital.

Today, Washington is plagued by leaders who have gained the world through their amoral and transactional politicking, but lost their souls through their neglect of their constituents.

Through their selfish leadership, they have proven that they lack the clarity of sight to represent the American people.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423452:JWEUbfGNX:m:1:3365131770:9BDE0F2F91907B3F847F2565909DD5F6:r)
---
| | | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423452:JWEUbfGNX:m:1:3365131770:9BDE0F2F91907B3F847F2565909DD5F6:r)
---

In order to restore morality and integrity to our nation's capital, we must have leaders who let God - **not self-interest** \- be their guide.

If you feel called like I do and want to see more faith-driven leaders, _**[please make a contribution today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423452:JWEUbfGNX:m:1:3365131770:9BDE0F2F91907B3F847F2565909DD5F6:r "please rush a contribution today to help us elect a new wave of principled, conservative
leaders.")**_

I know that with true believers in Congress, we can start to heal our nation and deliver it to salvation.

God Bless,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423452:JWEUbfGNX:m:1:3365131770:9BDE0F2F91907B3F847F2565909DD5F6:r)

Mike Pompeo

Peter, did you see
this photo on AOC’s Instagram story the other day? 😍

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131031?refcode=em20230312-27942&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=27942%2E1203867%2EOsjvdK ][IMG](Photo of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Tiffany Cabán, and Jamaal
Bowman)

This is the exact reason why Justice Democrats exists. We recruited
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Jamaal Bowman to run for Congress. We worked
with their campaigns from day 1 and took on the political establishment —
and we won!

Our work is only possible because of contributions from people like you.
Contributions from emails like this one account for a MAJOR source of our
fundraising.

In order to continue our work to transform the Democratic Party from the
inside out and elect more leaders like AOC and Jamaal Bowman, we need your
help.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131031?refcode=em20230312-27942&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=27942%2E1203867%2EOsjvdK ]If 10% of people reading this email each chip in $3,
then we can reach our mid-month fundraising goal of $20,535 in just a few
hours. Will you rush a contribution right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131031?refcode=em20230312-27942&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27942%2E1203867%2EOsjvdK ]Contribute $3

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC or Jamaal. Justice Democrats
recruited these leaders to run and win and we’re building the
infrastructure for even more grassroots candidates to do the same.

But we’re facing millions of dollars in attacks and spending from groups
like AIPAC and Moderate PAC who want to stop us from recruiting and
electing our next slate of progressive champions.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131031?refcode=em20230312-27942&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=27942%2E1203867%2EOsjvdK ]Please, if you can afford it, make your best gift right now to help us
reach our March mid-month fundraising goal before the deadline.

No matter what, thank you so much for your support.

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=27942%2E1203867%2EOsjvdK ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=27942%2E1203867%2EOsjvdK ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230312-27942-footer&t=1025&refcode2=27942_1203867_OsjvdK&akid=27942%2E1203867%2EOsjvdK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=27942%2E1203867%2EOsjvdK

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Wake Up Biden
subject: Spies in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
Washington is falling short when it comes to protecting the American people.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425008:6L7rufGNp:m:1:3331421248:B134577CDFC6DABEA31FEB105E0688F4:r "Headline") Peter: When Chinese spy balloons were flying over our country and invasions at our Southern Border were reaching historic milestones, it should have been clarion call to the White House, our national security apparatus and Congress. Unfortunately, Washington is falling short when it comes to protecting the American people. In a nutshell:
* We need to do a better job at securing our airspace.
* We need to do a better job at fighting cyber warfare from China and Russia
* And we need to do a better job of keeping Foreign State Media companies like Al-Jazeera from running around Capitol Hill ignoring our laws.

I've called on Attorney General Merrick Garland and the White House to take action, but they've failed to react. That's why I'm turning to freedom-loving Americans like you. **[Will you join the Bergman Battalion and help me keep the pressure on AG Garland and the White House to do their part and protect the American people from these national security threats?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425008:6L7rufGNp:m:1:3331421248:B134577CDFC6DABEA31FEB105E0688F4:r "Will you join the Bergman Battalion and help me keep the pressure
on AG Garland and the White House to do their part and protect the American people from these national security threats?")** Credentialed members of the media receive unparalleled access within the Capitol Building and it's the kind of access a foreign government could leverage to spy on us. Al Jazeera has 136 people running around here and the New York Times only has 82 with the same access. **Shouldn 't that be raising more than just my eyebrows?** I served in the USMC for over 40 years, and I won't accept the failures of any of our leaders who are failing to even run background checks on the foreign journalists on Capitol Hill. China. Russia. Qatar. These are just a few of my concerns. And since Joe Biden and his Administration are sitting on their hands and busy taking victory laps for ruining the economy, falling for China's false assurances about the COVID-19 outbreak, raiding Mar-a-Lago, or giving asylum to illegal border crossers, I'm pushing a new bill through Congress that will close the loophole and force compliance for these Foreign State Media Companies. **[Can I count on you to support my efforts to protect America?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425008:6L7rufGNp:m:1:3331421248:B134577CDFC6DABEA31FEB105E0688F4:r "Can I count on you to support my efforts to protect America?")** The Chinese government isn't placing any limitations on how they spy on us which is why we need to place limitations on who and where citizens of their country can go in our nation, especially within the Halls of Congress. The Democrats up here seem more concerned with preventing freedom-loving Americans like you from roaming the Capitol Corridors than a spy from Moscow or Beijing. **Isn 't it time we changed that dynamic?** **[Join the Bergman Battalion and help me protect our country, its citizens and our Capitol Building by enforcing compliance with our laws and background checks for Foreign State Media companies!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425008:6L7rufGNp:m:1:3331421248:B134577CDFC6DABEA31FEB105E0688F4:r "Join the Bergman Battalion and help me protect our country, its
citizens and our Capitol Building by enforcing compliance with our laws and background checks for Foreign State Media companies!")** America's national security cannot play second fiddle to partisan politics and Biden's wayward policies. I refuse to stand by idly until Biden and his Administration get their priorities straight. **[Help me keep the pressure up--Donate TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425008:6L7rufGNp:m:1:3331421248:B134577CDFC6DABEA31FEB105E0688F4:r "Help me keep the pressure
up—Donate TODAY!")** For our national security,
Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.) | | [JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425008:6L7rufGNp:m:1:3331421248:B134577CDFC6DABEA31FEB105E0688F4:r "JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION")
---

subject: Exclusive invitation for my top supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, last year, you helped me make history as the first Black woman ever to win re-election as New York’s attorney general
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60077314/395943928/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZWM4Zi1lNmMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=En75AKX7G7VIAKHiutgR5HdcPKZlwmLO7mGKfYepnZc=)
---
Peter, last year, you helped me make history as the first Black woman ever to win re-election as New York’s attorney general. You helped me send a message to the powerful and corrupt that we will _not_ bow, we will _not_ break, and we will _not_ be bullied.
And for that I wanted to say thank you – but also to be transparent about the work that still lies ahead of us.

**Right now, millions of Americans are still without reproductive care, LGBTQ+ people are still being threatened and discriminated against, and gun violence remains the largest epidemic of our generation. So I have to ask you:**
**[Peter, will you commit to making a monthly donation of $15 or more to my campaign? Becoming a recurring donor is the single most impactful way to support my continued fight for progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60077317/395943931/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZWM4Zi1lNmMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=En75AKX7G7VIAKHiutgR5HdcPKZlwmLO7mGKfYepnZc=)**
| | [Become a Monthly Donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60077319/395943933/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZWM4Zi1lNmMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=En75AKX7G7VIAKHiutgR5HdcPKZlwmLO7mGKfYepnZc=)
---
When I began my first term as attorney general in 2018, I vowed to do _everything_ in my power to give a voice back to the voiceless and provide working families with the tools they needed to live a good life – and I’m proud of the progress we’ve made so far toward that goal.
In my first term as attorney general, I won over a BILLION dollars from Big Pharma for New Yorkers suffering from the opioid epidemic, took gun manufacturers and sellers to court, held predatory landlords accountable, and so much more.

**And now, as I settle into my second term as attorney general, we have even bigger and bolder plans for progress – but I can only accomplish them with your help, Peter. So please:**
**[Can I count on you to become a monthly donor so I can continue to hold the powerful and corrupt accountable? For just $15 a month, you can help me make a _real_ difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60077320/395943934/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZWM4Zi1lNmMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=En75AKX7G7VIAKHiutgR5HdcPKZlwmLO7mGKfYepnZc=)**
Thank you for all of your support. None of this work would be possible without your help.

Letitia
_P.S. If you prefer to just make a one-time donation instead of making it monthly, use this link below!_

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/james-for-ny-23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60077322/395943936/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=0&refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzllZWM4Zi1lNmMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=En75AKX7G7VIAKHiutgR5HdcPKZlwmLO7mGKfYepnZc=)**
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0_qpfjczsECwUbLJUZRAAg2?unsubscribedata=PlZGIPTug58Ru3NnhjTPBO4dodPL1JmD9mdVpwpQ6dBK2cSfTSQqgEzKQ%2BPEyhXqp%2F7IcfJvKValuYDS4A6AiecaHnyx0LYRU3370mYJSTgBuAHY1Tpw%2Fmkh1z31LtYelPVky3ziS0UOG2gx3ZGwP6tEEK59UXlnzItKxkwgUGfxTiYw8Ec9%2Bjf78FZTtQdt2bPhluZuoJggykPPW909FVy1%2FjkDPXT57U7waEeHDyFjHwUJxv2nfh%2FuGOZHHdjLoWDF5x5bjDtXC1%2BIU%2B6cixexaAIQrArXBzInJINHSzLLmbTEmVJld3xUqy%2FjGvmAXfOrAmMxCiKcvo7tb4OK947olGaQ73ZMsKeZnJog1U3X4Eb78e%2B2fbcMTFbOkRviYsqxUe87rnzRDPXNdYk3cQCPGlBjbXsHEkLmaahQXYjbWHdKbeGEUWK7Qk4JI%2Fri) James for NY

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Tucker Carlson, Rupert Murdoch, and Fox News are using selectively-edited footage from Jan. 6th to smear the investigation and vilify Adam personally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1933%2E5257348%2Eb-UeuP ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Tucker Carlson attacked Adam again last week on his
primetime Fox News show. He aired heavily-edited footage of the Capitol
insurrection provided by Republican Speaker Kevin McCarthy exclusively to
Carlson to cover up MAGA Republicans’ culpability for inciting this deadly
attack on our democracy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=mar2023_abs_em.j7Sg7U&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230312_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1933%2E5257348%2Eb-UeuP ]From CPAC to Fox News, Tucker Carlson and Donald Trump’s attacks on
Adam have increased with startling frequency in the past week. We have to
respond. Rush a $10 contribution to support Adam’s campaign and help fight
back against Fox News and MAGA propaganda today.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=mar2023_abs_em.j7Sg7U&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230312_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1933%2E5257348%2Eb-UeuP ]DONATE $10

Derek,

Fox News pushed deadly lies about the pandemic in which over 1.13 million
Americans have died since 2020.

They pushed a Big Lie about the 2020 election that undermined the
foundation of our democracy and got people killed in a deadly
insurrection.

And for the past week, Tucker Carlson has broadcasted selectively-edited
Capitol security footage that Speaker Kevin McCarthy released to him
exclusively to push more lies about the deadly Capitol insurrection.

Last week on his Fox show, Tucker portrayed the so-called “QAnon Shaman”
as the victim of political persecution:

“All we know is what we see on the tape, and no one disputes it. We didn’t
cherry-pick it, we didn’t make it up...the LIARS on the January 6th Committee
and the prosecutors who did their bidding - and that means Bennie Thompson, that
means Adam Schiff, that means Liz Cheney...these people have this man’s life on
their hands.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230312_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1933%2E5257348%2Eb-UeuP ]Tucker Carlson's Fox News show broadcasting January 6th footage with chryon
'They attacked 'The Shaman' based on a lie'

There’s one reason that Fox executives, producers, and hosts like Carlson
continue to push false and misleading information: Money.

As Trump pushes his base to more far-right sources like Newsmax and OAN,
Fox has to compete by pushing more sensationalized and downright false
information.

We have to fight back. We have to hold them accountable. We have to elect
Adam to the Senate — so he can take on Trump and MAGA extremists’ most
egregious enablers and ensure truth, justice, and our democracy prevail
over this coordinated right-wing narrative, once and for all.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230312_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1933%2E5257348%2Eb-UeuP ]Rush any amount to Adam’s campaign today to help us stand up to Trump,
Tucker, and the far right’s attacks and downright fabrications:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230312_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1933%2E5257348%2Eb-UeuP ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dZVEvl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230312_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1933%2E5257348%2Eb-UeuP ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=mar2023_abs_em.7h-CrL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230312_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1933%2E5257348%2Eb-UeuP ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Add your name to our petition now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend -- I'm writing to you about a serious situation that demands our attention.

**The Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , and abortion has already been banned in over a dozen states -- but that isn’t enough for some Republicans. Now that their party controls the House of Representatives, they want a _nationwide_ ban on abortion that would reach into every state and every community. **

House Republicans' plan to eliminate safe and legal abortion must be stopped immediately -- so we need to act quickly.

The DSCC and I have launched an urgent petition to fight back against House Republicans’ efforts and prove that our support for reproductive freedom is _stronger_ than their will to take it away. **But I'm still missing your signature, and I need to know where you stand by midnight:**

| **Email:[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/11811?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230312-ChuckSchumer-AbortionPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230312-ChuckSchumer-AbortionPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=9884%2E9716520%2E1C85Yk)**
---
**Representing: Pennsylvania**
**Petition Status: INCOMPLETE**

| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://go.dscc.org/go/11811?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230312-ChuckSchumer-AbortionPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230312-ChuckSchumer-AbortionPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=9884%2E9716520%2E1C85Yk)

My goal is to gather _at least_ 250,000 signatures on this petition to show Speaker McCarthy that Americans reject GOP attacks on abortion rights. I'm counting on your name to be on that list. **So I have to ask:**

**[Please, will you stand with me and sign our petition to oppose House Republicans' efforts to destroy reproductive rights nationwide?](https://go.dscc.org/go/11811?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230312-ChuckSchumer-AbortionPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230312-ChuckSchumer-AbortionPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=9884%2E9716520%2E1C85Yk)**

Thanks,

Chuck

Friend, We’re only a few months into 2023, and Israeli soldiers have killed at least 65 Palestinians, including over a dozen children. For months, Israeli soldiers have invaded Palestinian villages nearly every day, alongside violent mobs of Israeli settlers (who live in Palestine illegally) who have attacked Palestinian towns, injuring hundreds of Palestinians while blocking ambulance access. And a senior Israeli government official just incited genocide against Palestinians, calling for the state of Israel to “wipe out” the Palestinian villages. **Israel’s extremist far-right government isn’t hiding ethnic cleansing and apartheid anymore: they’re upfront about it.** **In response, I’m proudly flying the Palestinian flag outside my office in Congress, calling to end the unconditional U.S. funding of Israel’s military, and advocating for our right to boycott Israel as protected in our Constitution.** As the only Palestinian-American serving in the U.S. Congress, my colleagues in Congress and state legislators are trying to silence me and our movement for Palestinian rights. But I won’t back down. [**Can you chip in today to show that not all Americans support Israel’s apartheid government?
