\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Mar 10, 2023
Subject: attempts to silence the movement for Palestinian rights:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Under Israel’s apartheid government, Palestinians are banned from flying the Palestinian flag. But I’m proudly flying the flag outside my office in Congress.
As violence keeps escalating under Israel’s extremist far-right government, I want the Palestinian people to know that no one can erase our existence.
For months, Israeli soldiers have invaded Palestinian villages nearly every day, critically injuring hundreds while shooting at ambulances to block people from receiving medical care. And in the last week, violent mobs of Israeli settlers (who live in Palestinian territories illegally) have attacked a number of Palestinian towns, even burning down homes with families inside.
**Responding to recent attacks, a senior Israeli government official incited genocide against Palestinians, calling for the state of Israel to “wipe out” the Palestinian villages.**
**Yet the bipartisan effort to shield Israel from accountability continues.** State governments and Congress have tried to punish boycotts of Israel and other tactics calling for Palestinian rights, in violation of our First Amendment rights to free speech and dissent. Yet the far-right Supreme Court recently refused to take up a case to overturn one of these unconstitutional laws.
**Despite these efforts to silence us, I will not back down.** As the only Palestinian-American serving in the U.S. Congress, I won’t stand by silently as our country is complicit in Israel’s apartheid. We must end unconditional U.S. military support for Israel’s military now. We need to keep the pressure on until Palestinians’ humanity and equal rights are finally recognized.

clean_body: As violence keeps escalating under Israel’s extremist far-right government, I want the Palestinian people to know that no one can erase our existence. | | | Friend, We’re only a few months into 2023, and Israeli soldiers have killed at least 65 Palestinians, including over a dozen children. For months, Israeli soldiers have invaded Palestinian villages nearly every day, alongside violent mobs of Israeli settlers (who live in Palestine illegally) who have attacked Palestinian towns, injuring hundreds of Palestinians while blocking ambulance access. And a senior Israeli government official just incited genocide against Palestinians, calling for the state of Israel to “wipe out” the Palestinian villages. Israel’s extremist far-right government isn’t hiding ethnic cleansing and apartheid anymore: they’re upfront about it. In response, I’m proudly flying the Palestinian flag outside my office in Congress, calling to end the unconditional U.S. funding of Israel’s military, and advocating for our right to boycott Israel as protected in our Constitution. As the only Palestinian-American serving in the U.S. Congress, my colleagues in Congress and state legislators are trying to silence me and our movement for Palestinian rights. But I won’t back down. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Please feel free to read more about what’s been happening in the email I sent yesterday, and please talk openly with your community about the urgent need for Palestinian freedom. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Mar 10, 2023 Subject: attempts to silence the movement for Palestinian rights: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Under Israel’s apartheid government, Palestinians are banned from flying the Palestinian flag. But I’m proudly flying the flag outside my office in Congress. As violence keeps escalating under Israel’s extremist far-right government, I want the Palestinian people to know that no one can erase our existence. For months, Israeli soldiers have invaded Palestinian villages nearly every day, critically injuring hundreds while shooting at ambulances to block people from receiving medical care. And in the last week, violent mobs of Israeli settlers (who live in Palestinian territories illegally) have attacked a number of Palestinian towns, even burning down homes with families inside. Responding to recent attacks, a senior Israeli government official incited genocide against Palestinians, calling for the state of Israel to “wipe out” the Palestinian villages. Yet the bipartisan effort to shield Israel from accountability continues. State governments and Congress have tried to punish boycotts of Israel and other tactics calling for Palestinian rights, in violation of our First Amendment rights to free speech and dissent. Yet the far-right Supreme Court recently refused to take up a case to overturn one of these unconstitutional laws. Despite these efforts to silence us, I will not back down. As the only Palestinian-American serving in the U.S. Congress, I won’t stand by silently as our country is complicit in Israel’s apartheid. We must end unconditional U.S. military support for Israel’s military now. We need to keep the pressure on until Palestinians’ humanity and equal rights are finally recognized. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | I will not back down in the face of attempts to silence me and others in the movement for Palestinian rights. Thank you for being by my side. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . **Breaking news, Peter:** Walgreens has confirmed that they will not be distributing medication abortion pills, the most common method of abortion in the U.S., even in some states where abortion remains legal.
This decision is thanks to mounting pressure from conservatives and intense lobbying from forced-birth extremist groups. We’re still waiting to hear from the Texas judge who will decide if one pill of the two-step regimen will remain FDA approved — but even if it does, Walgreens has still decided to cut off access to the pill for tens of millions of people across the country.
This is OUTRAGEOUS. Walgreens is turning its back on its patients who rely on them for care in favor of a loud minority. This is OUTRAGEOUS. Walgreens is turning its back on its patients who rely on them for care in favor of a loud minority. Thanks for your support on this, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423467:6bsN2fGNL:m:1:3365131770:4DE685306E7AD1778831DE303C49D0D7:r)

Peter,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423467:6bsN2fGNL:m:1:3365131770:4DE685306E7AD1778831DE303C49D0D7:r)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

**Goal:** $33,000
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donation: PENDING

[Donate >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423467:6bsN2fGNL:m:1:3365131770:4DE685306E7AD1778831DE303C49D0D7:r) ****

**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

[_**I am raising $33,000 to fund our legal battles to support the January 6th defendants in court. Will you send a gift of any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423467:6bsN2fGNL:m:1:3365131770:4DE685306E7AD1778831DE303C49D0D7:r)

I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

**Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. **
**

Kash Patel

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Tell Mike Pence: "Stop stalling and testify against Trump!"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell Mike Pence: "Stop stalling and testify against Trump!" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff86478a-b82a-43eb-bea7-ace739cda565/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7564cde3-69e7-4712-97fa-05aff0d1b355/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After more than 2 years, Mike Pence finally showed signs of a spine when he politely and mildly [criticized Donald Trump's](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1a47028-ec27-4686-8b28-2d5d4c4aa781/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) involvement with the January 6th attack. And the media reported this as if it were a big deal.

**But at the same time,[ Pence is refusing to testify where he could actually make a difference -- at actual trials involving Trump and the attack.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52eb4459-1829-44a8-be77-2890edd37083/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

Trump incited an armed mob to attack the Capitol, putting the lives of Pence and his family in danger. This shouldn't be a tough call for Pence. And yet, he keeps stalling.

**Pence said that "history will judge" Trump. But there are already actual judges and juries doing that right now. [And Pence needs to do his part.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta55de9bb-7fc3-49ac-a9f3-597c43ea5564/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

[**Tell Mike Pence: "Stop stalling and testify against Trump!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7dd8421-6110-4720-b8fe-d32013c364a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8cd6c6a7-e59a-4225-ba83-e35a74dc21c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _P.S. - Wondering why you should sign a petition? _ _By signing a petition, you demonstrate to those in power that people care about an issue, and will vote/act accordingly. The more signatures a petition gets, the more seriously those leaders will take it. It’s a sign that they will be rewarded for doing the right thing, and face a hassle if they don’t. Will one signature make a difference? Almost certainly not. But could thousands tip the balance on a critical issue? For sure. It’s already happened many times. Political leaders routinely change positions when they get a lot of pushback from voters, and corporate leaders do as well, when there is pushback from consumers. So take action, get others on board, and help make a difference. _ _[P.P.S. - You are receiving this because you took one of our actions. If you no longer with to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: American Revival
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Your support advances our movement for an American revival.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=3a84a7fe10aa44ec90f854f28ba9b916&_t=aGgwhb-njwLsE_E84iAX80BS5yom3Fih5Cnln6aukQ2h76-60L8TPT3Kg3aBYWMoyMLdhaFuSY8ozeQk73bnVp6_1iaN3UR_Sr-XXAjbMbo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=3a84a7fe10aa44ec90f854f28ba9b916&_t=aGgwhb-njwLsE_E84iAX80BS5yom3Fih5Cnln6aukQ2h76-60L8TPT3Kg3aBYWMoyMLdhaFuSY8ozeQk73bnVp6_1iaN3UR_Sr-XXAjbMbo%3D)

| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3a84a7fe10aa44ec90f854f28ba9b916&_e=h3CSARNvOiVVeNJTpMOwLcvbEOBenq3FzXKf5zV7C6cDWHuuM7f97dZ06spW8cqMcUxbg-7TUd2M71To6TpcEb8yOxaeVi0WiE5Qb4bgECSnpQifA2C8tOqdd_WNJY8u6dUujDnbEaIssnRJ31edL05YN0pYdmHK_j_pWuWQTtv-NJvzr6qWIZ8a6nU8s12HBzetEYnyDY3ljsX6V18hPOjjCPTRZ5ccYVZTBb85KH6MjsBuSwWHw3PAyP_w4b0a-ipd0L4Gk6EtK5PIpCgBEACejuQiDDTT8ZMDxWkWeZdQpQIzEEEq4eAFmBa7XQx1yCgKE7P6Gt3ucM1OhlfY8_T1WcVYxSHjx3xyUa1Vbfi0bQc42rv7dRCY3BMPR2d8B8MYLTyapD0Y1DNWIXU8xA%3D%3D)
Fellow American - here's how we win the White House in 2024: a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.

But this isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

Now, I need your help.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3a84a7fe10aa44ec90f854f28ba9b916&_e=h3CSARNvOiVVeNJTpMOwLcvbEOBenq3FzXKf5zV7C6cDWHuuM7f97dZ06spW8cqMcUxbg-7TUd2M71To6TpcEb8yOxaeVi0WiE5Qb4bgECSnpQifA2C8tOqdd_WNJY8u6dUujDnbEaIssnRJ31edL05YN0pYdmHK_j_pWuWQTtv-NJvzr6qWIZ8a6nU8s12HBzetEYnyDY3ljsX6V18hPOjjCPTRZ5ccYVZTBb85KH6MjsBuSwWHw3PAyP_w4b0aGJy-UFqR9tZ1aRpuR1noFzOBiKcnerhw2E32ZaB14z7FOLJVnQtGZ-2cd8FW9HsWFXCq-6qkruEarLQpAybg4fnHVi6N55A_G9il0GPpxEWrARmcpR8UkQthy37TLwwZG8WaR5I4ePF0sO97dnP6Kg%3D%3D)
We're about to hit a major campaign milestone - 10,000 unique donors in just weeks of campaigning.

Hitting this goal so early on is setting a precedent for what we're about to accomplish together over the next 20 months.

So here's what I am asking of you today: **[will you be one of the 10,000 donors I need? Make it a small donation - every dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to taking on the "Great Reset" and reviving this nation through the "Great Uprising."](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3a84a7fe10aa44ec90f854f28ba9b916&_e=h3CSARNvOiVVeNJTpMOwLcvbEOBenq3FzXKf5zV7C6cDWHuuM7f97dZ06spW8cqMcUxbg-7TUd2M71To6TpcEb8yOxaeVi0WiE5Qb4bgECSnpQifA2C8tOqdd_WNJY8u6dUujDnbEaIssnRJ31edL05YN0pYdmHK_j_pWuWQTtv-NJvzr6qWIZ8a6nU8s12HBzetEYnyDY3ljsX6V18hPOjjCPTRZ5ccYVZTBb85KH6MjsBuSwWHw3PAyP_w4b0a_UcL0VprpeFgDVNIglQuxY20S9dgMyk3h5gMVa8kAa8q5ZD0oSWuOWRbmcRMClOEYrlAEcZu6s31719hscBKGje7PaunSfbq51j5_wCC6XqFlWXY_aPD222L_DvGiZAMYcBgJ2cCUwfN_cPmT1dztw%3D%3D)**

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

body:
Here’s the latest update on my revolutionary four-day workweek legislation in Congress:

| Peter, here’s the latest update on my revolutionary four-day workweek legislation in Congress:
* Lawmakers like AOC, Pramila Jayapal, and the Congressional Progressive Caucus are lining up to support my bill
* Major companies and even countries around the world are implementing their own four-day workweeks with incredible success
* **And now – the New York Times has profiled my legislation in a new piece:**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60080586/395957031/299171790?amount=4&refcode=MTFC_20230312_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmMzg2Ny1mM2MwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BL3wzEihOicZvylFSbs0ZpYsG5At3hJSzEgyDZyJ5nU=) [**Peter, if we don’t capitalize on this momentum NOW, support for a four-day workweek could tumble. Can I count on you to chip in $4 or $4 now to boost momentum for a four-day workweek and demand better conditions for American workers? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60080588/395957033/299171790?amount=4&refcode=MTFC_20230312_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmMzg2Ny1mM2MwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BL3wzEihOicZvylFSbs0ZpYsG5At3hJSzEgyDZyJ5nU=) | [$4,000 NEEDED: CHIP IN $4 FOR A FOUR-DAY WORKWEEK »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60080590/395957035/299171790?amount=4&amounts=4,7,10&refcode=MTFC_20230312_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmMzg2Ny1mM2MwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BL3wzEihOicZvylFSbs0ZpYsG5At3hJSzEgyDZyJ5nU=)

Look Peter, the world has changed. With a shift toward dual income households, families need time to raise children and take care of household tasks.

With a rise in automation, American workers are more productive than ever – but incomes haven’t budged.

A four-day workweek would revolutionize how we work, play, and live. And it has never come at a more important time.

[**Peter, don’t let this momentum die. Chip in $4 to give Americans the freedom to live their lives. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60080592/395957037/299171790?amount=4&refcode=MTFC_20230312_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmMzg2Ny1mM2MwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BL3wzEihOicZvylFSbs0ZpYsG5At3hJSzEgyDZyJ5nU=)

clean_body: Here’s the latest update on my revolutionary four-day workweek legislation in Congress: | Peter, here’s the latest update on my revolutionary four-day workweek legislation in Congress: Lawmakers like AOC, Pramila Jayapal, and the Congressional Progressive Caucus are lining up to support my bill Major companies and even countries around the world are implementing their own four-day workweeks with incredible success And now – the New York Times has profiled my legislation in a new piece: = = | = Look Peter, the world has changed. With a shift toward dual income households, families need time to raise children and take care of household tasks. With a rise in automation, American workers are more productive than ever – but incomes haven’t budged. A four-day workweek would revolutionize how we work, play, and live. And it has never come at a more important time. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much for your support. \-- Mark | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. body:
Here’s what they all have in common: | | | Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. I wanted to take some time today to tell you a little bit about where I come from and what got me into Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. **Will you please give me a moment to explain?** As a kid from a working-class neighborhood in the heart of Central Missouri, running for U.S. Senate was never part of my plan. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zDHjwxobIkuVW8NkuVzvhk7MLorrRyPl3c9BSesYSlN0dj537pkccRTY__hnhZgdc-sZT7bLGv4IR7xw3-OEnJqHqh5jFP_EmGo-03PhbPtElR94BcuQoEgsE27dXdXkC2tkMmhTgd6gad0IUKpHFzaPOnDxMSvW8RzxlsHlaAJEl35D07Fb0RLcucY_4SZ5bTiLZ9Y_SeZco_G7rVh1Ka-ipySMKKy03nhTeLtYa6ic1YCvoEZTczGMq57ObeaQ-7KOQBSXiw0Emjz7Wq74TBw18p2Tl2EtbmHdhiSlKm2Gw93-_vP7ycMbbMnxfAQuKPXnFguJWo8lHNf2GGmyqp/3uf/L25mQvPrSMCcSAv-24MI0w/h0/v6_8-JWLM3i288y5nXs0bV0nM29m3xgdOI2KO5eKcjA) Like so many Americans, my parents lived paycheck-to-paycheck — so when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher. **But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us.** When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes. And when we couldn’t afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.** Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zDHjwxobIkuVW8NkuVzvhk7MLorrRyPl3c9BSesYSlN3Y8PQaqrZ0a-kKrViYQxeFq9Whhc2rBIdsiB2t0cwqNFZ8GaChiVHaOX4vaWUS-8b4RqZIcObhdekELaGgsCNAZ52cno0rluVtzkGAWuv9pnL7El5Zmf1gTALIJ7yFovxhGnobMcm9pNjmy2fRZQ7naePhdsBf_aFkgBvpIdsXc8NRULdGYsIKYPcWYA8TBzmJcx2NEnCmKdqxA6UNXYQA3xP6njZh89aOtoa5Z6N3mKyrMJPanDPc26yuan6_AIMoQxq4DeRW9l6lRpcPoUA6sNClfrTfiN-Tx7lGEGmPT/3uf/L25mQvPrSMCcSAv-24MI0w/h1/emaYDg2-L3N6RezMwoCgw_P2GZ3jCOpyUTzMVahKYRI) While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people. **I’m running for U.S. Senate because it’s time everyday Missourians — people who know how to take care of each other — called the shots in our country._[And today, I’m asking for your support to make it happen.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zDHjwxobIkuVW8NkuVzvhk7MLorrRyPl3c9BSesYSlN1wn5_8Mtd6BeqGlgrPWg7I5Brt5AY-VvG44k51vBinKl8W1AjqZMr0vQlA69wF78zIRx8IdOTZup4s-nlDq1q6dyR4rWG7d2upPoFimAGnxxAOuNbz2AKBFLjX5tY9RWsNC2Dj6R1LYcsKdUTR-UfTrVn5vWZK5Rg3uZRfL5QGppuOECfb4tuHpKiehG6qu6_oeFSJl1ffpDFcgisFtMfmyCQWjXssYIS1JDpCjfmhwCFTibYcu7vli9Bj_YQ5AgeeSrSFO2LFUvBlNutGowF3RlwRqmNM98bLP6NNcIZrd/3uf/L25mQvPrSMCcSAv-24MI0w/h2/5zDLmc8NJCsK68gRCgLbEm3R4Ig3y1FgCb8aZxMlkAk)_** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zDHjwxobIkuVW8NkuVzvhk7MLorrRyPl3c9BSesYSlN1_zV71fDIR-BMR95YqPcv5hhviJzUwA7R22-_0aI4j4lOuBGCJYJKsnSvaZXqYGKIxgQNDlsB6m9VAYjdWN4PYmy9HzhexWpxhX65WXgtDSgMnukeJ26wrtLCwTjym_U36GFUd0alGkAkOvDmkUgrwc10hov3_RrR17M5-4akff6fq6rVLkUP0TdZOjircLDH-8V05y80ld0PL4zgsLgVatSV9C2hkQQNTzoqLicaSZm-IQzryg3WaafPXxdLKmQeXCceTEcb9IJupYcVgsYl2PFjLCMpLWemonJX63JG9w/3uf/L25mQvPrSMCcSAv-24MI0w/h3/mYgNUNS_ykJzqZDg-Qvo7hYsEXqIPIauzgehwapK02s)** If you’re ready to take back power from the massive corporations and corrupt, career politicians who’ve torn up our country, I need you on this team. **_[Can you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and United Rural Democrats right now so we’ll have the resources we need to get this message in front of voters? I don’t take any money from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big impact.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zDHjwxobIkuVW8NkuVzvhk7MLorrRyPl3c9BSesYSlN6XZRTmJvD7_pBXkiH0qlCUv_vBfzmZL8TWx23aFVBvy-3tdz1VQ08cNA2P21pGzCKgTTTEXsCURbevfXUtR3x1lyuF7DcL4XAZLXbOYbhc6WsHiqOmbfd99CfpTdeyJW-ZZONdFswFVjiRdHOL_XCppALf9Zaa3TYKcSMnD6Wlqz8pBgCOPLOi2a0f4fgpjjarBPZ9src5xrJdLAft2e6Wg8X6OJDnyPi2cu_qRkxfb378jdyiaRDiv-jk4-ljyhrlIKIUStLkn9l9Lu70pRXBXRGLTcptoZjSaAGWF5RtA/3uf/L25mQvPrSMCcSAv-24MI0w/h4/SNdmDAUIyrYC-qiowhVgZQIaCSatKdN-_97sm5Vis1U)_** **__** **[Donate Here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zDHjwxobIkuVW8NkuVzvhk7MLorrRyPl3c9BSesYSlN2qvSRVNtJweAajz_nSBeiC0-DC809oq9WjqNorRLCZH8b3Xh6QkBvxghIKHM9ja2BfHjyL1tM6Eg4LApJaBfd3rYJCYxNzZvBjAuKaf3s5LQpwC2uK663sNKTX9IeJrzlvaX2veMT9D5pPaY65z4-SzFj_GqxsAbxw2pTCceBWJ1KhkQrDvCHBOx943sDw3xpWxDCrMXZ4Iogbn8Zwk59pKxe7pZIhgvjwpKW4sMzGF2W9IxHcCvK2bA6RDX5gT8DCGuTukw2bLZew6BHoq3udrm6pmQFRKXqKJQjZYN0oZ/3uf/L25mQvPrSMCcSAv-24MI0w/h5/GEiRLpYfBu1YG5V6PxjYdNwUhIy4_5YSAvZbJ1ocSTM)** Thank you for everything, Peter. **Attorney General Jason Miyares sent a letter demanding a Virginia middle school stop its unlawful discrimination against students in connection to Fairfax County’s selective College Partnership Program. The Virginia Human Rights Act prohibits discrimination on the basis of race, color, religion, or national origin, and it’s critical that every public school in the Commonwealth follow the law. ** _“It’s shocking that we continue to find such blatant examples of racial and ethnic discrimination in the Fairfax County Public School System. Every student should be able to apply for the College Partnership Program and have the same opportunities as their peers, regardless of race. I demand that Cooper Middle School, its administrators, and anyone involved in this program stop this illegal discrimination immediately.” _ **–Attorney General Miyares**

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: 4 things:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
You might wonder: It’s not an election year, so why fundraise?
#
Peter,
**You might wonder where that $5 contribution goes when it’s not an election year.**
Great question. Much of what we do during the “off-year” lays the necessary groundwork for success during an election year. For Cori that means:
* **Amplifying her legislative work in Congress;**
* **Combating attacks from far right extremists** and media outlets like Fox News;
* **Educating the public about her policies in ways that are accessible** , like how a Green New Deal for Cities could impact their town, or how the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ impacts their access to health care; and
* **Ensuring Cori has a strong presence in her community** , and much more.

**These efforts create a strong foundation for victory during the Election Year — a foundation that, if it isn’t fully funded, could seriously hurt Cori’s re-election campaign.** That's why we're hoping we can count on this grassroots movement to step up and help us make up the difference over the next few days.
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to help us close the off-year fundraising gap?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230312.XDcJiq&amount=5&refcode=em20230312-2320&t=1&akid=2320%2E1082990%2E55a0JC)**
**[Chip in $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230312.XDcJiq&refcode=em20230312-2320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2320%2E1082990%2E55a0JC)**
**We believe our movement should be grounded in people — not special interests.** It's why Cori doesn't accept a cent from corporate PACs, and it's how she's able to fight for people-first solutions in Congress like Medicare for All and student debt cancellation.
**[We need leaders like Cori who will fight for justice and won’t back down. Show your support of Cori’s fight to defend abortion access: Chip in $5 or any amount meaningful to you right now.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230312.XDcJiq&refcode=em20230312-2320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2320%2E1082990%2E55a0JC)**
But that means we rely 100% on grassroots donations of $5, $10, or $15 to power our movement to re-elect the first activist from the movement in defense of Black lives elected to federal office.
**[It's really important we receive enough contributions to stay on track with our projections and ensure we have the resources to keep Cori in Congress — chip in $5 today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230312.XDcJiq&amount=5&refcode=em20230312-2320&t=22&akid=2320%2E1082990%2E55a0JC)**
—Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230312?refcode=em20230312-2320-footer&t=23&refcode2=2320_1082990_55a0JC&akid=2320%2E1082990%2E55a0JC) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2320%2E1082990%2E55a0JC)

Biden just landed another punch in his war against every faithful Christian.
And if nothing is done immediately, he and the anti-God Woke Mob will land the knock-out-blow.
8 faithful Christians were just charged with crimes for praying outside of an abortion clinic.
You know Biden and Democrats have always dreamed about turning every Christian into a criminal, but now their dreams are turning into nightmares for every American of faith.
We're begging, pleading, PRAYING you'll come to our aid to save faith in America.
We need a surge of Christian support right now, and all we need is an answer to this one question.
[**Do you think God still belongs in America?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425055:JUabVfGN3:m:1:3331421248:CCBC971417249F0B94E901274C729324:r)
[**YES - GOD BELONGS!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425055:JUabVfGN3:m:1:3331421248:CCBC971417249F0B94E901274C729324:r)

Please, please, PLEASE believe us when we say that this administration won't stop until every Christian is humiliated and imprisoned.
Answer today, and PLEASE say a prayer for the future of faith in America.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Silicon Valley Bank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
As a consumer protection attorney who has spent my career taking on Wall Street, I wanted to help break down what’s happening with Silicon Valley Bank.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19240%2E3422442%2E02fDSc)
Derek,
**As a consumer protection attorney who has spent my career taking on Wall Street, I wanted to help break down what’s happening with Silicon Valley Bank.**
Silicon Valley Bank is a well established bank that has been really important in lending to technology companies. During the pandemic, the bank grew rapidly in size. As banks do, it turned around and invested that money. But they were investing in U.S. treasury bonds, which take years to reach their full value.
The problem for Silicon Valley Bank? Interest rates have gone up, so venture capitalists are moving their money **now** to get more bang for their buck. And as of Friday, Silicon Valley Bank didn't have enough liquid cash (i.e. capital) to return people’s deposits—leading to its collapse.
There are some real oversight questions about why the bank wasn’t prepared, but the blame isn’t all on them. Congress played a real role in this debacle.
After the 2008 financial crisis, Congress passed legislation to require banks to hold onto more liquid cash. This thicker cushion lowered the risk for consumers—but it wasn’t ideal for the banks, which want to invest as much as possible to earn more profit.
Wall Street has been working to reverse these consumer protections ever since. When Trump was elected in 2017, a group of Senators pushed to allow medium-sized banks, like Silicon Valley Bank, to hold onto less liquid cash. I wasn’t yet in Congress, but I sounded the alarm that this was a dangerous move that put people’s money at risk. **But in the end, Congress—in a bipartisan vote—caved to Wall Street and loosened our nation’s banking laws.**
**I have no problem standing up to Wall Street, so I’m writing legislation to reverse that risky law.** I’m also working with state officials to make sure businesses and employees who depend on Silicon Valley Bank can still pay their bills.
I wanted to send this summary because I know how scary bank closures can be. When I was growing up in Iowa, the small town bank closed on a Friday afternoon, and everybody in the community was worried about how they were going to get their deposits out or make payroll—the same concerns we're having today.
That experience is part of what inspired me to study bankruptcy law under my then-professor Elizabeth Warren. I saw how Wall Street wielded political power to rig the rules against working people, and how they rarely took responsibility for their own (frequent) mistakes. **After the 2008 financial crash, I was appointed to be California’s Independent Monitor over the Big Banks.** My job was to make sure California families who were cheated by the five biggest Wall Street banks received the compensation a new settlement entitled them to. **I held the banks’ feet to the fire, and forced them to pay Californians billions.**
Now more than ever, California needs a warrior in the Senate who has the courage and experience to stand up to Wall Street.
I’ll follow up as we learn more,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF12_1_SVB_20230312_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19240_3422442_02fDSc&akid=19240%2E3422442%2E02fDSc)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=19240%2E3422442%2E02fDSc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19240%2E3422442%2E02fDSc)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: It’s out of control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Crime in this country is out of control, and we have blue states to blame.

Across America, Democrat governors and mayors are signing bills to let criminals roam free without consequences while families worry for their safety.

_It’s almost like the radical Left wants to win over criminals for their votes._

Peter, it’s time for America to stop prioritizing criminals and put families first.

[**American cities MUST get tough on crime, and it’s up to the US to hold liberal politicians accountable. Stand with me now and DEMAND America starts holding criminals accountable!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=0225b3c70b534e7a96cc3baa2f8af600&_e=c3Cap3CKGU4RIGiIsE-61ZllxUBQUUIay57oWYEss6nf6BR-ccdhYct7g3M5KhLF-IMOnezjTXp3zizFrFDdqC4Yg5nLK5TPTa74tQXPPsBeWhi7AGoUuAkg-T82_jQKPH7dPmCJ_2tV25mjKI6a0XuyBGYmA7YltKt92aSHNQnK2AzqTwBpsU3AwODsSCSx1CcNGjgS7tl-n6bzNqjxkQHPg8QbgtTDSx5Wum45JmJjSsp8ZwhiNjld0lhzLgPCq2pSB1eoo5coppWptZIVI8OlolqXeQIqrG6J5ySm4bYbIruXQQKBujZl2M6pnfGzCksWS0HM7XzA_XwxB-t051LfGOBfiYo2QAU3FS65VjY%3D)

| | Friends, Matt Gaetz here – I had a powerful message at [CPAC](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aebbc14837a14a8fa106ed6eee6036fb&_e=5zn12Bycak9HlJaalpN0ILRjP5rZS0UoGEhCRIL7Ky2V_ZZVJxOqvRrvNhk-kZVM9Z7N-Jnua5B9j_E2rhlJDygGvbbsWzdtmn6kv8HfLCHeFYCSi8qgi84eaWv8r3nP60W0lReYwks9jOv3QcFJ5FL1JYah-w825Aiu_DrnnSWEEuQJ2s5A1vTKFQa3oB_vKNUSL3tEb_e6m5iMcm-S0ReqPklTEocfdHXt80PW10Q81FJ6LygoDxGS4aYDQ6W1J4gh6FDz4M1JZtvayT42izhfIs-v8BuLZnuHmuLxv0TIE-crj9mClXeZi3JcW9AeTxX-cV3kASktkK_Ay-dpYmUh2EgCan_61pwhdwHTEx4%3D) last week and wanted to relay my message to our entire movement.

Unlike many in the Swamp, _**I am not a human vessel for lobbyist cash.**_ I am a vindicated Florida Man who will NEVER be afraid to stand up to the D.C. Cartel on the American people's behalf!

That’s precisely what I did during the Speaker vote along with 20 brave America-First Patriots. **The concessions we earned broke the Washington status quo to make sure horrible omnibus legislation, bloated bureaucrat salaries like Dr. Fauci’s, and other Swamp nightmares NEVER happen ever again in this country!**

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)

Peter,

I need you to see this.

Democrats and their cheerleaders in the mainstream media refuse to tell the truth about the 2024 election map, _**so I 'll give it to you straight. **_
**_Far-Left Democrats only have a TWO seat advantage in the Senate, and in 2024, Democrats must defend 3 SEATS in Conservative states: Montana, West Virginia, and Ohio._

_Republicans have won the first two states in six straight presidential elections and the last state in four of the last six contests for the White House._**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)
All Republicans have to do to take the majority back is win 2 OF THEM.
**[3 STATES HELD BY DEMOCRATS THAT ARE CONSERVATIVE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)
[2 STATES NEEDED TO FLIP THE MAJORITY
1 IMPORTANT ASK FROM ME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)**
Democrats will do everything possible to STOP us from winning, so I have _ONE_ important ask. _Can you stand with the Republican Party so we can WIN in 2024 and take the Senate and White House BACK? _

**[Please make a generous donation of ANY AMOUNT, even one donation goes a long way, TODAY to ensure Senate Republicans can TAKE BACK the Majority.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)
I don't know if Republicans will ever get a BETTER opportunity to take back the Senate and cement a HISTORIC Majority than this cycle. We cannot look back on this and think what COULD have been if people like you and me had acted.

This is a do-or-die moment, and I hope grassroots Republican supporters like you SEIZE the moment.
**[Chip in ANY AMOUNT TODAY to help Senate Republicans beat the Democrats in 2024 and take back our Majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)
Karl Rove

** **
********[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425059:6ikGGfGNQ:m:1:3331421248:AA9AECB985657DD8666057DDB5E2B9F2:r)********

subject: The Last of Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Hey there — can we talk about The Last of Us? (Don’t worry, there are no spoilers ahead.) Every Sunday after each episode, we take some time to reflect and really dig deep into what these characters and this story means. With all her strength and wittiness, **Ellie** — the main protagonist — is a symbol of this new generation of leaders. She has grit and courage. Her journey and endless pursuit for hope reflects those that always rise above the pain. Just like Ellie, our youth has proven time and again that they will learn from the past and do whatever it takes to move our country forward. Ellie’s desire to fix a broken world stood out above all the ugly realities she faced. **Light over darkness. Unity over division. Courage over cowardice. ** That’s what servant leadership is. Sticking your neck out for what’s right and putting the needs of others ahead of our own. Fighting for our communities. Neighbor for neighbor. Friend for friend. Jason ran for office to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. Our team will always go where the fight is to deliver real solutions. **We can’t wait to see where Ellie's story goes next. But for now:**[**Can we count on you today to extend a donation of $3 to help us forge the path ahead?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60093509/395972983/-1943478936?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230312_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjg3ZWIxNi0wOGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nHBmDFJipeJXXwcVaP5e05FS1spZ8i5V3uYjTJrDh4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60093512/395972985/-1943478936?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230312_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjg3ZWIxNi0wOGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nHBmDFJipeJXXwcVaP5e05FS1spZ8i5V3uYjTJrDh4=)

clean_body: | Hey there — can we talk about The Last of Us? (Don’t worry, there are no spoilers ahead.) Every Sunday after each episode, we take some time to reflect and really dig deep into what these characters and this story means. With all her strength and wittiness, Ellie — the main protagonist — is a symbol of this new generation of leaders. She has grit and courage. Her journey and endless pursuit for hope reflects those that always rise above the pain. Just like Ellie, our youth has proven time and again that they will learn from the past and do whatever it takes to move our country forward. Ellie’s desire to fix a broken world stood out above all the ugly realities she faced. Light over darkness. Unity over division. Courage over cowardice. That’s what servant leadership is. Sticking your neck out for what’s right and putting the needs of others ahead of our own. Fighting for our communities. Neighbor for neighbor. Friend for friend. Jason ran for office to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. Our team will always go where the fight is to deliver real solutions. We can’t wait to see where Ellie's story goes next. But for now:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for taking the time to read this message and supporting our campaign, — Team Crow | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. name: Susan Wild
subject: keep this momentum going →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Congress has the power to stand up to the pharmaceutical industry and put caps on the cost of life-saving medications – but it will never happen if Republicans hold the House majority.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60093899/395974749/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230312-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ0N2Y4NS0wYmMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0pwqDyUGadoEQ-8yWI6XA_6T1F1R7Quui95QdWHESFI=)
---
| Peter,

I am proud to be one of the most vocal advocates in Congress for lowering prescription drug costs.

Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, the cost of insulin is capped at $35 a month for Medicare users, and earlier this month manufacturer Eli Lilly announced that it will also cap out-of-pocket costs for its insulin at $35 a month.

These price caps are huge steps forward, but they’re not enough. We must keep this momentum going and make insulin – and all life-saving prescription drugs – affordable and accessible for all Americans. clean_body: Congress has the power to stand up to the pharmaceutical industry and put caps on the cost of life-saving medications – but it will never happen if Republicans hold the House majority. | = | Peter, I am proud to be one of the most vocal advocates in Congress for lowering prescription drug costs. Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, the cost of insulin is capped at $35 a month for Medicare users, and earlier this month manufacturer Eli Lilly announced that it will also cap out-of-pocket costs for its insulin at $35 a month. These price caps are huge steps forward, but they’re not enough. We must keep this momentum going and make insulin – and all life-saving prescription drugs – affordable and accessible for all Americans. = | = | = Congress has the power to stand up to the pharmaceutical industry and put caps on the cost of life-saving medications – but it will never happen if Republicans hold the House majority. The only way to deliver real results for American families and workers is to take back the House in 2024. = | = | = With appreciation, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. They don’t call it Club Fed for nothing. To be fair, just because [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | #### [ Manchin Ousts Biden Nominee Over Climate Activism Sen. Joe Manchin, the chairman of the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee, has announced that he will block the nomination of Laura Daniel-Davis as assistant secretary of the Department of Interior (DOI) over her climate activism. This decision effectively kills President Biden’s nomination for the position. Manchin’s decision came in response to an internal [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: eric sorensen (personal)
subject: This should only take a minute.
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Eric Sorensen For Congress
body:
| Peter, I wanted to be sure you saw this news: On Friday, The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) announced their 2024 "Frontline" Democrats. These are the House members considered to be the most at-risk in the coming election cycle.**I was added to this list.** I can’t say I’m totally surprised. As a freshman member in a swing district, Republicans know 2024 is probably their best and only shot at taking this seat. I was elected with just 51.8% of the vote in 2022, and the outcome was never a foregone conclusion. In fact, we were outraised by our opponent by more than _$2 million!_ I want to be very clear here: I don't believe for a second that who has the most money will decide who wins this race. Yes, Republican super PACs are going to throw millions of dollars in attacks at us. For our part, we need to believe in our message, run our own race, and attract the voters who will help us win. But here’s what’s troubling: We're coming up short of our own internal fundraising goals to run a winning campaign. That's not ideal – especially as we close in on our first FEC fundraising deadline of the new year. Now that I’m officially on the Frontline, I'm hoping you can send in $5 to give my campaign a much-need boost. I know we ask a lot, but please know I wouldn't be emailing personally if it weren't urgent. Here's a good link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q1-2023](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAQfDazIGQL5RUyCDnnnxJDXRlKEav4dMsD86a0pSOEOAM40OLhuBnNnkg48AMS8s3jtERkoWXr6D_Aq0TIAgJORrTjJyZbbqVN7fjWzvgIlZrOir-BR6kfC0dyeo9hZ1usFZG99fJhTITc7s2VQ7Rr8gw72CgW5KNCtVcTiaek6uiV-pNY5PdRUEwt-o-_nFvWBFtoEGTHuvkjTJ71cKi6sG4g1Pw0vb74ifF5M2lW4E6f-4fIIn1kX2QfXHb1EJMflm4jYerMKcE-um7qyvv3V8LqAJcPZdRZ3MB-MTPGSg420zJLYKEN9hXoe9PQqZE5_rSMtWZaNKfsGkqlQz7FHcEF2mfJA_jwmTO5aPFK7o/3uf/_qyiOPTVQASPpnhx3DtVAw/h0/BnjXYzI-T14feIs40w5tQ_iWss1-LavoC51FnWjCOA4)** If we learned anything from our last campaign, it's that early resources can make a huge impact in shaping the dynamic of this race. Strong early numbers could mean larger PACs are more wary of challenging us. It can also prevent potential opponents from jumping in against me. And unlike any of our would-be Republican opponents, I'm relying on individual donors to keep this seat blue. So thank you in advance for chipping in. Here's that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q1-2023](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAQfDazIGQL5RUyCDnnnxJDXRlKEav4dMsD86a0pSOEOAM40OLhuBnNnkg48AMS8s3jtERkoWXr6D_Aq0TIAgJOeCXjdaIt6uWQD6zDaNFlVb21e9dzf2TQM5nXpRGkYrw8_ld2DvDP1TzTuobHZApzWjEpRDhXKrnTq-J3BJmfClTeSvQKnUw0BpnnVCj2sjQuQT4vSU_LzYVFy_WUfpNOiSEqZhAYMZayoMKglgf-NQ1lSgV1xznOknSE6dTT1wqci45tDv_0mFOM5rmid5CM6ZyFCMfh_q-AB7r2IAmuqw-HZ9mBBGt0m6pY91-0i40d8fowDv9YddlGveYbeD4oDmR9bV5yRf83EvFv2v87Fg/3uf/_qyiOPTVQASPpnhx3DtVAw/h1/k9UVrkMPA2bQ4UVlmojKqc6Tp-cQrUcDDpIjup3VQVY)** All my best, Eric

subject: I come to you with bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | I come to you with bad news.

The FEC has increased its maximum contribution limit by 14%!

The Left's ability to outraise and outspend us is nothing short of astonishing but now, Democrat billionaires and millionaires can have 14% more of an impact on our elections!

**Let me be clear, this puts Republicans in a DEVASTATING position. **

I have spent YEARS fighting against Democrats and I can tell you from experience, that after a certain point, there is no overcoming a cash disadvantage.

Our ability to fight against corrupt Democrats, stand against the Biden Administration's socialist agenda, and fight for your priorities in Congress hangs in the balance.

That's why I'm setting an immediate fundraising goal by midnight tonight. **[If every person reading this message gives whatever they can give, we can even the odds:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424062:6qkpIfGjN:m:1:3365131770:F901BA7ACB1BD1E225DC36E3861D290C:r "If every person
reading this message gives $14 or whatever they can give, we can even the odds:")**

---

**If not ... I fear what will come next. **

Without every patriot reading this, without YOU, please believe me when I say it will be game over.

Any contribution can make a difference. **[Please don't give up on us now:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424062:6qkpIfGjN:m:1:3365131770:F901BA7ACB1BD1E225DC36E3861D290C:r "Please
don’t give up on us now:")**

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: The Police Pursuit Legislation
body:
There are only a few weeks left in the 2023 legislative session, and - as predicted - Democrats have refused to act meaningfully to reduce crime. But as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61589256:sBR_XKDNd:m:1:2610672541:2A556F19958D939DE89F21C6BF7AD0CD:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, There are only a few weeks left in the 2023 legislative session, and - as predicted - Democrats have refused to act meaningfully to reduce crime. But as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on... **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** GOP Representative Dan Griffey joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview.** ** As a former first responder, Rep. Griffey provided his experienced insights on Democrats' failed ban on police pursuits and their reckless efforts to stop police officers from pulling over vehicles for "non-moving" violations. He also described how the Democrats' 2021 anti-police legislation continues to endanger the lives of firefighters. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61589257:sBR_XKDNd:m:1:2610672541:2A556F19958D939DE89F21C6BF7AD0CD:r). **This week 's top story...** Legislative Democrats have been trying all legislative session to outrun their 2021 mistake of restricting police from doing their jobs by actually chasing suspects fleeing a crime scene. Remember, as The Herald reminded us, "in January Senator Manka Dhingra said it (a bill to reform the non-pursuit law) would not advance any further?" Turns out that "any further" meant the Senate floor, where Senate Bill 5352 was pulled and passed yesterday, and "By beating a 5 p.m. deadline for action on a non-budget bill originating in its chamber, the Senate keeps alive a conversation on one of the session's most divisive pieces of legislation." Now we'll see if the Democrats' pro-criminal caucus in the State House can keep outrunning the pursuit bill for the rest of session. [Read this story and others](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61589258:sBR_XKDNd:m:1:2610672541:2A556F19958D939DE89F21C6BF7AD0CD:r "https://www.heraldnet.com/news/in-surprising-move-state-senate-advances-changes-to-police-pursuit-law/").
**In case you missed it ... ** Washington consumers should not be surprised, as Jay Inslee's new cap-and-tax program is designed to raise prices, but to Democrat lawmakers, it's an opportunity. Says one bureaucrat, "This auction generates the money that's going to be the fuel for our state to transition to cleaner and cheaper ways to move around and to energize." And by cheaper, he means more expensive for people like you, but very profitable for people who contribute to Jay Inslee's political campaigns. After all, as the Times reports, "Gov. Jay Inslee's budget called for the auction revenue to fund anything from electric heat pumps for low-income populations, small businesses, and schools, to grants for tribes to lead solar and wind projects, and a new clean-energy research center at Washington State University." Just the usual Christmas tree of special interest payoffs, using your money. [Read this story and others](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61589259:sBR_XKDNd:m:1:2610672541:2A556F19958D939DE89F21C6BF7AD0CD:r). | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61589260:sBR_XKDNd:m:1:2610672541:2A556F19958D939DE89F21C6BF7AD0CD:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14156383&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osBR_XKDNd).

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Warning: Sexual brainwashing; don’t be a victim [WATCH FOX INTERVIEW HERE]
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425078:6IMCIfGNj:m:1:3331421248:F5EDD40B66C1EA748B503B2ADD365839:r)
---
**_" It's well known that 80%, even up to 85% of children who experience gender dysphoria and cross sex identification feel differently when they reach puberty after the early phases of puberty."_**
---
-Dr. Riittakerttu Kaltiala, Chief Psychiatrist, Tampere University Hospital and one of Finland's leading experts on pediatric gender care
---
|
---
I've filed a groundbreaking new lawsuit against a hospital and the doctors that lied to a young girl and her family, manipulating her into taking medication and having surgery to become a "boy." In fact, my client and I joined Laura Ingraham the other night on her great Fox News show _Ingraham Angle_ to discuss the lawsuit and the dangerous lies that woke doctors are telling patients and their parents to push their radical ideology. [**Please take a moment right now to watch video from this primetime interview and learn what we 're up against in this monumental battle - then consider making a tax-deductible gift to help fund this critical lawsuit.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425078:6IMCIfGNj:m:1:3331421248:F5EDD40B66C1EA748B503B2ADD365839:r) Chloe Cole was just 9 years old when she was bombarded with transgender ideology. As a child Chloe was bombarded--largely through social media--with the idea that "transitioning" would make her special, accepted and popular. When she shared with her pediatrician that she felt uncomfortable as a girl, leftist activist doctors put her on an irreversible path to chemically and surgically "transitioning" her gender. At age 13, the doctors began pumping Chloe full of dangerous drugs with unknown long-term side effects. At 15, they performed a double mastectomy on her. And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents. They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son. That's right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.) EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country. That's why we're not just suing Kaiser Permanente... **We 're suing Dr. Lisa Taylor** for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe's other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. **We 're suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le** for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. **And we 're suing Dr. Susanna Watson** who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe's mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe's mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria. _If folks like you and I don 't stand up and fight back now, who will? _ [**Chloe deserves justice, and children deserve protection - so can we count on your tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425078:6IMCIfGNj:m:1:3331421248:F5EDD40B66C1EA748B503B2ADD365839:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us. I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately, legal battles aren't free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly. **But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win - but as a nonprofit organization, that's only possible with your help.** In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children. I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you'll be with us every step of the way. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425078:6IMCIfGNj:m:1:3331421248:F5EDD40B66C1EA748B503B2ADD365839:r) Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won't turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child - if she's even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be "normal." But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: **_There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries ... and we're coming for you!_** My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, "you can either have a dead daughter or a live son." And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry "Big Pharma" and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole's case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice - and attack on American children - in its tracks.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425078:6IMCIfGNj:m:1:3331421248:F5EDD40B66C1EA748B503B2ADD365839:r)
---
P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to "just another part of her gender journey." Because they'd already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. [**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty today, and give our lawyers the resources they need to win this crucial fight.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62425078:6IMCIfGNj:m:1:3331421248:F5EDD40B66C1EA748B503B2ADD365839:r)

And all of this happened because doctors lied and concealed less invasive treatment options from Chloe and her parents. They told her parents point blank that they could have a dead daughter or a live son. That's right. A dead daughter or a living son. Those were their only options. (So they said.) EVEN THOUGH RESEARCH SHOWS THE VAST MAJORITY OF CHILDREN EXPERIENCING GENDER DYSPHORIA GET OVER IT AFTER PUBERTY BEGINS. Chloe Cole and her parents were lied to, coerced, and manipulated not only for monetary gain, but as part of a radical woke agenda that is being pushed on vulnerable children across the country. That's why we're not just suing Kaiser Permanente... We 're suing Dr. Lisa Taylor for prescribing testosterone and the dangerous puberty blocker Lupron Depot without doing ANY proper evaluation or treatment of Chloe's other symptoms OR receiving any kind of informed consent from Chloe or her parents for puberty blockers. We 're suing Dr. Hop Nguyen Le for performing a double mastectomy without evaluating whether it was the right decision for Chloe, who was just 15 years old and for not obtaining proper informed consent to perform the surgery. And we 're suing Dr. Susanna Watson who recommended that Chloe have her breasts removed without evaluating Chloe's mental or psychological condition. Additionally, she withheld information that may have changed Chloe's mind about the surgery, including a litany of studies that show drugs and surgeries do not help children suffering from gender dysphoria. If folks like you and I don 't stand up and fight back now, who will? My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty because I saw an opportunity to use my legal expertise to fight for our values and restore the rights left-wing extremists are trying to rip from us. I put together a team of talented, trusted attorneys taking on cases like this not for fame or money, but because we love our country and our Constitution. Unfortunately, legal battles aren't free and the costs of these lawsuits pile up quickly. But the Center for American Liberty takes these cases on anyway, going head-to-head with some of the most powerful and connected leftists in the country. And we win - but as a nonprofit organization, that's only possible with your help. In fact, Chloe Cole is just one of three clients we are representing on this issue, because we recognize just how serious of a threat it is to allow medical professionals to experiment with our children. I think this will be one of the most important cases in the history of our movement, and I hope you'll be with us every step of the way. Winning this lawsuit for Chloe Cole won't turn back the clock. Today Chloe faces medical issues stemming from the surgeries and medication. She will never be able to breastfeed a child - if she's even able to get pregnant after poison coursed through her veins. Her life will never be "normal." But winning this lawsuit will send a loud and clear message to every single doctor in America who is thinking of performing a gruesome and barbaric gender transition surgery on a child: There are steep financial consequences for lying to your patients and coercing young children and their parents into irreversible sex changes surgeries ... and we're coming for you! My friend, you and I cannot sit back while vulnerable children are chemically castrated when what they need is counseling... while parents are fed the lie, "you can either have a dead daughter or a live son." And we most certainly cannot sit back while money-hungry "Big Pharma" and woke doctors experiment on an entire generation of young Americans like lab rats. Thank you in advance for your help taking on Chloe Cole's case and stopping this outrageous medical malpractice - and attack on American children - in its tracks. | | Sincerely, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. Doctors told Chloe and her parents from the beginning that nothing was permanent. They told her she could change her mind if she wanted to, but when she did exactly that, they shrugged their shoulders at her, told her there was nothing they could do and chalked it up to "just another part of her gender journey." Because they'd already gotten what they wanted from her family. P.P.S. We must put a stop to this. Doctors have abandoned their sacred oath in the pursuit of payouts, and we must make them pay. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. For more information . | mailto:unsub-52962129330-echo7-D65B5BF6B0DF2D5B17ADC1621287FFB8@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

body:
We know it’s a Sunday, so we’ll be quick: **[First,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60094640/395977541/-1810142053?refcode=20230312_em_fr_b1_raja_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTZkY2U3OC0xMGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W8qTeRWGIlPSSfke7TcQw5IzGu65TL6Xst-uF2PNV70=)** the latest polls showed that the race for the House majority couldn’t be closer. **[And now, ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60094641/395977542/-1810142053?refcode=20230312_em_fr_b1_raja_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTZkY2U3OC0xMGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W8qTeRWGIlPSSfke7TcQw5IzGu65TL6Xst-uF2PNV70=)**National Republicans are unloading on ads attacking 15 of our most vulnerable House Democrats! **[The truth is, Peter: Majorities are won or lost in critical moments like this.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60094642/395977543/-1810142053?refcode=20230312_em_fr_b1_raja_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTZkY2U3OC0xMGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W8qTeRWGIlPSSfke7TcQw5IzGu65TL6Xst-uF2PNV70=)** If we don’t take action NOW to protect our Democrats, Republicans will take it as a sign that the House, Senate and White House are theirs for taking. name: Michael Bennet
subject: On the anniversary of the Child Tax Credit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60095219/395981525/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYyMTA1MS0xN2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6ZnFvtlK2ZbS-mBUEfC25OSdTwrHCGmevn34AXwkUg=)
Hi team – Two years ago this weekend, we passed the American Rescue Plan. I fought to make sure my Child Tax Credit was included in the final bill. In less than a year, we helped almost 4 million children, cut child poverty nearly in half, and cut hunger in families with children by 25%. **Most importantly, we gave working families a much-needed break.** I’m still fighting to make it permanent, and I won’t stop until we do. We can end child poverty and build an economy that works for everyone - not just a few at the top - and it starts with policies like the Child Tax Credit. Thank you, friend, for your support. Now, back to work. – Michael [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60095220/395981526/1557969388?refcode=x_031223_CTCanniversary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYyMTA1MS0xN2MxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6ZnFvtlK2ZbS-mBUEfC25OSdTwrHCGmevn34AXwkUg=) |

name: Adam Schiff (via RBG)
subject: re: California’s U.S. Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15862?t=6&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy) Friend —

I wanted you to hear it from me first. I’m running for the U.S. Senate in 2024, to protect our democracy and to build an economy that works for everyone.

**Because we’re in the fight of our lives for the future of our country.**

[**If you’re with me, chip in $3 right now to be one of the Founding Members of Team Schiff. Here’s a personal link: secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_rbg_q12023_spl-schiff**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15864?t=8&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15870?t=14&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15871?t=15&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15872?t=16&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
Our democracy is under assault by an extreme and power-hungry GOP whose leadership doesn’t care about truth, decency, or right and wrong. And they must be stopped. We did far better than expected against these radical Republicans in the midterms, but we are not out of the woods. Donald Trump is still the dominant voice in his party, and he has spawned a dangerous crowd of imitators.

_This is the fight of my life_ — to protect our democracy, build it back stronger, and hold those who would tear it down accountable.

And at a time when our economy simply isn’t working for millions of Americans, who see their wages fail to keep pace with the cost of food, education, and housing, and who don’t have the same opportunity to succeed as their parents, we simply can’t afford to wait and hope the economy fixes itself.

Because if hard-working folks don’t have a chance to succeed, they start looking for alternatives — like a demagogue who promises that he alone can fix it.

With our economy and our democracy at risk, we must fight:

For an economy that works for everyone and leaves no one behind. For universal health care. Against climate change and for a healthy planet. To stop gun violence and protect our children. To realize a bold and progressive future for the Golden State and our nation.

**With Trump on the ballot and control of the House and Senate at stake in 2024, I truly believe that the future of our country hinges on this election. That’s why I need to know that you’re ready for the fight ahead.**

Senator Feinstein hasn’t announced her plans yet. But we need to start preparing for the fights ahead right now.

Over the last six years, I’ve taken on Trump and Trumpism to protect our country. And I’d do it again. In a heartbeat.

Already, the Republicans are going after me. Trump bellows at me at his rallies. Fox News runs its constant smears, and Kevin McCarthy just removed me from the Intelligence Committee. They don’t want me to continue holding them accountable, and they certainly don’t want me in the Senate.

Many of Trump’s worst enablers are in the U.S. Senate, and it’s where a lot of the critical fights for the future will take place.

When I led the Senate impeachment trial against Trump, I stood my ground, no matter what they threw at me. And I will take on anyone to protect the country I love and its proud legacy of self-government. As I run for the Senate, I need to know that you are by my side.

[**Can I count on you to be a Founding Member of Team Schiff before the end of the day? Even $3, $10, or $25 goes a long way.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15864?t=18&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15870?t=24&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15871?t=25&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15872?t=26&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
I’ll keep you posted every step of the way, and I can’t thank you enough for all you’ve done for me and to protect our democracy.

Talk soon,

Adam
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy).**

[Click here](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.ronbegone.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Beat Ron DeSantis »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/120?t=4&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/121?t=5&akid=1715%2E564421%2EqlWqYy)
