Please help!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424885:6_7zIfGND:m:1:3331421248:8758B07E346DDB250E9E3650F5F3E300:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424885:6_7zIfGND:m:1:3331421248:8758B07E346DDB250E9E3650F5F3E300:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424885:6_7zIfGND:m:1:3331421248:8758B07E346DDB250E9E3650F5F3E300:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424885:6_7zIfGND:m:1:3331421248:8758B07E346DDB250E9E3650F5F3E300:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424885:6_7zIfGND:m:1:3331421248:8758B07E346DDB250E9E3650F5F3E300:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424885:6_7zIfGND:m:1:3331421248:8758B07E346DDB250E9E3650F5F3E300:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424885:6_7zIfGND:m:1:3331421248:8758B07E346DDB250E9E3650F5F3E300:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2? I know where I stand...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
&nbs; p; &nb; sp;
| |
---
| | | **State of the Union 2023: Biden re-ups amnesty call for illegal immigrants, GOP reps yell 'secure the border'**
**_FOX NEWS_**
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

name: Rick Larsen
subject: I say “voting,” you say “rights.” 🗳
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60095583/395982670/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWRjZjg3OC0xOWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-O2YDSLraK3GyJyrY5uYVM9KWFFPk23rDSuxK6g8Tg=&emci=c94786d1-8dbf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e5dcf878-19c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Washington does voter ID right. **I love how easily we can vote here in Washington state, and I think people around the country should be able to vote with the same ease.** In the previous Congress, I included this idea in the For the People Act, but despite passing the House the bill did not receive a vote in the Senate. So this year, Congressman Marc Veasey (TX-33) and I reintroduced the America Votes Act to make it easier for Americans to register to vote and cast their ballots. Across the country many states are tightening their voter registration laws – making it harder to register to vote and cast their ballot without a very specific form of ID. **In the first three months of this year, more than 150 restrictive voting bills have been introduced across the country**. Of those, at least 32 bills would require voters to show their ID at the polls in order to vote. **These voter ID laws suppress people's ability to vote and disproportionately affect marginalized communities and communities of color.** For example, 25 percent of Black adults do not have a government-issued ID. Now compare that to the eight percent of white adults who do not have a government issued ID. And why are there so many Black people without ID? Many elderly Black citizens were born at home, in rural poverty, and so no birth certificate was ever issued. Additionally, of the more than 700,000 transgender people in non-vote-by-mail-states, nearly 43 percent do not have an ID that reflects their correct name and gender. **These laws are voter suppression and they affect the lives of real people.** **this is wholly unacceptable.** In Washington we have seen how great voting is when we make it easy and accessible. We believe every American deserves to exercise their rights regardless of whether or not they have a driver's license. **The America Votes Act will make it easier for folks to register to vote and cast their ballot because it will remove burdensome voter ID laws that disproportionately affect marginalized communities.** Democracy only works if we all have a voice. That is why I am asking Congress to pass the America Votes Act so we can ensure every American can have a voice. More soon, **_Rick_** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | name: Jon Tester
subject: Politics isn’t a game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

| Peter,

Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic Senators looking out for them.

Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**

When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.

[_**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $5 or more donation between Fight for Progress and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60095696/395983108/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230312-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2YTVkNWY4LTE5YzEtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xiq0G5AoZ1bbrGmM_bCXItHg4t0hiEUcM_XBvwYHOpM=)

clean_body: Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. | Peter, Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic Senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you. When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans. That’s why I’m fighting so hard for working families in Montana and across the country. — Jon * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. | | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** The New York Times[ reported this week](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=295d1cf5c1614a20aa530ba8acd55951&_e=2dd-SlnS0Q8AccX-50LWJhgGzNNQS3SmPsSrG5yDTFxFq77kPuy-oCvxdmSGKYB3x5AIyWv0G2azLZFZUkIm5NG6yUxZEM2nJ6wNEckfkdXEEa9QZXLDRH66hq43FRwglkaSyYClkmgdNRKwF3pUsAskrPPqPNAol6Ml4t6k4A-gnyiRMohGeIOjPdED1gSEpz756vHnt08T05waGR51Wz-6rDITR7aSOxBgQGNundXFGJITAXu_o6u1nylyLcrJ2xnIDWhOBdBhrbfagaEakLC97X-r6Dna1CjyGHJ7Tmrd5BVoAeLZaXH0DkYb50UDaCpYTiy2APn3WdnhE7IfoXgjNRZZuzeA7_NdFNvB2fTeh-GZXhD8YUTjkruW1GPU) that more Asian Americans are voting Republican in New York– I see the same thing here in Virginia. The reason why is that immigrants like myself came to this country for the opportunity for ourselves and education for our children. The Democrats have repeatedly proven that their policies stand in the way of the American dream. That’s why I joined Unleash America. So we can recruit leaders from all walks of life who believe in the American Dream and will support us, the voters, not special interests. When those who agree with us get out the vote, we win. And I’m committed to building a large coalition of Americans who share these values. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of [Unleash America PAC](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=295d1cf5c1614a20aa530ba8acd55951&_e=2dd-SlnS0Q8AccX-50LWJn8OHINLFjh7IzIh2ve9-2P51Xxv6ngkVMSUbN8n6uNNQxx9wi7TUqYbc7C3yXAqyG4TI7lqTbZP-dnzZMbBXUYT0HYLe67K43jF7hofcaVureQ1hjADyER1GXzejxdwLLbQICrfmor25PgmjatvvtsLMF7Zrw8oNKuj3Cp1ImnJd5KVKjy46qoAFA3EuxyZILo-57DiWipUNqL1V86RVTGxnZmKDqh6MQuc-ot8geMjoesauVyY4U7zglUcNHoyzaR6wRy678YXijGVF00zShU%3D)

[CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=295d1cf5c1614a20aa530ba8acd55951&_e=2dd-SlnS0Q8AccX-50LWJuPpXBTikWq5qvYaFOR7lIUy_nuQQBJ0Hkg-CZ6kSdeE9kYI6_gd-t5dv-qQx4kMbqiHhZUGsNxHp5fKn3fb0IgSWTRarjCYIePG0ozgU-1mKb3bnT2tzDi43Izls15jn29y_WXe3wxODht7HedcSqtUYLffOEK4uFY-uCgs36D-6eSqPtKX-z_hR5SlYQn7iA1AadeEsNj1RQdcdM07I13yTCqNfQAxtzZv8U6mX9eIrxujBIhRm4ypMh-G1Q669iEWJSZ-CiQsy8Kz_zcZgELlcq-bTKeclWlKRUdK_5n6t8dJhFOzg13gJRfMuSNLHzYhhs_gQhwGCVrcjmB1vvygwK5qlwJIRkn-RskGLynn) How much has China inserted itself into our country and our everyday lives? In a new Townhall op-ed, Hung compares what China is doing to the United States to the trojan horse story of the Greeks defeating Troy from within. Spy on Americans through Tiktok and balloon, buying up US farmland, sending massive amounts of fentanyl through our southern border- many of our country's challenges today can be connected to CCP involvement. Cao provides a roadmap for how our country can change direction on how we address China.

clean_body: | | | | | March 12, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 4 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) The New York Times that more Asian Americans are voting Republican in New York– I see the same thing here in Virginia. The reason why is that immigrants like myself came to this country for the opportunity for ourselves and education for our children. The Democrats have repeatedly proven that their policies stand in the way of the American dream. That’s why I joined Unleash America. So we can recruit leaders from all walks of life who believe in the American Dream and will support us, the voters, not special interests. When those who agree with us get out the vote, we win. And I’m committed to building a large coalition of Americans who share these values. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | America's Trojan Horse How much has China inserted itself into our country and our everyday lives? In a new Townhall op-ed, Hung compares what China is doing to the United States to the trojan horse story of the Greeks defeating Troy from within. Spy on Americans through Tiktok and balloon, buying up US farmland, sending massive amounts of fentanyl through our southern border- many of our country's challenges today can be connected to CCP involvement. Cao provides a roadmap for how our country can change direction on how we address China. | Hung Cao joins Wilkow! on the Salem News Channel Hung joined Andrew Wilkow on the Salem News channel this week and covered a lot of ground. The two discussed America’s military preparedness when facing threats from China and Russia, the war in Ukraine, the impending insolvency of social security, and more. | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. | Friends, This week, the NH Senate took an important step toward creating a Parent's Bill of Rights in New Hampshire schools by passing SB 272 out of committee despite opposition from Senate Democrats and their liberal allies. Read [SB 272](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMTY5MTQ5MzU4NzgyNTUxNjUyJmM9YTNtNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMTAwMDcyMjYyJmQ9ZThwM2QydQ==.RmNl4P1Y-32S2N2NFsAmvxQGGQVLDfekm0fKmKytLx0) here!

| **A parent’s role in the development of their child is critical,** and the consequences of purposely hiding information from parents set a dangerous precedent for school staff and vulnerable students alike. It is a parent’s responsibility to ensure the health of their children and to make decisions about their well-being. As much as we appreciate the important role that schools and teachers play in our children’s lives, these decisions belong to parents. **This bill prevents schools from hiding information from New Hampshire parents, plain and simple. ** Thank you, \- NH Senate Republicans

name: HER Time Abortion Alert
subject: it never ends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60096323/395984680/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230312_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg2NjllNDgtMWVjMS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GwAiUdGgdoJFeJVjHzju4Aeybou6XADseU6tC38u2eo=)
---
Peter, the assault on abortion access across the country never ends. Idaho is the latest state to try it, with a new method of restriction they’re calling “abortion trafficking” — disgusting. A new bill that just passed the Idaho state House would make it a felony to help minors obtain abortion care without their parents’ knowledge. Almost all abortions are already banned in Idaho, but this new bill would make it a crime to even assist a minor over the border to Washington or Oregon to obtain the procedure. Those found guilty could spend up to **five years** in jail. This new bill means that Idaho children and teens, pregnant through rape or incest, would have no legal way to obtain an abortion without parental consent. They would be **trapped** in Idaho, forced to give birth if their parents say so. They would have absolutely no say over what happens to their own bodies. It’s sickening to think about, but it’s likely to become reality in just a few weeks if anti-choice Idaho Governor Brad Little signs it into law. We are working around the clock to protect reproductive freedom all across the country - but we’re fighting many battles in dozens of different states. clean_body: | = Peter, the assault on abortion access across the country never ends. Idaho is the latest state to try it, with a new method of restriction they’re calling “abortion trafficking” — disgusting. A new bill that just passed the Idaho state House would make it a felony to help minors obtain abortion care without their parents’ knowledge. Almost all abortions are already banned in Idaho, but this new bill would make it a crime to even assist a minor over the border to Washington or Oregon to obtain the procedure. Those found guilty could spend up to five years in jail. This new bill means that Idaho children and teens, pregnant through rape or incest, would have no legal way to obtain an abortion without parental consent. They would be trapped in Idaho, forced to give birth if their parents say so. They would have absolutely no say over what happens to their own bodies. It’s sickening to think about, but it’s likely to become reality in just a few weeks if anti-choice Idaho Governor Brad Little signs it into law. We are working around the clock to protect reproductive freedom all across the country - but we’re fighting many battles in dozens of different states. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

I asked you yesterday.
I asked you this morning.
And with just 7 hours until my End of Week Deadline, I’m truly sorry to have to ask you again.
[**_But I still need 17 more Democrats from Pennsylvania to confirm their Team Pelosi Memberships before midnight. Every day, I’m watching Republicans scheme to roll back our progress and raise enough money to defeat our Democrats and expand their Majority in 2024. We can’t let them. That’s why clinching critical benchmarks like tonight’s deadline is SO important. clean_body: Laaaaast call 🔔 🔔 | Hey friend, I’m really uncomfortable asking, but with less than 10 days until my deadline, I need to: | We need everyone to put in a big effort as we kick off our campaign efforts. As such, any donation made in the next 60 minutes will have a 10X impact. Here is my pledge to you: I am an America First candidate who will always put our country first. I am an Afghanistan veteran who understands the needs of our military. I am a Republican who will hold Communist China accountable. I am a father who will shield our children from destructive Woke ideology. I am a supporter of law enforcement who will make sure our streets are safe. I am a truth-teller who will defend our country against the Radical Left. I am a Patriot who will uphold our Constitution. Are you with me in this fight for our future? If so, I urge you to contribute to my campaign before it’s too late. Everything is on the line. | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
Thanks to your grassroots support, the DNC’s early investments had a powerful multiplier effect for Democrats up and down the ballot in the midterms. But our work is far from over. | |
---
The DNC’s early investments had a powerful **multiplier** effect for Democrats up and down the ballot in the midterms. Check out just a few of these results we were proud to help play a part in:
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ63HdS0YBazw9EBy8dYq0CS0m6B6R23PBGOeyvmth8wuSfnaoxmD71KMEpYh5k3y5ZGpl11ok7G3I-f7YtDqhrkLnqV8kF04Y0oCJOYRri8Xl66aBMZ4l8Qv2tXb0ret0bXVadbi5O00vyWimQHHJe_yG7BMbiiXwyHFDMeQgrgAj-6LEu-tekVuGrks_UWGtULJsQTjioFjuM_rs4kaAdAQrFbt8RbKYYDJ8wmAW0j9YKzYWTizsKhKaKTUyWBDvXUY7I8JK38RYtQpgx0gKtm1ha8rsRsyxQzCpQIVojMq06RgfCpVOALenqW7KrH80yt4ZM-PHXrEv7Tv898vSXC91rDMPx-T6cPZsTdYqs69WiyHSZb45zxLyiJFF1WdY-5J1_XfFv8hzn395X7zUV6IYBRXAgOfuBRNXLNPhlPLcBYHsWlKCXkL-8EvYxiClCmUnesx5ghX5RYUJ6AXDHNu8hzWbmFTsz5l8IMXSu6t6rFqqRtZ0UUeAFSLDnAA4X9T7MGFIPvHF_70pxYm7QdGBirvilS01-K_99BYhvlP1U1_GnA57nGD8wAppGnlRop58pO8R4__KYwas--Q88Wd1ft1mm9vF1dcsh3t01WnmmttUNMjm4tUyfjolRopHhWClC268qGRC9Im3Kx_Hxrm0GM5E-EWuGtUwiRpxQDVV2YMHaqdsZpmF7YPYNpWF/3uf/MG-_n3HbRFqbpLdM6O7csA/h0/svnAwc7vko0SAC1bjEhuaW6xCILBFvZ7_dL9XOItmtA)
Grassroots support helped make this possible, Derek. **But our work is far from over.** You may have heard me talk about **Nested Opportunities** before. Nested opportunities are states where we have the chance to double _(or even triple!)_ our impact by increasing our investments _right now_ so we can lift Democratic candidates to victory in multiple races. What kinds of investments? Programs in on-the-ground organizing, voter protection services, data and technology infrastructure, and so much more that will make all the difference in our fight ahead. **We _know_ these investments paid off -- we saw the success of these early investments this past November.** **[With 2024 on the horizon, right now is a pivotal moment to build on these programs so that Democratic campaigns can cash in on them come Election Day. clean_body: Thanks to your grassroots support, the DNC’s early investments had a powerful multiplier effect for Democrats up and down the ballot in the midterms. But our work is far from over. | | The DNC’s early investments had a powerful multiplier effect for Democrats up and down the ballot in the midterms. Check out just a few of these results we were proud to help play a part in: Grassroots support helped make this possible, Derek. But our work is far from over. You may have heard me talk about Nested Opportunities before. Nested opportunities are states where we have the chance to double (or even triple!) our impact by increasing our investments right now so we can lift Democratic candidates to victory in multiple races. What kinds of investments? Programs in on-the-ground organizing, voter protection services, data and technology infrastructure, and so much more that will make all the difference in our fight ahead. We know these investments paid off -- we saw the success of these early investments this past November. Thank you so much for reading through -- let’s defend and build on the progress we’ve made. name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: What the Dignity of Work means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

I've spent my life fighting for Ohioans and for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live or what kind of work you do. The belief that no one should have to work a second or third job _just to get by_. The belief that folks who play by the rules deserve to retire with dignity.
When we fight for workers, we fight for all people. So whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, you work for tips or for a salary, you're raising children or caring for an aging parent – I promise to fight for you.
**But I'll be honest: I can't win this fight alone, friend. I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and I need your grassroots support to help me defend this seat.[That's why I'm personally asking: Will you pitch in $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio, protect our Senate majority and keep fighting for the Dignity of Work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60096647/395986117/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk11-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWY0MTBlZC0yMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wl-pVBc9pqJXSQ9hHwB8SeoH91qcm0pEHbae4b8SaZg=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60096648/395986118/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk11-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWY0MTBlZC0yMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wl-pVBc9pqJXSQ9hHwB8SeoH91qcm0pEHbae4b8SaZg=)
---
I grew up in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. But I watched as jobs were shipped overseas, savings were lost and hopes for a comfortable retirement were dashed – all as health care and prescription drug costs skyrocketed. I'm running for reelection to tackle these critical issues and make sure that our country not just recognizes – but _celebrates –_ the Dignity of Work.
But here's why I'm worried: **Experts at _CNN_ say that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and ****Washington Republicans are already launching misleading attack ads against me. I'm a TOP target for defeat, because the battle for Senate control could all come down to what happens in Ohio. So, I have to ask:**
**[Please, friend, can I count on you to chip in $5 – or any amount that is meaningful to you – so we can win this race and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60096649/395986119/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk11-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWY0MTBlZC0yMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wl-pVBc9pqJXSQ9hHwB8SeoH91qcm0pEHbae4b8SaZg=)**
With gratitude,

Sherrod
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60096650/395986120/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk11-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWY0MTBlZC0yMWMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wl-pVBc9pqJXSQ9hHwB8SeoH91qcm0pEHbae4b8SaZg=)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: You won’t believe what Trump’s judge in Texas just did
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60096727/395986624/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTQ4OGEwNS0yNGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xi5dnSQ7nVot63esZCCbnk1P048ubzpCkdHZ1VAXEE=&emci=48883f5b-1ac1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=55488a05-24c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Over the last few weeks, you've heard me talk a lot about the abortion medication called mifepristone. That's because any day now, a right-wing, Trump-appointed judge in Texas is expected to overturn a decades-long FDA approval of the medicine, effectively banning access to it nationwide. This case is a big deal and has the potential to be even more dangerous and consequential than the repeal of _Roe v. Wade_ itself — because of the potential for a nationwide ban on the medication. But it gets worse: late last night, news broke that the judge in this case is doing everything in his power to conceal hearings on the lawsuit from the public. **This is outrageous and nothing short of cowardly.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60096728/395986625/-2044921950?refcode=2023-03-12-mifepristonehearing&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=55488a05-24c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTQ4OGEwNS0yNGMxLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xi5dnSQ7nVot63esZCCbnk1P048ubzpCkdHZ1VAXEE=) For years, conservatives have stacked our nation's courts with judges and justices willing to do their dirty work for them in a scheme of court-washing. Hiding any hearing – let alone one this consequential – is not the norm and only further proof that right-wing extremists are willing to go to any extreme to rip away women's reproductive freedom. A few weeks ago, I took to the Senate floor to call on the Biden administration to guarantee access to mifepristone by ignoring this illegitimate ruling and keeping mifepristone on the market regardless of any ruling. It has never been more critical that we do everything in our power to protect access to reproductive care for every American. **No matter how hard they work to keep their plans in the dark, I'll keep fighting like hell to shed light on their efforts to put women's lives in danger.** More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution clean_body: | | | | Over the last few weeks, you've heard me talk a lot about the abortion medication called mifepristone. That's because any day now, a right-wing, Trump-appointed judge in Texas is expected to overturn a decades-long FDA approval of the medicine, effectively banning access to it nationwide. This case is a big deal and has the potential to be even more dangerous and consequential than the repeal of Roe v. Wade itself — because of the potential for a nationwide ban on the medication. But it gets worse: late last night, news broke that the judge in this case is doing everything in his power to conceal hearings on the lawsuit from the public. This is outrageous and nothing short of cowardly. = For years, conservatives have stacked our nation's courts with judges and justices willing to do their dirty work for them in a scheme of court-washing. Hiding any hearing – let alone one this consequential – is not the norm and only further proof that right-wing extremists are willing to go to any extreme to rip away women's reproductive freedom. A few weeks ago, I took to the Senate floor to call on the Biden administration to guarantee access to mifepristone by ignoring this illegitimate ruling and keeping mifepristone on the market regardless of any ruling. It has never been more critical that we do everything in our power to protect access to reproductive care for every American. No matter how hard they work to keep their plans in the dark, I'll keep fighting like hell to shed light on their efforts to put women's lives in danger. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dominic=20Rapini?=
subject: Our Voices were Heard in Hartford
body:
Very proud of everyone who submitted testimony on so many far left election proposals | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=4f972f53a8)
---
# From the Desk of Dominic Rapini
|
---
# We Carried the Fight to Hartford

The GAE committee heard testimony on a variety of legislative proposals over a 7 hour period. Our voices were heard, here is what I had had say about Ranked Choice Voting
[](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=809d969ed9&e=8763c56857)
“Ranked Choice Voting violates the American principle of One voter, one vote. “ Opening line of my testimony.
_Be Brave, Be Brief, Be Heard - the 3 B’s!_

What’s on Deck: (Click on Bill to read)
[**Proposed H.B. No. 5714**
Session Year 2023
](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=d8547ee1c2&e=8763c56857)
#### AN ACT CONCERNING INCARCERATED INDIVIDUALS AND VOTING

**Principle** : The role of government is to place a priority on law abiding citizens and not return rights to those who have committed acts of murder, rape, robbery, and other offense against society.——————————————————————-[**Proposed H.B. No. 5704**
Session Year 2023](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=c1590b3437&e=8763c56857)

#### AN ACT CONCERNING MANDATORY VOTING

**Principle** : Requiring citizens to vote is a violation of the first amendment guaranteeing free speech. Compelling us to vote is coercion and thus compelled speech. As Americans we have to right to be silent and therefore the choice not to vote.——————————————————————-[**Proposed H.B. No. 5701**
Session Year 2023](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=5984dc4e00&e=8763c56857)

#### **AN ACT INSTITUTING RANKED-CHOICE VOTING FOR MUNICIPAL, STATE AND FEDERAL ELECTIONS**

**Principle** : Ranked Choice Voting is a Ponzi scheme that violates the American practice of One Voter, One Vote. The complexity of RCV will suppress voters and diminish civic engagement. We shouldn’t need an instruction manual to vote.
**Ranked Choice Voting is a Ponzi scheme - Read here:**[**LINK**](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=17b66c019a&e=8763c56857)

# Take Action and email the GAE Chairs your position on the proposed election legistlation
| [Email GAE Chair - Mae Flexer ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=f39dceedcd&e=8763c56857)
---
| [Email GAE Chair - Matt Blumenthal ](mailto:Matt.Blumenthal@cga.ct.gov)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Senator Sinema and Silicon Valley Bank
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
What’s the difference between Senator Sinema and me?

Peter —
What’s the difference between Senator Sinema and me?
When bank lobbyists asked me to weaken bank regulations that led to the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank last week, I said no.
When they asked Senator Sinema, she asked how much and voted yes.
Now we are all going to pay for her mistake.
\- Ruben Gallego
* * *

Senator Sinema has received millions of dollars from wealthy interests who have lobbied for weaker financial oversight. If everyone reading this donated just $20 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign, we’ll beat them at the ballot box and replace Senator Sinema. If that sounds worth $20, please make a donation to Ruben’s campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline ends. Thank you.

body:
Did you see what President Biden said about our major victories in special elections this year? | | |
---
| | President Biden is sounding the alarm as Democrats have already won 10 special elections this year! name: Suzan DelBene
subject: Wanted you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene.

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Dan Kildee to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members** – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November.

I’ve seen Dan’s leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need his voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across mid-Michigan. subject: The award for best supporting role goes to... You!

body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=38%2E35263%2Ep8eaiS ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

For Hollywood, today is a big day for awards. But we want to present you
with something special:

The award for best supporting role goes to ... Peter!

We might not have a gold statue to give to you, but on behalf of Tammy and
our team, we wanted to personally thank you for being a key part of our
campaign.

Every time you interact with our emails, you are building on the work to
ensure our communities in Wisconsin and across the country continue to
grow and thrive. So thank you for every donation, every action you take,
and every email you open.

Tammy wouldn't be able to take on her toughest fights without your
support.

We know there’ll be many challenges ahead of us, from baseless Republican
attacks to increasingly important fundraising deadlines – but knowing we
can count on you to have our back is the greatest gift we can ask for.

deadline, so we are hoping for your support once again to get us to our

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Where can we send your Lady Liberty Sticker?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
If you chip in at least $15, we’ll send you five.
#
Derek -
Here at VoteVets, we’re trying to serve a specific kind of person.
Let us explain.
We’ve all seen the stores for most Veteran brands. There’s usually some cool stuff on them — unit specific shirts, patriotic hats, funny stickers.
The problem is, there’s also usually some stuff that we’d never consider wearing, let alone buying. If you’re reading this email, you probably know what we’re talking about.
We got pretty tired of that, so we started rolling out our own merch.
A good example is our Lady Liberty sticker.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar23-rr.Z3WCG3&refcode=em230312-1-rr-ab-full&t=1&akid=7785%2E3013755%2E0jisvW)
From Molly Pitcher to Lori Ann Piestewa, there’s a long and proud legacy of women serving in the armed forces and in combat. And here at VoteVets, we honor that legacy.
Beyond that, we firmly believe that welcoming immigrants and refugees is always the right thing to do.
Most Vet stores wouldn’t touch either of these groups in their merch. But at VoteVets, we’re proud to.
So, to celebrate Women’s History Month, we’re running a new promotion:
[**If you chip in $15 we’ll send you FIVE Lady Liberty stickers. At $3 a piece, that’s enough to give some to your friends, put one on your garage fridge, your cooler, your water bottle, whatever you want.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar23-rr.Z3WCG3&refcode=em230312-1-rr-ab-full&t=2&akid=7785%2E3013755%2E0jisvW)
| [GET YOUR STICKERS](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar23-rr.Z3WCG3&refcode=em230312-1-rr-ab-full&t=3&akid=7785%2E3013755%2E0jisvW)
---
These stickers are all union printed, too. So think of it as a trio — honoring women Vets, supporting immigrants and refugees, and promoting union labor.
Show your pride, and get your stickers today.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=7785%2E3013755%2E0jisvW).

name: Full Mag News
